To address this challenge, we present MAG-VLAQ, a foundation-model-enhanced query aggregation framework for multi-modal aerial-ground cross-view place recognition. Specifically, our approach leverages pre-trained foundation models to extract dense visual tokens from both ground and aerial images, as well as expressive geometric tokens from ground LiDAR observations. These heterogeneous tokens are then projected into a shared embedding space for cross-modal alignment and fusion. As our main contribution, we propose ODE-conditioned VLAQ, which tightly couples neural ordinary differential equations (ODE)-based RGB-LiDAR fusion with vectors of locally aggregated queries (VLAQ). In this design, the VLAQ query centers are dynamically adapted according to the fused multi-modal state. This mechanism allows the final global descriptor to preserve globally learned retrieval prototypes while remaining responsive to scene-specific visual and geometric evidence, significantly improving aerial-ground matching. Extensive experiments on KITTI360-AG and nuScenes-AG validate the effectiveness of our proposed MAG-VLAQ. Notably, on KITTI360-AG, our MAG-VLAQ nearly doubles the state-of-the-art performance, achieving 61.1 Recall@1 in the satellite setting, compared with 34.5 from the closest competing approach.

</details>


### [149] [Relational Retrieval: Leveraging Known-Novel Interactions for Generalized Category Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09420)
*Yulin Xu,Chunqi Guo,Yuanzhen Shuai,Jianyuan Ni*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Relational Pattern Consistency (RPC)方法，通过关系检索视角解决广义类别发现(GCD)问题，利用双向知识传递机制实现标注数据与未标注数据的相互增强，在多个基准测试上达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GCD方法将标注和未标注数据分开处理，缺乏互动机会，导致信息利用不充分。

Method: 提出RPC框架：(1) 使用One-vs-All分类器进行软ID/OOD分解；(2) 已知类保留：传递语义行为对齐；(3) 类别发现：利用同类样本与已知类原型的关系不变性，将不可靠的伪标签转化为关系模式匹配。

Result: 在通用和细粒度基准测试上均达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: 双向知识传递设计使标注数据引导未标注学习，同时通过集体关系特征发现新类别，有效解决了GCD问题。

Abstract: In this study, we tackle Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) via a Relational Retrieval perspective, explicitly coupling labeled and unlabeled data through bidirectional knowledge transfer. While existing methods treat these sources separately, missing valuable interaction opportunities, we propose Relational Pattern Consistency (RPC) that enables mutual enhancement. RPC employs One-vs-All classifiers for soft ID/OOD decomposition, then introduces two mechanisms: (i) for known-class preservation, we transfer semantic behavioral alignment; (ii) for category discovery, we leverage the insight that samples from the same category maintain invariant relationships with known-class prototypes, transforming unreliable pseudo-labeling into well-defined relational pattern matching. This bidirectional design allows labeled data to guide unlabeled learning while discovering novel categories through their collective relational signatures. Extensive experiments demonstrate RPC achieves state-of-the-art performance on both generic and fine-grained benchmarks.

</details>


### [150] [AtteConDA: Attention-Based Conflict Suppression in Multi-Condition Diffusion Models and Synthetic Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09425)
*Shogo Noguchi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出多条件图像生成方法，通过融合语义分割、深度和边缘信息并处理条件冲突，实现高保真结构保持的图像增强，用于提升高阶自动驾驶任务的数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件图像生成用于数据增强时，仅用标注作为条件不足以保留高阶驾驶任务所需的详细高层场景结构，需要更丰富的结构信息保持能力。

Method: 输入原始图像的语义分割、深度和边缘作为多条件，设计冲突处理建模方法，在生成时协调多条件间的不一致，实现更强的结构保持。

Result: 所提方法在结构保持方面优于单条件或未处理冲突的多条件方法，并建立了面向驾驶任务的生成与评估基准。

Conclusion: 本文解决了多条件生成中的条件冲突问题，为高阶自动驾驶任务的数据稀缺缓解提供了重要进展，并为后续研究提供了比较基础。

Abstract: Recent conditional image generation methods can improve controllability by generating images that are faithful to conditions such as sketches, human poses, segmentation maps, and depth. By applying these techniques to image augmentation while preserving annotations, generated images can be used as additional training data and can improve recognition performance. However, for high-level driving tasks such as traffic-rule extraction and driving-behavior understanding, simply using annotations as conditions is insufficient. Instead, images must be augmented while preserving the detailed high-level structure of the original scene. One possible solution is to use multiple conditions so that generated images retain diverse structural cues after generation. However, when multiple conditions are used, conflicts among conditions can prevent reliable structure preservation. In this work, we input semantic segmentation, depth, and edges extracted from the original image into a multi-condition image generation model, thereby providing rich structural information as conditions. We further propose a modeling approach for handling conflicts among multiple conditions and show that it enables image generation with stronger structural preservation. We also build a generation framework and evaluation protocol for driving tasks, establishing a basis for comparison with prior and future models. As a result, this work contributes to image generation research by addressing condition conflicts in multi-condition generation and provides an important step toward mitigating data scarcity in high-level autonomous-driving tasks.

</details>


### [151] [Evading Visual Aphasia: Contrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09429)
*Jie Ma,Yihang Liu,Zhike Qiu,Jiayi Ji,Xiaoshuai Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 现有方法假设低注意力视觉token冗余并直接剪枝，但COAST发现早期被忽略的token可能对组合推理至关重要，过早剪枝会导致"视觉失语症"。为此提出无需训练的COAST框架，通过对比自适应语义路由保留关键证据和空间上下文，在剪枝77.8%视觉token、加速2.15倍的同时保持98.64%原始性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示现有视觉token剪枝方法的根本缺陷：基于浅层文本-图像注意力的标量排序不可靠，会丢弃对组合推理（如次要对象、空间关系）至关重要的token，导致模型丧失视觉基础而退化为依赖语言先验的"视觉失语症"。

Method: 提出COAST（对比自适应语义token剪枝）框架：1）利用原生跨模态注意力识别查询特定锚点；2）通过注意力熵估计上下文分散度；3）自适应权衡语义证据与空间上下文的保留比例；4）采用对比路由分数同时保留锚点对齐证据和互补空间上下文。

Result: 在7个基准上，剪枝77.8%视觉token，实现2.15倍延迟加速，保留98.64%原始平均性能；在不同token预算和多个LVLM家族上均一致优于强剪枝基线。

Conclusion: 自适应语义路由（COAST）是传统一次性标量剪枝的稳健替代方案，证明了在视觉-语言推理中需要更精细、自适应的token保留策略而非简单的低分丢弃。

Abstract: Are low-attention visual tokens truly redundant in vision-language reasoning? Existing pruning methods often assume so, ranking visual tokens by shallow text-to-image attention and discarding low-scoring patches to accelerate LVLM inference. We show that this scalar criterion is unreliable for compositional reasoning: tokens ignored in early layers can later become essential for resolving secondary objects, spatial relations, and contextual cues. Premature pruning can therefore induce Visual Aphasia, a failure mode in which the model loses visual grounding and falls back on language priors. We introduce COAST (COntrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning), a training-free pruning framework that casts compression as adaptive semantic routing. COAST uses native cross-modal attention to identify query-specific anchors and estimate contextual dispersion via attention entropy, then adapts the retention trade-off between semantic evidence and spatial context. It further uses a contrastive routing score to preserve both anchor-aligned evidence and complementary spatial context. Across seven benchmarks, COAST reduces visual tokens by 77.8% and achieves a 2.15x latency speedup while retaining 98.64% of the original average performance. Beyond a single backbone or compression setting, COAST consistently outperforms strong pruning baselines across token budgets and generalizes across multiple LVLM families, showing that adaptive semantic routing is a robust alternative to one-shot scalar pruning

</details>


### [152] [FlashAR: Efficient Post-Training Acceleration for Autoregressive Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09430)
*Junkang Zhou,Yefei He,Feng Chen,Weijie Wang,Bohan Zhuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FlashAR是一种轻量级后训练适配框架，通过双向下一token预测将预训练的光栅扫描自回归模型高效转化为高度并行的图像生成器，使用仅0.05%的原始训练数据即可实现最高22.9倍的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模自回归模型在图像生成中表现出色，但其顺序光栅扫描解码依赖严格的下一token预测，导致推理成本极高。现有加速方法要么需要从头预训练全新范式，要么引入训练-推理差距或改变预测目标。因此，需要一种高效的后训练适配方法，在最小化对预训练模型修改的前提下实现并行生成。

Method: FlashAR保留原始自回归头作为水平头（行向预测），新增轻量级垂直头（列向预测）。垂直头从中间层分支而非最终层，以绕过水平头固有偏差。使用可学习融合门动态结合水平和垂直预测。采用两阶段适配：先从预训练模型初始化垂直头，再与骨干网络联合微调。

Result: 在LlamaGen和Emu3.5上的实验表明，FlashAR仅使用0.05%的原始训练数据进行轻量级后训练，即可在512x512图像生成中实现最高22.9倍的推理加速。

Conclusion: FlashAR证明了一种高效的轻量级后训练适配方法，能在不破坏预训练模型已学习先验的前提下，将自回归模型转化为高度并行的生成器，显著降低推理成本。

Abstract: Large-scale autoregressive models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in image generation. However, their sequential raster-scan decoding relies on strictly next-token prediction, making inference prohibitively expensive. Existing acceleration methods typically either introduce entirely new generation paradigms that necessitate costly pre-training from scratch, or enable parallel generation at the expense of a training-inference gap or altered prediction objectives. In this paper, we introduce FlashAR, a lightweight post-training adaptation framework that efficiently adapts a pre-trained raster-scan autoregressive model into a highly parallel generator based on two-way next-token prediction. Our key insight is that effective adaptation should minimize modifications to the pre-trained model's original training objective to preserve its learned prior. Accordingly, we retain the original AR head as a horizontal head for row-wise prediction and introduce a complementary, lightweight vertical head for column-wise prediction. To facilitate efficient adaptation, we branch the vertical head from an intermediate layer rather than the final layer, bypassing the inherent horizontal head bias. Moreover, since horizontal and vertical predictions capture complementary dependencies whose relative importance varies across target positions, we employ a learnable fusion gate to dynamically combine the two predictions at each position. To further reduce adaptation cost, we propose a two-stage adaptation pipeline: the vertical head is first initialized through adaptation from the pre-trained autoregressive model before jointly fine-tuned with backbone to adapt to the new decoding paradigm. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Emu3.5 show that FlashAR achieves up to a 22.9x speedup for 512x512 image generation through a lightweight post-training with merely 0.05% of the original training data.

</details>


### [153] [Offline Preference Optimization for Rectified Flow with Noise-Tracked Pairs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09433)
*Yunhong Lu,Qichao Wang,Hengyuan Cao,Xiaoyin Xu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出PNAPO框架，通过保留先验噪声对来增强偏好数据，利用整流流动的直线特性估计中间状态，并引入动态正则化策略，在减少计算量的同时提升文本到图像模型的偏好指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏好数据集仅存储最终赢家/输家图像，无法利用整流流动模型生成过程被特定先验噪声索引且去噪轨迹近乎直线的特性。而传统DPO风格对齐方法通过独立前向加噪过程估计轨迹，与真实反向动力学不匹配且引入不必要的方差。

Method: 1. 将标准(prompt, winner, loser)三元组扩展为六元组，保留生成每张图像时的成对先验噪声。2. 利用整流流动的直线特性，通过噪声-图像插值估计中间状态，约束轨迹估计空间并得到更紧的偏好优化替代目标。3. 引入动态正则化策略，根据赢家-输家奖励差距和训练进度自适应调整DPO正则化强度。

Result: 在SOTA整流流动T2I骨干网络上，PNAPO一致提升了偏好指标，同时大幅降低了训练计算量。

Conclusion: PNAPO作为专门为整流流动设计的离策略对齐框架，通过利用RF的直线轨迹特性，在数据和算法层面实现了更高效、更稳定的偏好优化。

Abstract: Existing preference datasets for text-to-image models typically store only the final winner/loser images. This representation is insufficient for rectified flow (RF) models, whose generation is naturally indexed by a specific prior noise sample and follows a nearly straight denoising trajectory. In contrast, prior DPO-style alignment for diffusion models commonly estimates trajectories using an independent forward noising process, which can be mismatched to the true reverse dynamics and introduces unnecessary variance. We propose Prior Noise-Aware Preference Optimization (PNAPO), an off-policy alignment framework specialized for rectified flow. PNAPO augments preference data by retaining the paired prior noises used to generate each winner/loser image, turning the standard (prompt, winner, loser) triplet into a sextuple. Leveraging the straight-line property of RF, we estimate intermediate states via noise-image interpolation, which constrains the trajectory estimation space and yields a tighter surrogate objective for preference optimization. In addition, we introduce a dynamic regularization strategy that adapts the DPO regularization based on (i) the reward gap between winner and loser and (ii) training progress, improving stability and sample efficiency. Experiments on state-of-the-art RF T2I backbones show that PNAPO consistently improves preference metrics while substantially reducing training compute.

</details>


### [154] [SWIFT: Prompt-Adaptive Memory for Efficient Interactive Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09442)
*Shanwen Tan,Hao Li,Jingtao Zhang,Xiaosong Jia,Xue Yang,Shaofeng Zhang,Yanyong Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SWIFT是一个无需训练的框架，通过语义注入缓存、逐头语义注入和自适应动态窗口机制，实现多提示词长视频生成中的高效语义切换，在保持生成质量的同时达到22.6 FPS（单张H100 GPU）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前长视频生成面临连续语义切换的挑战，现有方法（如缓存重建或固定内存预算）存在冗余计算且无法灵活适应语义变化，因为缓存的视频历史与提示词更新之间存在不匹配——内存保持视觉连续性，而提示词切换需要快速语义适应。

Method: 1) 语义注入缓存（Semantic Injection Cache）：在提示词边界处增强已有缓存而非从头重建；2) 逐头语义注入（Head-wise Semantic Injection）：根据每个注意力头与当前视频状态的对齐程度，按比例注入提示词更新；3) 自适应动态窗口（Adaptive Dynamic Window）：切换边界使用更大局部上下文，稳定段使用更小窗口以降低推理成本；4) 分段语义锚点（Segment-level Semantic Anchors）：维护提示词条件化的视频历史摘要，作为紧凑内存token引入。

Result: 与当前最先进方法相比，SWIFT在保持生成质量的同时，在单张H100 GPU上达到22.6 FPS，显著提高了多提示词长视频生成的效率。

Conclusion: SWIFT通过训练自由的框架有效解决了长视频生成中语义切换与视觉连贯性之间的矛盾，为多提示词长视频生成提供了一种高效且高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: Streaming long-video generation faces a central challenge in continuous semantic switching, requiring adaptive memory to preserve coherent visual evolution. Current approaches rely on cache rebuilding at prompt boundaries or fixed memory budgets, but they introduce redundant computation and limit flexible semantic adaptation. This limitation arises from a mismatch between cached video history and prompt updates, as memory preserves visual continuity while prompt switches demand rapid semantic adaptation. Motivated by this observation, we present SWIFT, Semantic Windowing and Injection for Flexible Transitions, a training-free framework for multi-prompt long-video generation that enables efficient semantic switching while preserving temporal coherence in causal video diffusion models. SWIFT introduces a lightweight Semantic Injection Cache that augments cached video memory rather than reconstructing it from scratch at every prompt boundary. To avoid uniformly perturbing all attention channels, we further perform head-wise semantic injection, so that each attention head receives a prompt update proportional to its alignment with the current video state. In addition, we introduce an Adaptive Dynamic Window that allocates temporal memory according to prompt phase, using larger local context near switching boundaries and smaller windows during stable segments to reduce average inference cost. To preserve long-range semantic consistency under compressed local attention, we further maintain segment-level semantic anchors that summarize prompt-conditioned video history and reintroduce it as compact memory tokens. Compared with current state-of-the-art methods, SWIFT preserves generation quality while achieving 22.6 FPS on a single H100 GPU, establishing a substantially more efficient solution for multi-prompt long-video generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ShanwenTan/SWIFT.

</details>


### [155] [Through the Lens of Character: Resolving Modality-Role Interference in Multimodal Role-Playing Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09443)
*Yihong Tang,Kehai Chen,Xuefeng Bai,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CAVI框架（无需训练），通过字符引导的视觉标记剪枝、正交特征调制和模态自适应角色引导三种策略，解决多模态大语言模型在角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题，显著提升角色一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLMs在角色扮演任务中提取的是客观、与角色无关的通用特征，而人类视觉具有主观性和身份驱动性，导致视觉噪声掩盖脆弱角色特征，产生模态-角色干扰（MRI），使智能体难以兼顾视觉感知与角色一致性。

Method: CAVI框架包含三个模块：1) 宏观上，字符引导的视觉标记剪枝（CTP）限制视觉感受野到角色相关实体；2) 微观上，正交特征调制（OFM）将标记投影到角色上下文子空间提取对齐事实；3) 解码时，模态自适应角色引导（MARS）根据视觉依赖动态优化引导强度。

Result: 大量实验表明CAVI有效缓解了模态-角色干扰，显著增强了角色一致的多模态交互能力。

Conclusion: CAVI作为一种无需训练的框架，通过系统性针对模态-角色干扰的三个层面，成功让智能体以角色视角感知世界，为多模态角色扮演提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The advancement of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has expanded Role-Playing Agents (RPAs) into visually grounded environments. However, human vision is inherently subjective and identity-driven, whereas existing MLLMs extract objective, character-agnostic features for general tasks. In RPAs, this generic visual noise overpowers fragile character traits, causing Modality-Role Interference (MRI), where agents struggle to integrate visual grounding and character consistency. To address this, we introduce the training-free Character-Aware Visual Intervention (CAVI) framework, enabling agents to perceive the world through the lens of character. CAVI systematically targets MRI: macroscopically, Character-Guided Token Pruning (CTP) restricts the visual receptive field to role-relevant entities; microscopically, Orthogonal Feature Modulation (OFM) projects tokens onto a character-context subspace to extract aligned facts; and during decoding, Modality-Adaptive Role Steering (MARS) dynamically optimizes steering intensity based on visual reliance. Extensive experiments show CAVI effectively alleviates MRI, significantly enhancing character-consistent multimodal interactions.

</details>


### [156] [SpaceMind++: Toward Allocentric Cognitive Maps for Spatially Grounded Video MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09449)
*Bo Gu,Zhikang Zhang,Zizhuang Wei,Zhenyuan Chen,Lingyun Li,Zhuoyi Song*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SpaceMind++，一个通过构建体素化认知地图来增强视频MLLM的3D空间推理能力的架构，在多个基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM缺乏持久的世界中心表示，无法在3D环境中进行空间一致的推理。

Method: 受哺乳动物双流系统启发，提出SpaceMind++：1）从RGB视频构建体素化认知地图（异中心表示）；2）提出Coordinate-Guided Deep Iterative Fusion机制，通过坐标嵌入和3D RoPE将地图空间知识融合回2D视觉特征。

Result: 在VSI-Bench上达到SOTA，并在SPBench、SITE-Bench、SPAR-Bench上展现出优异的分布外泛化能力。

Conclusion: 显式构建异中心认知地图并有效融合空间知识，能显著提升MLLM在3D环境中的空间推理鲁棒性和泛化性。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made remarkable progress in visual understanding and language-based reasoning, yet they lack a persistent world-centered representation for spatially consistent reasoning in 3D environments. Inspired by the mammalian dual-stream system, where semantic and spatial cues are processed separately and integrated into an allocentric cognitive map, we propose SpaceMind++, a video MLLM architecture that explicitly builds a voxelized cognitive map from RGB videos. This map reorganizes fragmented egocentric observations into a shared 3D metric representation, enabling the model to preserve object permanence and spatial topology across changing viewpoints. To make this allocentric representation usable by a pretrained video MLLM without disrupting its native visual-token interface, we introduce Coordinate-Guided Deep Iterative Fusion, a new mechanism that relays map-level spatial knowledge back into the original 2D visual features. This fusion is explicitly guided by coordinate embeddings and 3D Rotary Positional Encoding, which ground semantic interactions in metric 3D space, resembling the entorhinal binding of sensory features to metric space. Extensive experiments show that SpaceMind++ achieves new state-of-the-art performance on VSI-Bench. Furthermore, it demonstrates superior out-of-distribution generalization on SPBench, SITE-Bench, and SPAR-Bench, underscoring its robustness in unseen 3D environments.

</details>


### [157] [Adaptive 3D Convolution for Remote Sensing Image Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09455)
*Siran Peng,Xiangyu Zhu,Shang-Qi Deng,Liang-Jian Deng,Zhen Lei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Ada3D的自适应3D卷积方法，用于遥感图像融合，该方法通过为每个体素生成独特的3D卷积核来减少光谱失真，并在五个数据集上取得了SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DL方法将图像融合视为2D问题会导致光谱失真；而标准3D卷积核在所有区域共享同一套核，对融合任务不优且计算量大。

Method: 提出Ada3D：先分别从空间和光谱源图像生成空间核与光谱核，再组合成内容感知的3D核，为每个体素赋予独特卷积核；同时引入自适应偏置和分组卷积降低计算复杂度。

Result: 在五个数据集上均达到SOTA性能，验证了Ada3D的优越性。

Conclusion: Ada3D通过全自适应机制有效解决了光谱失真和计算效率问题，为遥感图像融合提供了一种高效且高性能的新范式。

Abstract: Remote sensing image fusion aims to create a high-resolution multi/hyper-spectral image from a high-resolution image with limited spectral information and a low-resolution image with abundant spectral data. Recently, deep learning (DL) techniques have shown significant effectiveness in this area. Most DL-based methods approach image fusion as a 2D problem by encoding spectral information into feature map channels. However, our research suggests that this strategy introduces notable spectral distortions. In contrast, some methods consider spectral data as an additional dimension, utilizing standard 3D convolutions to preserve spectral information. Nevertheless, in a standard 3D convolutional layer, the same set of kernels is applied across all input regions, which we have found to be sub-optimal for image fusion. Furthermore, standard 3D convolutions necessitate substantial computational resources. To address these challenges, we propose a novel convolutional paradigm called Adaptive 3D Convolution (Ada3D) for remote sensing image fusion. Ada3D applies a unique set of 3D kernels to each input voxel, enabling the capture of fine-grained details. These adaptive kernels are generated through a two-step process: (i) spatial and spectral kernels are derived from their respective image sources; (ii) these two types of kernels are then combined to form content-aware 3D kernels that effectively integrate spatial and spectral information. Additionally, adaptive biases are introduced to enhance the convolutional outcome at the voxel level. Furthermore, we incorporate the group convolution technique to reduce computational complexity. As a result, Ada3D offers full adaptivity in an efficient manner. Evaluation results across five datasets demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance, underscoring the superiority of Ada3D. The code is available at https://github.com/PSRben/Ada3D.

</details>


### [158] [When Few Steps Are Enough: Training-Free Acceleration of Identity-Preserved Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09460)
*Dongqi Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需重新训练即可将身份保持生成模型从标准扩散骨干迁移到蒸馏骨干的策略，在降低5.9倍延迟的同时提升身份相似度，并分析了早期去噪步骤已足以保持身份特征的现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 身份保持的图像生成依赖多步扩散模型，部署时计算成本高昂，本文旨在降低这一成本而不牺牲身份保真度。

Method: 将已训练好的InfuseNet身份适配器从标准（dev）骨干直接迁移到蒸馏（schnell）骨干，仅需更改骨干路径并禁用无分类器引导，无需重新训练。

Result: 相比28步dev基线，延迟降低5.9倍，ArcFace身份相似度提升+0.028，LPIPS降低-0.016。身份保真度在4-8步内即可达到有效区域。

Conclusion: 蒸馏骨干替换是一种简单、无需训练的改进策略，能在提升效率的同时保持甚至改善身份保真度，且该现象在风格和物体适配器上也有初步验证。

Abstract: Identity-preserved image generation is typically built on many-step diffusion backbones, making personalized generation expensive at deployment time. We show that this cost is often unnecessary for identity-conditioned FLUX generation. A frozen InfuseNet identity adapter trained with dev transfers directly to the distilled schnell backbone without retraining. This two-line replacement -- changing the backbone path and disabling classifier-free guidance -- reduces latency by 5.9x while improving ArcFace identity similarity by +0.028 and lpips by -0.016 over the standard 28-step dev baseline. To explain why this works, we analyze the denoising trajectory and find that identity fidelity enters an early effective regime, often within 4-8 steps, while later steps primarily refine visual detail, sharpness, and contrast. Adapter ablations confirm that identity formation depends on the identity adapter, while attention-stream norm probes suggest that the relative conditioning contribution decreases as sampling proceeds. Preliminary style-adapter and object-adapter sweeps on SDXL and SD1.5 show similar diminishing returns after intermediate steps. These results position distilled backbone replacement as a simple, training-free strategy for improving the efficiency-fidelity tradeoff of identity-preserved generation.

</details>


### [159] [Outlier-Robust Diffusion Solvers for Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09477)
*Yang Zheng,Jiahua Liu,Tongyao Pang,Wen Li,Zhaoqiang Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的鲁棒逆问题求解方法，通过显式噪声估计和Huber损失的迭代重加权最小二乘优化，并结合共轭梯度法提升效率，在多种图像任务中展现出对异常值的鲁棒性，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的逆问题求解方法在处理真实测量中常见的异常值（outliers）时表现不佳，亟需一种鲁棒的解决方案。

Method: 1) 通过显式噪声估计对测量值进行预处理以减轻噪声影响；2) 基于Huber损失构建迭代重加权最小二乘目标函数来处理异常值；3) 使用梯度下降法近似求解鲁棒优化问题；4) 为避免梯度下降法学习率调参问题，采用共轭梯度法并设计高效更新策略。

Result: 在多个图像数据集上，针对线性和非线性任务，在多种条件下进行实验，所提方法对异常值具有鲁棒性，且在大多数情况下优于最新的基于扩散模型的方法。

Conclusion: 本文提出的鲁棒扩散模型方法有效解决了逆问题中的异常值挑战，为实际应用中的噪声和异常值处理提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Methods based on diffusion models (DMs) for solving inverse problems (IPs) have recently achieved remarkable performance. However, DM-based methods typically struggle against outliers, which are common in real-world measurements. In this work, to tackle IPs with outliers, we first refine the measurement via explicit noise estimation to mitigate the effect of noise. Subsequently, we formulate an iteratively reweighted least squares objective based on the Huber loss to address the outliers. We propose a method utilizing gradient descent to approximately solve the corresponding optimization problem for the robust objective. To avoid delicate tuning of the learning rate required by the gradient descent method, we further employ the conjugate gradient method with an efficient strategy for updating. Extensive experiments on multiple image datasets for linear and nonlinear tasks under various conditions demonstrate that our proposed methods exhibit robustness to outliers and outperform recent DM-based methods in most cases.

</details>


### [160] [PermuQuant: Lowering Per-Group Quantization Error by Reordering Channels for Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09503)
*Yongsen Cheng,Kai Liu,Kaiwen Tao,Junxian Li,Zhixin Wang,Zhikai Chen,Renjing Pei,Yulun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PermuQuant提出了一种基于通道排序的后训练量化框架，通过将统计特性相似的通道分到同一组来减少量化误差，在低比特扩散模型上实现了显著的速度提升和内存压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练量化方法在极低比特设置下仍存在严重质量退化，作者发现分组量化中通道排列顺序被忽视——当统计特性差异大的通道被分在同一组时，量化尺度会被异常值主导，导致大的量化误差。

Method: 提出PermuQuant框架：1）基于联合二阶矩准则对通道排序，将激活和权重统计相似的通道分到同一组；2）采用基于校准数据的接受规则，仅在所选排列能降低量化误差时应用重排；3）将重排吸收到相邻模块或离线应用到权重上，避免运行时显式排列操作。

Result: 在多个大型扩散模型上一致降低量化误差并超越现有基线。在FLUX.1-dev上搭配RTX 5090，W4A4 NVFP4量化下实现1.8倍单步加速，DiT内存占用减少3.5倍。

Conclusion: 通道排序是分组量化中重要但被忽视的因素，PermuQuant通过简单有效的通道重排显著提升了低比特扩散模型的量化质量与部署效率。

Abstract: Large-scale visual generative models have achieved remarkable performance. However, their high computational and memory costs make deployment challenging in resource-constrained scenarios, such as interactive applications and personal single-GPU usage. Post-training quantization (PTQ) offers a practical solution by compressing pretrained models without expensive retraining. However, existing PTQ methods still suffer from severe quality degradation under extremely low-bit settings. In this paper, we identify channel ordering as an important but underexplored factor in per-group quantization. In this setting, each contiguous group shares one quantization scale. When channels with very different statistics are placed in the same group, the scale can be dominated by outliers and cause large quantization errors. Based on this observation, we propose PermuQuant, a simple and effective PTQ framework for low-bit diffusion models. PermuQuant sorts channels by a joint second-moment criterion before per-group quantization, placing channels with similar activation and weight statistics into the same group. It further uses a calibration-based acceptance rule to apply reordering only when the selected permutation reduces quantization error on calibration data. The selected permutations are absorbed into adjacent modules or applied to weights offline, avoiding explicit runtime permutation operations. Extensive experiments on multiple large diffusion models show that PermuQuant consistently reduces quantization error and outperforms existing PTQ baselines. On FLUX.1-dev with an RTX 5090, PermuQuant achieves up to a 1.8$\times$ single step speedup and reduces the DiT memory footprint by 3.5$\times$ under W4A4 NVFP4 quantization. Code will be available at https://github.com/yscheng04/PermuQuant.

</details>


### [161] [Uncertainty-Aware and Decoder-Aligned Learning for Video Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09507)
*Omer Tariq,Syed Muhammad Raza,Jeongbae Son*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出VASTSum，一个不确定性感知且与解码对齐的视频摘要学习框架，通过变分公式预测概率性帧级重要性分数，并引入解码器对齐的正则化来增强背包选择的稳定性，在SumMe和TVSum上取得一致且稳健的相关性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频摘要方法要么学习确定性重要性分数而忽略了标注的主观性和不确定性，要么采用复杂生成模型增加训练和推理成本。本文旨在解决这两个问题——多标注者带来的不确定性以及离散解码过程（如背包选择）与学习目标的不对齐。

Method: 1) 变分公式预测概率性帧级重要性分数，显式建模多标注者监督带来的不确定性；2) 针对二值标注的主观性，采用与合理的人类标注模式对齐而非强制单一共识目标的监督策略；3) 引入解码器对齐的正则化，增强背包选择对预测分数微小扰动的稳定性。

Result: 在SumMe和TVSum基准上使用Kendall和Spearman相关系数进行评估，在多个数据划分上取得一致且具有竞争力的结果，证明了对标注分歧的鲁棒性，同时保持高效的单前向推理。

Conclusion: 显式建模不确定性并将学习目标与解码阶段对齐，为确定性方法和扩散方法提供了一种有原则的替代方案，在鲁棒性和效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Video summarization aims to produce a compact representation of a long video by selecting a subset of temporally important segments that best reflect human preferences. This task is inherently difficult due to strong annotation subjectivity and the reliance on discrete decoding procedures, such as temporal segmentation and knapsack-based selection, during evaluation. Most existing approaches either learn deterministic importance scores that overlook these characteristics or adopt complex generative models that increase training and inference cost. In this paper, we propose VASTSum, an uncertainty-aware and decoder-aligned learning framework for video summarization that addresses both challenges within a single-pass model. The proposed method predicts probabilistic frame-level importance scores using a variational formulation, enabling explicit modeling of uncertainty arising from multi-annotator supervision. To account for subjectivity, particularly under binary annotations, we employ a supervision strategy that encourages alignment with plausible human annotation modes rather than enforcing a single consensus target. Furthermore, we introduce a decoder-aligned regularization that promotes stability of knapsack-based summary selection, reducing sensitivity to small perturbations in predicted scores. We evaluate the proposed framework on the SumMe and TVSum benchmarks using standard rank-based metrics. Experimental results show consistent and competitive Kendall and Spearman correlations across multiple data splits, demonstrating improved robustness under annotation disagreement while maintaining efficient single-forward inference. These results indicate that explicitly modeling uncertainty and aligning learning objectives with the decoding stage provide a principled alternative to both deterministic and diffusion-based video summarization methods.

</details>


### [162] [QueST: Persistent Queries as Semantic Monitors for Drift Suppression in Long-Horizon Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09513)
*Mayank Anand,Mohammad Saqlain,Kyan Mahajan,Priya Shukla,Gora Chand Nandi,Andrew Melnik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: QueST 提出了一种基于监控视角的长时跟踪框架，将交互相关实体视为持久语义查询，通过全局注意力机制和轻量级3D物理约束，显著减少了长时跟踪中的语义漂移问题，在SAPIEN数据集上相比TAP-Net实现了67.7%的绝对点误差改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于帧间局部匹配的跟踪方法在长时程、遮挡、视角变化下会累积错误并产生语义漂移，现有方法无法检测或纠正这种漂移。

Method: 提出QueST框架：1) 将跟踪点视为持久语义查询而非瞬态点轨迹；2) 每个查询在每个时间步全局关注时空视频特征；3) 结合轻量级3D物理约束，利用几何合理性抑制遮挡下的无界漂移。

Result: 在PartNet-Mobility/SAPIEN长时程 articulated 序列上，相比RAFT-3D、CoTracker、TAP-Net，QueST在绝对点误差上比TAP-Net提升67.7%，并在长时程上更好地保持身份一致性。

Conclusion: 将语义监控直接嵌入感知过程，可以在分布偏移下实现更可靠的长时程跟踪。

Abstract: Tracking points in videos is typically formulated as frame-to-frame correspondence, where each point is matched locally to the next frame. While this works over short horizons, errors accumulate under articulation, occlusion, and viewpoint change, leading to silent semantic drift that existing trackers cannot detect or correct. In this work, we revisit long-horizon tracking from a monitoring perspective and introduce QueST, a monitoring-by-design framework that treats interaction-relevant entities as persistent semantic queries rather than transient point tracks. Instead of local propagation, each query attends globally over spatio-temporal video features at every time-step, providing a stable semantic anchor across time. We further constrain query trajectories with lightweight 3D physical grounding, using geometric plausibility to suppress unbounded drift under occlusion. We evaluate QueST on long-horizon articulated sequences from PartNet-Mobility in SAPIEN and compare against RAFT-3D, CoTracker, and TAP-Net. QueST substantially reduces terminal drift achieving a 67.7% Absolute Point Error (APE) improvement over TAP-Net while better preserving identity over extended horizons. Our results show that embedding semantic monitoring directly into perception enables more reliable long-horizon tracking under distribution shift.

</details>


### [163] [PhysHanDI: Physics-Based Reconstruction of Hand-Deformable Object Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09538)
*Jihyun Lee,Changmin Lee,Donghwan Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PhysHanDI是一个通过物理模拟实现手部与非刚性物体（如布料、毛绒玩具）完整3D重建的框架，该方法通过密集3D手部运动驱动的力来模拟物体变形，并利用逆物理优化手部重建，在实验中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么只处理刚性或部分刚性物体（无法建模布料等高度非刚性物体），要么虽然能处理可变形物体但缺乏完整3D手部重建，存在明显的技术空白。

Method: 通过物理仿真模拟由密集重建的3D手部运动产生的力驱动的物体变形，确保物体动态在物理上合理且与手部运动一致；同时利用逆物理机制，用物体变形仿真反过来优化手部重建。

Result: 在重建和未来预测任务中均优于现有最先进基线方法。

Conclusion: 物理仿真与逆物理的结合能有效解决手-非刚性物体交互的完整3D重建问题，双向优化手部与物体重建质量。

Abstract: While existing methods for reconstructing hand-object interactions have made impressive progress, they either focus on rigid or part-wise rigid objects-limiting their ability to model real-world objects (e.g., cloth, stuffed animals) that exhibit highly non-rigid deformations-or model deformable objects without full 3D hand reconstruction. To bridge this gap, we present PhysHanDI (Physics-based Reconstruction of Hand and Deformable Object Interactions), a framework that enables full 3D reconstruction of both interacting hands and non-rigid objects. Our key idea is to physically simulate object deformations driven by forces induced from densely reconstructed 3D hand motions, ensuring that the reconstructed object dynamics are both physically plausible and coherent with the interacting hand movements. Furthermore, we demonstrate that such simulation of object deformations can, in turn, refine and improve hand reconstruction via inverse physics. In experiments, PhysHanDI outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline across reconstruction and future prediction.

</details>


### [164] [Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressive Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09566)
*Tianyi Lu,Wenxue Cui,Shaohui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种双路径超先验引导的深度展开网络(DPH-DUN)，通过将测量值分为两个子集并利用超先验知识协同引导，结合自适应步长生成和注意力机制，解决现有深度展开网络在压缩感知中信息交互不足和纹理区域重建困难的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度展开网络(DUNs)在压缩感知中面临两个局限：1)依赖单一测量流，限制了不同测量子集间的有效信息交互；2)对所有图像区域进行统一处理，忽略了不同纹理区域重建难度的差异性。

Method: 提出DPH-DUN，包含两个分支：1)深度超先验学习分支，设计轻量级模块从不同域生成超先验知识；2)超先验引导重建分支，在梯度下降步中设计超先验引导的步长生成网络以动态生成空间自适应步长图，在近端映射步中引入梯度驱动的硬注意力和软注意力机制动态聚焦困难区域。

Result: 大量实验表明所提出的DPH-DUN优于现有压缩感知方法。

Conclusion: 将测量值划分为双路径并引入超先验知识进行协同引导，同时设计细粒度的自适应步长和注意力机制，可有效提升压缩感知重建质量。

Abstract: Recent Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) have significantly advanced Compressive Sensing (CS) by integrating iterative optimization with deep networks. However, existing DUNs still suffer from two challenges: 1) Reliance on a single measurement stream, which limits effective information interaction across distinct measurement subsets. 2) Uniform processing of all image regions, which overlooks varying reconstruction difficulties induced by diverse textures. To address these limitations, a novel Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network (DPH-DUN) is proposed, which partitions measurements into double subsets to enable hyperprior-guided reconstruction via a dual-path architecture. In the Deep Hyperprior Learning branch, a series of lightweight neural modules are designed to efficiently generate hyperprior knowledge of different domains, enabling collaborative guidance for the CS reconstruction. In the Hyperprior Informed Reconstruction branch, a deep unfolding framework with hyperprior guidance is constructed to iteratively refine reconstruction. Specifically, i) in the gradient descent step, a Hyperprior Informed Step Size Generation network is designed to dynamically generate spatially varying step maps, enabling adaptive fine-grained gradient updates. ii) In the proximal mapping step, two well-designed hyperprior informed attention mechanisms are introduced to dynamically focus on challenging regions via gradient-based hard and soft attentions, facilitating CS reconstruction accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DPH-DUN outperforms existing CS methods.

</details>


### [165] [KAN Text to Vision? The Exploration of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Multi-Scale Sequence-Based Pose Animation from Sign Language Notation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09572)
*Guanyi Du,Lintao Wang,Kun Hu,Ziyang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出KANMultiSign，一种从HamNoSys符号生成2D人体姿态的多尺度序列生成框架。核心贡献包括：(1) 粗到细的生成策略与多尺度监督，先构建身体-手-脸骨架保证全局结构，再细化手指细节；(2) 将KAN模块集成到Transformer中，用可学习的单变量函数基元建模符号到运动学的高维非线性映射。在多种手语语料上，该方法在降低DTW关节误差的同时大幅减少参数量。消融实验表明多尺度监督是性能提升的关键，KAN提供了紧凑高效的替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从符号化符号（HamNoSys）自动生成手语动画，是可扩展手语动画的重要途径。现有方法在建模离散符号到连续人体运动之间的高度非线性映射时存在挑战，且参数量大、手指细节生成精度不足。

Method: (1) 粗到细生成策略：先预测中间身体-手-脸骨架（全局结构），再细化手指关节（精细细节），配合多尺度监督；(2) 将KAN模块集成到Transformer骨干中，用可学习的单变量函数基元替代传统MLP，以紧凑参数量建模非线性映射。

Result: 在波兰、德国、希腊、法语四种手语语料上，相比强基线，DTW关节误差一致降低，且参数量大幅减少。消融实验显示多尺度监督是精度提升的主要因素，KAN在结合多尺度监督时能保持竞争力并显著降低参数量。

Conclusion: 多尺度监督是从符号生成姿态的关键机制，KAN模块提供了一种紧凑高效的建模替代方案。代码将开源。

Abstract: Sign language production from symbolic notation offers a scalable route to accessible sign animation. We present KANMultiSign, a multi-scale sequence generator that translates HamNoSys notation into two-dimensional human pose sequences. Our framework makes two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a coarse-to-fine generation strategy with multi-scale supervision: the model is first guided by an intermediate body--hand--face scaffold to encourage global structural coherence, and then refines fine-grained hand articulation to improve finger-level detail. Second, we investigate integrating Kolmogorov--Arnold Network modules into a Transformer backbone, using learnable univariate function primitives to model the highly non-linear mapping from discrete phonological symbols to continuous body kinematics with a compact parameterization. Experiments on multiple public corpora spanning Polish, German, Greek, and French sign languages show consistent reductions in dynamic time warping based joint error compared with a strong notation-to-pose baseline, while using substantially fewer parameters. Controlled ablations further indicate that KAN-based variants substantially reduce parameter count while maintaining competitive performance when coupled with multi-scale supervision, rather than serving as the main driver of accuracy gains. These findings position multi-scale supervision as the key mechanism for improving notation-conditioned pose generation, with KAN offering a compact alternative for efficient modeling. Our code will be publicly available.

</details>


### [166] [FPGA-Based Hardware Architecture for Contrast Maximization in Event-Based Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09581)
*Michal Filipkowski,Marcin Kowalczyk,Tomasz Kryjak*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个基于FPGA的对比最大化算法硬件架构，通过深度流水线设计实现事件驱动视觉系统中的运动参数估计，相比CPU/GPU实现速度提升超200倍，适用于实时嵌入式系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 事件视觉传感器具有高时间分辨率、低空间冗余的特点，但其CM算法计算密集，现有CPU/GPU实现难以满足实时嵌入式应用的高吞吐、低功耗需求，亟需专用硬件加速方案。

Method: 利用FPGA的确定性并行结构和深度流水线特性，设计了事件扭曲、对比度计算和迭代优化三个硬件模块，并采用了硬件感知的优化方法进行设计。

Result: 相比CPU和GPU实现，运动参数估计执行速度提升超过200倍，在实时嵌入式系统中验证了高能效和硬件资源利用率的有效性。

Conclusion: 该FPGA架构为高速、低功耗嵌入式系统中的实时运动估计奠定了坚实基础，是首个实现CM算法硬件加速的方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a hardware architecture that implements the Contrast Maximization (CM) algorithm in Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) resources for event-based vision systems. CM estimates motion parameters by maximizing the contrast of an Image of Warped Events (IWE) reconstructed from asynchronous event streams. Event-based vision sensors generate sparse data with high temporal resolution and low spatial redundancy, which makes them well suited for hardware processing. The deterministic, massively parallel structure of the FPGA is leveraged to design a deeply pipelined architecture capable of high-throughput, energy-efficient processing suitable for real-time embedded applications. This paper details the hardware modules responsible for event warping, contrast computation, and iterative optimization, discusses key implementation decisions, and presents the hardware-aware optimization method used in the design. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial speed and efficiency improvement over CPU- and GPU-based implementations, with motion parameter estimation executing over 200 times faster. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware architecture enabling acceleration of CM algorithm computations. Its performance is evaluated in terms of processing speed, energy efficiency, and hardware resource utilization. The proposed design is validated using an event-based object tracking application. The results confirm that the architecture provides a solid foundation for real-time motion estimation in high-speed, low-power embedded systems.

</details>


### [167] [DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09586)
*Can Li,Zhoujian Li,Ren Li,Jie Gu,Lei Lei,Jingmin Chen,Lei Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DeformMaster 提出了一种从真实视频中学习可变形物体（线性、平面、体积）的交互式物理-神经世界模型，统一了动力学与外观，在物理展开、交互建模、材料响应和4D渲染上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可变形物体的世界模型不仅需要恢复几何和外观，还需捕捉物理动力学、交互机制和材料行为。从真实视频中学习此类模型极具挑战，因变形物体维数高、交互嘈杂、材料响应复杂。

Method: 提出DeformMaster框架：（1）结构化物理展开加神经残差补偿非建模效应；（2）将稀疏手部运动建模为分布式柔性致动器实现手-连续体交互；（3）使用空间变化的本构专家表示材料响应；（4）从预测的物理演化驱动高保真4D外观渲染。

Result: 在真实世界可变形物体序列上的实验表明，DeformMaster在动力学展开和动态外观渲染上优于最先进的基线方法，并支持新动作展开、材料参数变化和动态新视角合成。

Conclusion: DeformMaster成功将真实交互视频转化为可交互的在线物理-神经世界模型，统一了动力学与外观，为可变形物体的交互建模提供了有效方案。

Abstract: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics--neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand--continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis.

</details>


### [168] [From Pixels to Concepts: Do Segmentation Models Understand What They Segment?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09591)
*Shuang Liang,Zeqing Wang,Yuxian Li,Xihui Liu,Han Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CAFE基准，通过反事实属性操作（修改目标区域的表面外观、上下文或材料组成）来评估可提示分割模型是否真正理解概念，而非依赖视觉显著性捷径。实验发现模型即使对误导性提示也能生成准确掩码，揭示了定位质量与语义忠实度之间的系统性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要评估掩码精度或物体存在性，无法判断模型是忠实于查询概念，还是依赖视觉上显著但语义上误导的线索。需要一种能区分"概念忠实分割"与"捷径驱动掩码检索"的评估方法。

Method: 构建包含2,146个配对测试样本的CAFE基准，每个样本包含目标图像、真实掩码、正向提示和误导性负向提示。样本覆盖三类反事实：表面模仿（SM）、上下文冲突（CC）和本体冲突（OC），在保持目标区域和掩码不变的前提下修改属性。

Result: 实验发现模型在定位质量与概念判别之间存在系统性差距：即使对误导性提示，模型也能生成准确掩码，表明强掩码预测能力并不等价于忠实的语义理解。

Conclusion: CAFE为诊断可提示分割模型是否执行概念忠实分割而非捷径驱动掩码检索提供了受控基准，揭示了当前模型在语义理解方面的根本性缺陷。

Abstract: Segmentation is a fundamental vision task underlying numerous downstream applications. Recent promptable segmentation models, such as Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), extend segmentation from category-agnostic mask prediction to concept-guided localization conditioned on high-level textual prompts. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate mask accuracy or object presence, leaving unclear whether these models faithfully ground the queried concept or instead rely on visually salient but semantically misleading cues. We introduce CAFE: \textbf{C}ounterfactual \textbf{A}ttribute \textbf{F}actuality \textbf{E}valuation, a novel benchmark for evaluating concept-faithful segmentation in promptable segmentation models. Our \textbf{CAFE} is built on attribute-level counterfactual manipulation: the target region and ground-truth mask are preserved, while attributes such as surface appearance, context, or material composition are modified to introduce misleading semantic cues. The benchmark contains 2,146 paired test samples, each consisting of a target image, a ground-truth mask, a positive prompt, and a misleading negative prompt. These samples cover three counterfactual categories: Superficial Mimicry (\textbf{SM}), Context Conflict (\textbf{CC}), and Ontological Conflict (\textbf{OC}). We evaluate various model types and sizes on our CAFE. Experiments reveal a systematic gap between localization quality and concept discrimination: models often generate accurate masks even for misleading prompts, suggesting that strong mask prediction does not necessarily imply faithful semantic grounding. Our CAFE provides a controlled benchmark for diagnosing whether promptable segmentation models perform concept-faithful grounding rather than shortcut-driven mask retrieval.

</details>


### [169] [SoccerLens: Grounded Soccer Video Understanding Beyond Accuracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09598)
*Ismael Elsharkawi,Ahmed Sait,Silvio Giancola,Bernard Ghanem,Hossam Sharara,Abdelrahman Eldesokey*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SoccerLens是一个用于评估足球视频理解中视觉基础能力(而非仅分类准确率)的基准。现有VLM在足球视频上分类准确率高，但视觉基础(grounding)性能低于50%，暴露了预测性能与真实视觉理解之间的巨大差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估仅关注分类准确率，无法判断VLM是依赖有意义的视觉证据还是利用了虚假关联和捷径学习。需要一种能评估视觉基础能力的评测方法。

Method: 1) 构建SoccerLens基准，包含13种常见足球事件的标注视频片段，提供三级语义相关性的结构化视觉线索；2) 扩展Chefer的归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力；3) 提出衡量模型注意力是否对齐标注线索的新指标。

Result: 当前最先进的足球VLM虽然分类准确率高，但在最宽松的线索定义下视觉基础性能也不超过50%，且一致性地未能充分利用时间信息。

Conclusion: 分类准确率与真实视觉基础之间存在显著差距，在复杂的时空领域(如足球视频)中需要基于视觉基础的评估方法。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently shown strong potential in soccer video understanding. However, given the high complexity of soccer videos due to large viewpoint variations, rapid shot transitions, and cluttered scenes, it remains unclear on whether VLMs rely on meaningful visual evidence or exploit spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Existing evaluation protocols focus primarily on classification accuracy and do not assess visual grounding. To address this limitation, we introduce SoccerLens, a benchmark for grounded soccer video understanding. The benchmark contains annotated video segments spanning $13$ common soccer events, with structured visual cues organized into three levels of semantic relevance. We further extend the attribution method of Chefer [arXiv:2103.15679] to jointly model spatial and temporal attention, and introduce evaluation metrics that measure whether model attention aligns with annotated cues or drifts toward spurious regions. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art soccer VLMs shows that, despite strong classification accuracy, current models fail to exceed $50\%$ grounding performance even under the loosest cue definitions and consistently underutilize temporal information. These results reveal a substantial gap between predictive performance and true visual grounding, highlighting the need for grounded evaluation in complex spatio-temporal domains such as soccer.

</details>


### [170] [DAP: Doppler-aware Point Network for Heterogeneous mmWave Action Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09604)
*Jiaying Lin,Shiman Wu,Jinfu Liu,Can Wang,Mengyuan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出首个异构多源毫米波雷达点云人体动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR和针对异构雷达的Doppler感知点云网络DAP-Net，显著提升跨源泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有毫米波点云数据集规模有限且多来自同构单源设置，无法处理真实世界中因异构雷达源（不同设备、频段）导致的数据分布偏移问题。

Method: 构建UniMM-HAR数据集，包含三种标准雷达配置；提出DAP-Net，包含双空间多普勒重参数化（D2R）模块进行几何密化和特征重校准，以及文本对齐模块（TAM）提供稳定语义锚点，实现跨模态对齐和源不变动作语义学习。

Result: 在异构雷达设置下，DAP-Net显著优于现有方法，达到最先进精度和强跨源鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过大规模异构数据集和感知多普勒信息的网络设计，有效解决了毫米波雷达人体动作识别中的跨源泛化挑战。

Abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar provides privacy-preserving sensing and is valuable for human action recognition (HAR). Existing mmWave point cloud datasets are limited in scale and mostly collected under homogeneous single-source settings, preventing current methods from handling real-world distribution shifts caused by heterogeneous radar sources, such as different devices and frequency bands. To address this, we introduce UniMM-HAR, the largest and first mmWave point cloud HAR dataset for heterogeneous multi-source scenarios, standardizing three distinct radar configurations to realistically evaluate cross-source generalization. We further propose the Doppler-aware Point Cloud Network (DAP-Net) to tackle heterogeneity challenges. DAP-Net enhances intra-modal representations and performs cross-modal alignment to learn source-invariant action semantics. Leveraging action-consistent spatio-temporal Doppler patterns as anchors, the Dual-space Doppler Reparameterization (D2R) module performs sample-adaptive geometric densification and Doppler-guided feature recalibration, while the Text Alignment Module (TAM) provides stable semantic anchors via a pretrained textual space. Experiments show that DAP-Net significantly outperforms existing methods under heterogeneous radar settings, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and strong cross-source robustness.

</details>


### [171] [Reflection Anchors for Propagation-Aware Visual Retention in Long-Chain Multimodal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09614)
*Xuan Gong,Hanbo Huang,Hao Zheng,Yiran Zhang,Wenbin Dai,Weishu Zhao,Shiyu Liang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对长链多模态推理中视觉信息衰减问题，本文从信息论角度推导出一阶干预的视觉增益下界，提出基于GRPO的反射锚点策略优化方法（RAPO），通过选择高熵锚点并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL目标来增强视觉依赖，实验表明在多个LVLM骨干上显著优于强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长链思维推理中视觉信息逐渐衰减，限制了多模态模型的长程推理能力。现有方法依赖启发式感知而非原理性增益分析来确定干预位置，且局部视觉影响如何传播尚不明确。

Method: 从信息论角度推导一阶干预的视觉增益下界，涉及两个因素：局部分支空间（词符熵）和下游视觉传播潜力（与视觉边缘化参考的后续序列散度）。基于此分析，提出RAPO方法：基于GRPO的策略优化，选择高熵反射锚点，并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL代理目标。

Result: 在推理密集型及通用基准测试中，RAPO在多个LVLM骨干网络上显著超越强基线。机制分析表明反射锚点富集于视觉敏感决策点，且RAPO沿生成轨迹增强了对比性视觉依赖信号。

Conclusion: 本文提供了多模态推理中视觉信息保持的理论分析框架和有效方法，为长程多模态推理中的视觉-语言对齐提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large vision--language models, but visual information often fades during generation, limiting long-horizon multimodal reasoning. Existing methods either re-inject vision at inference or train policies for stronger grounding, but where to intervene relies on perception heuristics rather than principled gain analysis, and how local visual influence propagates remains implicit. We study this problem from an information-theoretic standpoint and derive a lower bound on the downstream visual gain of a one-step intervention, which suggests two factors: local branching room (token entropy) and downstream visual propagation potential (suffix divergence from a vision-marginalized reference). Guided by this analysis, we propose reflection-anchor policy optimization (RAPO), a GRPO-based policy optimization method that selects high-entropy reflection anchors and optimizes a chain-masked finite-window KL surrogate for downstream visual dependence. Experiments on reasoning-intensive and general-domain benchmarks show that RAPO delivers substantial gains over strong baselines across multiple LVLM backbones. Mechanism analyses further indicate that reflection anchors are enriched for visually sensitive decision points and that RAPO increases contrastive visual-dependence signals along generated trajectories.

</details>


### [172] [GSMap: 2D Gaussians for Online HD Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09619)
*Zhenxuan Zeng,Sheng Yang,Lingxuan Wang,Yanan He,Mingxia Chen,Wei Suo,Peng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GSMap通过可学习的2D高斯表示统一了矢量化和栅格化两种HD地图构建范式，每个地图元素被建模为有序2D高斯序列，通过可微分栅格化施加像素级几何约束，同时保持拓扑感知的矢量化结构，在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HD地图构建方法面临根本性权衡：基于矢量化方法能保持拓扑结构但几何保真度不足，基于栅格化方法能实现精确几何监督但输出非结构化，作者希望弥合这两种范式之间的差距。

Method: 提出GSMap框架，将每个地图元素建模为有序2D高斯序列（高斯中心对应矢量化折线/多边形的顶点），通过可微分栅格化施加像素级几何约束+拓扑感知的矢量化保持结构规则性，实现联合优化。

Result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上，高斯表示有效统一了几何学习和拓扑学习，实现了显著的性能提升，并展现出与现有HD地图架构的强兼容性。

Conclusion: GSMap通过2D高斯表示成功融合矢量化与栅格化范式的优势，为HD地图构建提供了一种统一且高效的解决方案，且易于集成到现有框架中。

Abstract: Accurate High-Definition (HD) map construction is critical for autonomous driving, yet existing methods face a fundamental trade-off: vectorization-based approaches preserve topology but struggle with geometric fidelity, while rasterization-based approaches enable precise geometric supervision but produce unstructured outputs. To bridge this gap, we propose GSMap, a novel framework that unifies both paradigms via a learnable 2D Gaussian representation. Each map element is modeled as an ordered sequence of 2D Gaussians, whose centers correspond to the vertices of the vectorized polyline/polygon. This formulation enables simultaneous optimization through: (1) Differentiable rasterization that enforces pixel-level geometric constraints, and (2) Topology-aware vectorization that maintains structural regularity. Experiments on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 demonstrate that our Gaussian-based representation effectively unifies geometric and topological learning, achieving significant performance improvements and demonstrating strong compatibility with existing HD mapping architectures. Code will be available at https://github.com/peakpang/GSMap

</details>


### [173] [Any2Any 3D Diffusion Models with Knowledge Transfer: A Radiotherapy Planning Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09622)
*Yuhan Wang,Zihan Li,Han Liu,Simon Arberet,Martin Kraus,Yuyin Zhou,Florin-Cristian Ghesu,Dorin Comaniciu,Ali Kamen,Riqiang Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DiffKT3D 是一个利用预训练视频扩散模型先验知识，结合 Any2Any 条件范式（支持多模态输入）和强化学习后训练机制（基于临床评分卡）的 3D 扩散框架，在放疗剂量预测任务上取得了 SOTA 性能（MAE 从 2.07 降至 1.93）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体素级剂量预测在放疗规划中至关重要，但针对特定场景从头训练的定制模型难以泛化到不同临床环境，亟需一种更通用、可迁移的解决方案。

Method: 1) 利用预训练视频扩散模型的先验知识；2) 提出 Any2Any 条件范式，通过模态特定嵌入实现灵活的多模态条件输入（CT、解剖结构、射束设置等），无需交叉注意力；3) 设计基于强化学习的后训练机制，以临床评分卡（Scorecard）引导模型对齐机构治疗偏好。

Result: 在 GDP-HMM 挑战赛中，DiffKT3D 将体素级 MAE 从 2.07 降至 1.93，达到 SOTA；同时实现了更优的图像质量和偏好匹配。

Conclusion: 通过模态感知的条件机制和临床对齐的强化学习后训练迁移扩散先验，能够为多种临床场景下的放疗规划提供鲁棒且可泛化的解决方案。

Abstract: Voxel-wise dose prediction is a critical yet challenging task in practical radiotherapy (RT) planning, as bespoke models trained from scratch often struggle to generalize across diverse clinical settings. Meanwhile, generative models trained on billion-scale datasets from vision domains have achieved impressive performance. Herein, we propose DiffKT3D, a unified Any2Any 3D diffusion framework that leverages prior knowledge from pretrained video diffusion models for efficient and clinically meaningful dose prediction. To enable flexible conditioning across multiple clinical modalities (CT, anatomical structures, body, beam settings, etc.), we introduce an Any2Any conditional paradigm utilizing modality-specific embeddings without cross-attention overhead. Further, we design a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training mechanism guided by a clinically-informed Scorecard explicitly tailored to institutional treatment preferences. Compared with winner of GDP-HMM challenge, DiffKT3D sets a new state-of-the-art in dose prediction by reducing voxel-level MAE from 2.07 to 1.93. In addition, DiffKT3D achieves superior image quality and preference match. These results demonstrate that transferring diffusion priors via modality-aware conditioning and clinically aligned RL post-training can provide a robust and generalizable solution for RT planning across various clinical scenarios.

</details>


### [174] [DegBins: Degradation-Driven Binning for Depth Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09628)
*Zhiqiang Yan,Zhengxue Wang,Jian Yang,Gim Hee Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DegBins框架，将深度超分辨率任务从回归问题重构为混合分类-回归问题，通过退化驱动的自适应分箱机制和多阶段细化策略，实现更精准的深度图重建，在五个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统DSR方法在低维特征空间中学习HR与LR之间的残差，这种加性公式难以准确捕捉两者之间复杂的非线性关系，尤其在空间变化的退化情况下表现不足。

Method: 1) 将DSR重构为混合分类-回归问题，残差深度表示为离散深度箱的线性组合；2) 在高维特征空间中建模HR-LR退化关系，实现自适应箱范围调整和概率优化；3) 采用多阶段粗到细的细化方案，每阶段进行更细粒度的分箱和概率更新。

Result: 在五个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，DegBins在精度、鲁棒性和泛化性方面均持续优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 退化驱动的自适应分箱机制能有效提升深度超分辨率的重建质量，尤其在严重退化或复杂结构区域表现突出。

Abstract: Depth super-resolution (DSR) aims to recover a high-resolution (HR) depth map from its low-resolution (LR) counterpart. With color image guidance, this task is typically formulated as learning the residual between HR and LR in a low-dimensional feature space. However, this additive formulation is insufficient to accurately capture the complex relationship between HR and LR, especially under spatially varying degradations. In this paper, we introduce DegBins, a novel DSR framework that leverages degradation-driven binning to adaptively enhance residual modeling. Specifically, DegBins reformulates the regression-based DSR as a hybrid classification-regression problem, where the residual depth is represented as a linear combination of discrete depth bins weighted by their learned probability distribution, yielding more flexible and expressive representations. Furthermore, DegBins models the degradation relationship between HR and LR in a high-dimensional feature space, enabling adaptive bin range adjustment and probability optimization conditioned on local degradation characteristics. To progressively improve reconstruction quality, DegBins adopts a multi-stage refinement scheme, where each stage performs finer-grained bin partitioning and probability updating based on the former estimation. This coarse-to-fine design facilitates more accurate depth recovery, particularly in regions with severe degradations or complex structural variations. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks demonstrate that DegBins consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, robustness, and generalization.

</details>


### [175] [Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Visual Continual Learning with Reinforcement Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09640)
*Meng Lou,Hanzhong Guo,Linwei Chen,Yizhou Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO)，通过轨迹级奖励塑形缓解强化微调（RFT）在视觉持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实验证明其显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然RFT（如GRPO）在灾难性遗忘方面天然优于SFT，但在视觉持续学习的类增量学习（CIL）和域增量学习（DIL）中是否仍有效尚不清楚。初步实验发现RFT仍存在不可忽视的遗忘问题，其根源在于轨迹级漂移不可知性。

Method: 提出RaPO，包含两个核心组件：(1) Retention Reward，将轨迹级分布漂移转化为连续奖励信号，优先强化保留知识轨迹；(2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN)，通过跨任务的指数移动平均维持奖励统计，稳定优化过程。

Result: 在五种视觉持续学习设置上的综合实验表明，RaPO显著减少了灾难性遗忘，同时保持强塑性，达到领先性能。

Conclusion: 这是首个系统探索RFT在视觉持续学习中应用的工作，为未来研究提供了新思路。

Abstract: Recent studies suggest that Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) is inherently more resilient to catastrophic forgetting than Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). However, whether RFT (e.g., GRPO) can effectively overcome forgetting in challenging visual continual learning settings, such as class-incremental learning (CIL) and domain-incremental learning (DIL), remains an open problem. Through a pilot study, we confirm that while RFT consistently outperforms SFT, it still suffers from non-negligible forgetting. We empirically trace this bottleneck to Trajectory-level Drift Agnosticism: among candidate rollouts achieving identical task rewards, the KL divergence from the preceding-task policy varies substantially, which strongly correlates with catastrophic forgetting across sequential tasks. Motivated by this insight, we propose Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO), a simple yet effective RFT method that explicitly mitigates forgetting through trajectory-level reward shaping. Specifically, RaPO comprises two core components: (1) Retention Reward that converts trajectory-level distribution drift into a continuous reward signal, preferentially reinforcing knowledge-preserving rollouts within each group; (2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN), which maintains a persistent exponential moving average of reward statistics across task boundaries to stabilize the optimization progress during continual learning. Leveraging the free-form textual generalization of MLLMs, we comprehensively evaluate RaPO across five visual continual learning settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RaPO achieves leading performance, substantially reducing catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong plasticity. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first systematic exploration of RFT in visual continual learning, offering insights that we hope will inspire future research.

</details>


### [176] [Attention Itself Could Retrieve.RetrieveVGGT: Training-Free Long Context Streaming 3D Reconstruction via Query-Key Similarity Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09644)
*Zichen Zou,Xiaosong Jia,Zuxuan Wu,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RetrieveVGGT通过将上下文构建转化为检索问题，为VGGT 3D重建模型实现固定内存预算的流式处理，无需额外训练，性能超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VGGT的全局注意力二次复杂度无法处理长序列；StreamVGGT的因果注意力虽然支持流式但KV缓存随帧数线性增长导致内存溢出和质量下降。目标是实现可控内存的流式3D重建。

Method: 1) 将上下文构建视为检索问题，每步仅检索固定数量的相关帧；2) 利用VGGT第一层全局注意力的query-key相似度作为相关性指标（无需额外学习）；3) 提出Segment Sampling机制跨不同相关片段采样以增加多样性；4) 设计姿态感知的空间记忆机制，根据相机姿态组织历史帧实现位置感知检索。

Result: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，超越StreamVGGT、TTT3R和InfiniteVGGT，同时保持恒定内存消耗，不随序列长度增长。

Conclusion: 检索式框架可有效解决Transformer模型在长序列3D重建中的内存瓶颈，利用现有注意力信号无需额外训练即可实现可控的流式处理。

Abstract: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) advances 3D reconstruction via scalable Transformer architecture, but the quadratic complexity of global attention prevents long context application. StreamVGGT enables streaming with causal attention, yet its KV cache grows linearly with frames, causing memory overflow and quality degradation. We present RetrieveVGGT, a training-free framework, which formulates context construction for VGGT as a retrieval problem. By retrieving a fixed number of relevant frames at each step, VGGT maintains a controllable memory budget, which is close to its training context length. Interestingly, we find that the similarity between current frame queries and cached history frame keys at the first global attention layer of VGGT is already a strong indicator of relevance, eliminating the need for additional learned scoring. To enhance information diversity similar to a recommender system, we propose Segment Sampling so that the retrieval spans distinct relevant segments rather than a single high-similarity region. We design a pose-aware spatial memory mechanism that organizes history frames according to their already estimated camera poses, enabling location-aware retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RetrieveVGGT achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming StreamVGGT, TTT3R, and InfiniteVGGT while maintaining constant memory usage regardless of sequence length. Code is available at https://github.com/zzctmd/RetrieveVGGT.

</details>


### [177] [BEA-GS: BEyond RAdiance Supervision in 3DGS for Precise Object Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09662)
*Alessio Mazzucchelli,Maria Naranjo-Almeida,Jorge Bustos-Sanchez,Mariella Dimiccoli,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Jordi Sanchez-Riera,Adrian Penate-Sanchez*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的3D高斯泼溅技术，通过两种新损失函数优化可见和不可见高斯的几何形状，在物体提取中实现了近乎完美的边界分割，在4个数据集上对比12种SOTA方法取得了最佳效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D语义高斯泼溅方法未优化底层3D几何结构，导致物体级编辑或资产提取困难。尽管COBGS、Trace3D、ObjectGS等方法开始尝试修改几何以表示语义，但边界分割质量仍然不足。

Method: 提出两种新损失：1) 边界损失——直接通过光栅化传播梯度，优化可见高斯的几何以尊重语义边界；2) 不可见高斯损失——不经过光栅化传播梯度，调整提取后出现的非可见高斯的几何。

Result: 在4个数据集上，使用6项指标与12种SOTA方法进行全面对比，该方法在边界分割任务上达到了目前最优性能。

Conclusion: 该方法通过同时优化可见和不可见高斯的几何，有效提升了物体提取的边界精度，为3D语义分割和场景编辑提供了更精准的几何基础。

Abstract: Most Gaussian Splatting techniques that provide a 3D semantic representation of the scene do not optimize the underlying 3D geometry, making object-level editing or asset extraction challenging. Recent methods, such as COBGS, Trace3D, ObjectGS, acknowledge this limitation and propose approaches that modify the scene's geometry to represent the underlying semantics. We advance this concept further by proposing a novel solution that provides near perfect boundaries in object extraction. We do so by introducing two new losses in the optimization that take care of: 1) a loss that modifies the geometry of visible Gaussians to respect semantic boundaries, and 2) a loss that adjusts the geometry of non-visible Gaussians that appear once the object is extracted. Our first loss propagates gradients directly through the rasterization, allowing for seamless integration within the optimization of the Gaussian parameters. The second loss also propagates gradients to Gaussian parameters but does so without passing through the rasterization, enabling modification of the scene's geometry even when little transmittance reaches a Gaussian (partial or non-visible). Exhaustive comparisons with 12 state of the art methods across 4 datasets, using six metrics, demonstrate that our approach produces overall the best boundary segmentation to date.

</details>


### [178] [Rethinking Evaluation of Multiple Sclerosis (MS) Lesion Segmentation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09666)
*Abdul Basit,Ashir Rashid,Muhammad Abdullah Hanif,Muhammad Shafique*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文指出当前多发性硬化（MS）病灶分割模型的评估过度依赖Dice分数，忽略了病灶级检测性能及临床相关指标，呼吁重新思考评估体系，并提出了"问题指纹"方法及新指标分析现有模型的实际可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MS病灶分割模型主要用Dice分数评估，忽略了病灶级别的检测与分割性能，也未考虑临床医生关注的复杂或模糊病例的评估指标，导致模型在真实医院部署中的实用性无法得到准确衡量。

Method: 1) 提出"问题指纹"（problem fingerprinting）方法，详细说明神经科医生在MRI扫描中关注哪些特征用于MS检测和进展监测；2) 确定需要哪些指标来量化模型在这些临床场景中的性能；3) 在两个开源数据集上使用这些新指标对现有最先进模型进行分析评估。

Result: 通过引入临床相关的新评估指标，揭示了现有模型在实际部署中的局限性，证明了仅靠Dice分数不足以评估模型的真实临床可用性。

Conclusion: MS病灶分割模型的评估需要从单一Dice分数转向更全面、更具临床意义的指标体系，以提升模型在真实医院环境中的可用性和可靠性。

Abstract: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease that can significantly reduce the quality of life of a patient. Existing treatment options can only help slow down the progression of the disease. Therefore, early detection and precise monitoring of disease progression are important. Deep learning offers state-of-the-art models for detecting and segmenting MS lesions in brain MRI scans. However, most of these models are evaluated using the Dice score, without accounting for lesion-wise detection and segmentation performance or other metrics that quantify model performance in cases that are complex or confusing for human annotators, or in cases that are essential for disease detection and progression monitoring. In this paper, we highlight the need to rethink the evaluation of MS lesion segmentation models. In this context, we first present problem fingerprinting in detail to highlight what neurologists look for in brain MRI scans for MS detection and progression monitoring, and which metrics are required to properly quantify model performance in these contexts. Additionally, we present an analysis of state-of-the-art models on two open-source datasets using these metrics to highlight their usability for real-world deployment in hospitals.

</details>


### [179] [S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09667)
*Albert Heruth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出S2P-Net，一种无需数据增强即可实现数学上保证的旋转不变性的紧凑型深度学习架构，并与CNN进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CNN架构对旋转变化敏感，通常需要数据增强来应对，但无法从数学上保证旋转不变性，作者希望设计一种紧凑且理论上保证旋转不变性的网络。

Method: 提出S2P-Net（Spectral-Spatial Polar Network），一种紧凑的深度学习架构，通过谱-空间极坐标设计实现数学上保证的旋转不变性。

Result: 与其他CNN架构进行了对比实验，S2P-Net在旋转不变性任务上表现更优。

Conclusion: S2P-Net作为首个紧凑型且数学上保证旋转不变性的网络，为旋转不变性深度学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert

</details>


### [180] [VFM-SDM: A vision foundation model-based framework for training-free, marker-free, and calibration-free structural displacement measurement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09677)
*Qingyu Xian,Hao Cheng,Berend Jan van der Zwaag,Rolands Kromanis,Ozlem Durmaz Incel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出VFM-SDM框架，利用视觉基础模型实现无需任务训练和现场准备的建筑结构位移测量，在实地桥梁数据上验证了良好性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统位移测量依赖传感器或人工标定/标记，部署成本高、灵活性差，难以实现低成本、非接触式的自动化监测。

Method: 基于视觉基础模型（VFM）进行相机参数估计和点跟踪，通过三角测量重建多方向结构位移，并引入结构几何约束抑制不合理偏差。

Result: 在实地行人天桥数据集上，垂直和水平位移的NRMSE范围为0.11/0.12，相关系数0.86/0.88，峰值误差RPPAE为0.01/0.02。

Conclusion: VFM-SDM实现了无需任务特定训练和现场准备的自动化位移监测，为数字孪生和数据驱动的建筑工作流奠定了基础。

Abstract: Reliable displacement measurement is fundamental for structural health monitoring and digital engineering workflows, as it provides direct structural response information. Vision-based measurement has emerged as a promising approach for low-cost, non-contact displacement monitoring. However, its deployment often remains constrained by task-specific model training or on-site preparation, such as marker installation or manual camera calibration. This study presents a Vision Foundation Model-based framework for Structural Displacement Measurement (VFM-SDM) that integrates VFM-inferred camera parameter estimation and point tracking to reconstruct multi-directional structural displacements via triangulation without task-specific training or on-site preparation, enabling efficient non-contact deployment in real-world applications. Structural geometry constraints are incorporated to suppress physically implausible deviations and improve estimation consistency. A multi-modal field dataset collected from an in-service pedestrian bridge is introduced alongside a unified benchmarking protocol to support reproducible evaluation. Representative results show low amplitude errors (NRMSE$_{\text{range}}$: 0.11/0.12), strong temporal agreement (correlation coefficient: 0.86/0.88), and small peak-to-peak amplitude errors (RPPAE: 0.01/0.02) for vertical and lateral displacements, indicating robust performance under real-world conditions. The proposed framework advances automated, scalable displacement monitoring and lays the groundwork for VFM-enabled structural response measurements in digital twin and data-centric construction workflows.

</details>


### [181] [DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09679)
*Yixiong Chen,Wenjie Xiao,Pedro R. A. S. Bassi,Boyan Wang,Liang He,Xinze Zhou,Sezgin Er,Ibrahim Ethem Hamamci,Zongwei Zhou,Alan Yuille*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DeepTumorVQA，一个将3D CT肿瘤诊断推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理四个阶段的层级式VQA基准，包含476K问题和工具交互环境，发现定量测量是VLM的主要瓶颈，而工具增强可显著缓解该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学VQA基准仅用一个准确率分数掩盖模型能力，无法揭示模型在何处及为何失败。作者希望构建一个遵循肿瘤诊断多阶段证据链的层级式基准，以精细化评估模型在不同推理阶段的表现。

Method: 将3D CT肿瘤推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理、医学推理四个可独立评分的阶段，构建476K问题（42个临床亚型，9262个3D CT体积）；提供直接推理和工具交互（分割模型、测量程序、医学知识模块）两种评估模式。

Result: 超过30个模型配置的评估表明：定量测量是VLM的主要瓶颈，后续视觉和医学推理更难；工具增强可显著缓解该问题；当工具可用时，利用医学知识和工具进行推理成为新挑战；真实工具使用轨迹可监督智能体减少推理失败。

Conclusion: 从识别到测量再到视觉和医学推理的阶段式进步，为未来医学VLM和AI智能体研究提供了具体路线图。

Abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at https://github.com/Schuture/DeepTumorVQA.

</details>


### [182] [Forcing-KV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09681)
*Yicheng Ji,Zhizhou Zhong,Jun Zhang,Qin Yang,XiTai Jin,Ying Qin,Wenhan Luo,Shuiyang Mao,Wei Liu,Huan Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对自回归视频扩散模型中的KV缓存冗余问题，提出Forcing-KV混合压缩策略，根据注意力头功能特化将头分为静态和动态两类，分别采用结构化静态剪枝和基于段相似性的动态剪枝，在保持生成质量的同时实现30%缓存缩减和高达2.82倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型虽能实现长视频实时生成，但跨历史帧的冗余KV缓存导致注意力复杂度高、显存开销大，限制了可扩展性。

Method: 基于对主流AR扩散模型中注意力头功能特化的实证研究，将注意力头分为静态头（关注跨自回归块转换和帧内保真度）和动态头（控制帧间运动与一致性），对静态头采用结构化静态剪枝，对动态头采用基于段相似性的动态剪枝，形成混合KV缓存压缩策略Forcing-KV。

Result: 在单个NVIDIA H200 GPU上实现超过29 FPS的生成速度，减少30%缓存内存，在LongLive和Self Forcing方法上分别获得1.35x和1.50x的加速（480P），在1080P分辨率下扩展至2.82x加速。

Conclusion: Forcing-KV通过识别和利用注意力头的功能特化实现了高效的KV缓存压缩，显著提升了自回归视频扩散模型的生成速度与可扩展性，同时保持输出质量。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models adopt a streaming generation framework, enabling long-horizon video generation with real-time responsiveness, as exemplified by the Self Forcing training paradigm. However, existing AR video diffusion models still suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the redundant key-value (KV) caches across historical frames, which limits scalability. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into autoregressive video diffusion. We observe that attention heads in mainstream AR diffusion models exhibit markedly distinct attention patterns and functional roles that remain stable across samples and denoising steps. Building on our empirical study of head-wise functional specialization, we divide the attention heads into two categories: static heads, which focus on transitions across autoregressive chunks and intra-frame fidelity, and dynamic heads, which govern inter-frame motion and consistency. We then propose Forcing-KV, a hybrid KV cache compression strategy that performs structured static pruning for static heads and dynamic pruning based on segment-wise similarity for dynamic heads. While maintaining output quality, our method achieves a generation speed of over 29 frames per second on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU along with 30% cache memory reduction, delivering up to 1.35x and 1.50x speedups on LongLive and Self Forcing at 480P resolution, and further scaling to 2.82x speedup at 1080P resolution. Code and demo videos are provided at https://zju-jiyicheng.github.io/Forcing-KV-Page.

</details>


### [183] [Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for Remote Sensing Single-Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09687)
*Md Aminur Hossain,Parekh Valkesh,Ayush V. Patel,Yogesh Jethani,Sanjay K. Singh,Biplab Banerjee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SFG-SwinSR，通过在Swin Transformer前馈网络中引入空间-频率门控机制（SFG-FFN），分离低频结构和高频细节，提升遥感图像超分辨率重建质量，在SpaceNet上PSNR达45.19 dB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Swin Transformer-based超分辨率模型（如Swin2SR）的前馈网络仅为通用通道混合模块，无法有效分离低频结构内容与高频残差细节，限制了遥感图像细节重建能力。

Method: 在Swin2SR基础上，将标准前馈网络替换为空间-频率门控前馈网络（SFG-FFN），包含：深度模糊分支估计低频内容、减法提取高频残差、轻量空间分支精炼高频特征、瓶颈门控自适应注入细节。

Result: 在SpaceNet上PSNR达45.19 dB、SSIM达0.9852，在SEN2VENμS上同样表现更优，有效提升了高频细节的重建质量。

Conclusion: 在Transformer前馈网络中引入空间-频率变换能有效改善遥感超分辨率中的细节重建效果。

Abstract: Remote Sensing (RS) single-image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution imagery from low-resolution observations while preserving fine spatial structures. Recent Swin Transformer-based models, including Swin2SR, provide strong spatial context modeling throughshifted-window self-attention, but their feed-forward networks remain generic channel-mixing modules and do not separate low-frequency structural content from high-frequency residual detail. To address this limitation, we propose SFG-SwinSR, a Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for single-image super-resolution in remote sensing. SFG-SwinSR modifies the original Swin2SR attention block by replacing each transformer block's standard feed-forward network with a lightweight Spatial-Frequency Gated Feed-Forward Network (SFG-FFN). The module estimates low-frequency content via a depthwise-blur branch, extracts high-frequency residuals by subtraction, refines them with a lightweight spatial branch, and adaptively injects detail through a bottleneck gate. Experiments on SpaceNet and SEN2VENμS show that SFG-SwinSR improves reconstruction quality under the evaluated settings. On SpaceNet, it achieves 45.19 dB PSNR and 0.9852 SSIM, indicating effective enhancement of high-frequency details. This demonstrates that spatial-frequency transformation within the transformer feed-forward network improves detail reconstruction in RS super-resolution.

</details>


### [184] [ConFixGS: Learning to Fix Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Confidence-Aware Diffusion Priors in Driving Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09688)
*Rui Song,Tianhui Cai,Markus Gross,Xingcheng Zhou,Zewei Zhou,Zhiyu Huang,Olaf Wysocki,Jiaqi Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ConFixGS是一种即插即用方法，通过置信度感知的扩散先验来修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，显著提升稀疏视图驾驶场景的新视角合成质量（PSNR最高提升3.68dB，FID降低近一半）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
