Method: 设计DDAC组件，将动画指令外部化为Inspector可编辑的资源；规则由Condition（读取任意节点变量）和Action（设置目标动画）组成；采用优先级解析算法实现多规则匹配时的互斥执行。

Result: DDAC实现了动画逻辑的声明式管理，支持动画速度缩放和精灵翻转等视觉状态的规则化设置，使设计师无需修改代码即可迭代角色视觉表现。

Conclusion: 该方法显著提升了代码可维护性，降低了核心开发者的认知负荷，实现了动画逻辑与核心脚本的健壮解耦。

Abstract: This paper introduces the Data-Driven Animation Controller (DDAC), a specialized Godot component that achieves robust decoupling of animation logic from core gameplay scripts through a data-driven approach. Animation control is typically centralized and imperatively defined within core character scripts, often relying on implicit Finite State Machines (FSMs). This practice leads to tightly coupled and difficult-to-maintain codebases. The DDAC component externalizes these instructions into easily inspector-editable resources, effectively making the animation logic declarative. Rules are defined by reading Conditions from any variable on any external node and executing Actions (setting the target animation). The DDAC also manages secondary visual state settings, such as Animation Speed Scaling and Horizontal/Vertical Sprite Flipping, using the same simple rule-based setup. The highest contribution of this work is the use of a Prioritized Resolution Algorithm to enforce mutual exclusion, ensuring that when multiple rules match, only the highest-priority rule executes. This framework allows designers to quickly iterate on character-state visualization without modifying code, while significantly improving maintainability and reducing cognitive load on core developers.

</details>


### [516] [Alice v1: Distillation-Enhanced Video Generation Surpassing Closed-Source Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08115)
*Wang Xiaoyu,Phong Nguyen,Chen Zhao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: Alice v1是一个140亿参数的开源视频生成模型，通过一致性蒸馏与分数正则化（rCM）技术在4步去噪中生成5秒720p/24fps视频，VBench得分91.2，超越教师模型（Wan2.2的84.0分）及闭源系统（Veo3~90, Sora2~88），同时实现7倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统蒸馏以牺牲质量换取速度，本文旨在证明基于rCM的蒸馏可以超越教师模型质量，同时大幅提升推理速度。

Method: (1) 分数正则化项作为模式寻找目标，集中概率质量于高质量输出；(2) 合成数据pipeline配合困难样本挖掘，针对物理、手、脸等教师模型处理不佳的失败模式；(3) 一致性约束作为隐式正则化，消除对特定噪声样本的"幸运路径"依赖。

Result: Alice v1在4步去噪中生成5秒720p/24fps视频（H100上约8秒），比50步教师模型快7倍；VBench得分从84.0提升至91.2，超越教师模型及Veo3、Sora2等闭源系统；人工偏好研究中也具有竞争力。

Conclusion: rCM蒸馏可以超越教师质量，开源模型可达到甚至超越闭源商业系统的水平，团队已开源全部模型权重、训练代码、合成数据pipeline及评估脚本。

Abstract: Wepresent Alice v1, a 14-billion parameter open-source video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art quality through consistency distillation with score regularization (rCM). Contrary to conventional distillation-which trades quality for speed-we demonstrate that rCM-based distillation can exceed teacher model quality. We attribute this to three mechanisms: (1) the score regularization term acts as a mode-seeking objective that concentrates probability mass on high-quality outputs rather than covering the full teacher distribution, (2) our targeted synthetic data pipeline with hard example mining provides training signal specifically for failure modes (physics, hands, faces) that the teacher handles inconsistently, and (3) consistency enforcement acts as implicit regularization, eliminating "lucky path" dependence on specific noise samples. Alice v1 generates 5-second 720p videos at 24fps in 4 denoising steps (~8 seconds on H100), a 7x speedup over the 50-step teacher while improving VBench score from 84.0 (Wan2.2) to 91.2. This surpasses both the teacher and closed-source systems including Veo3 (~90) and Sora2 (~88) on automated benchmarks, with competitive results in human preference studies. We release all model weights, training code, synthetic data pipelines, and evaluation scripts to advance open research in video generation.

</details>


### [517] [MeshFIM: Local Low-Poly Mesh Editing via Fill-in-the-Middle Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08744)
*Dingdong Yang,Jian Liu,Biwen Lei,Haohan Weng,Zhuo Chen,Song Guo,Hao Richard Zhang,Ali Mahdavi Amiri,Chunchao Guo*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: MeshFIM是一个面向低多边形网格的填充式生成框架，能够在保留上下文的前提下只生成不满意的局部区域，避免了传统AR模型的全盘重新生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的AR模型生成低多边形网格时是"全有或全无"的，一旦局部不满意就必须整个重新生成，浪费计算资源并破坏已满意的网格结构。

Method: 提出MeshFIM框架，包含五项关键技术：边界顶点标记、上下文位置编码、扩展上下文宽度、上下文增强、以及基于门控减法机制的低多边形几何编码器，利用参考面与现有网格的差异聚焦于缺失区域生成。

Result: 在网格细化、网格修复和完整网格生成+拼接方案上均优于多个基线方法，消融实验验证了每个组件的有效性。

Conclusion: MeshFIM实现了交互式笔刷编辑和自动缺陷修复两种应用，为低多边形网格的局部编辑提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models can generate high-quality low-poly meshes from point clouds, but they still operate in an all-or-nothing manner: when a local region is unsatisfactory, the entire mesh must be regenerated, wasting computation and destroying satisfactory mesh structure elsewhere. We introduce MeshFIM, a Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) framework that regenerates a target region of a low-poly mesh conditioned on the surrounding context. MeshFIM addresses three mesh-specific challenges: enforcing exact attachment along the exposed boundary, preserving topological order in the context, and suppressing overflow beyond the intended region. It does so with five complementary design choices: boundary vertex markers, context positional embeddings, expanded context width, context augmentation, and a low-poly geometry encoder whose gated subtraction mechanism focuses generation on the missing region by leveraging the difference between the reference surface and the existing mesh. Detailed ablation studies are presented to show the effectiveness of every introduced component. Based on MeshFIM, we demonstrate two applications: interactive brush-based editing and automatic defect repair on low-poly mesh (see Figure 1). Last but not least, experiments show that MeshFIM outperforms a range of baselines in mesh refinement, mesh repair and whole mesh generation plus stitch-back scheme.

</details>


### [518] [HairGPT: Strand-as-Language Autoregressive Modeling for Realistic 3D Hairstyle Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08824)
*Haimin Luo,Min Ouyang,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: HairGPT提出了一种以发丝为核心的框架，通过双重解耦自回归序列建模实现3D发型合成，将发型生成从模糊的纹理合成转变为结构化、语义可控的创作过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成方法依赖连续扩散场，将全局拓扑与局部纹理纠缠在一起，忽略了发型的语义和结构组织，缺乏对发型结构的清晰建模。

Method: 提出HairGPT框架：(1)以发丝为生成基元；(2)双重解耦——空间解耦（按语义头皮区域）和结构解耦（分层发丝表征，从全局布局到精细风格）；(3)几何分词器和区域感知语义标注引导发丝级生成。

Result: 支持组合编辑、合成稀有复杂发型、适应风格化域，在真实和风格化域均能生成高保真结果。

Conclusion: 将生成建模与数字发型修饰工作流对齐，使发型生成变为结构化和语义可控的创作过程，实现鲁棒的语义条件控制。

Abstract: Hair is a rich medium of visual and cultural expression, yet its digital modeling remains challenging due to the duality of fluidity and structure. Many existing generative approaches rely primarily on continuous diffusion fields, which entangle global topology with local texture and obscure the semantic and structural organization of hairstyles. To address this, we propose HairGPT, a strand-centric framework that treats strands as generative primitives and formulates realistic 3D hairstyle synthesis as a dual-decoupled autoregressive sequence modeling problem. Our method applies spatial decoupling across semantic scalp regions and structural decoupling along a hierarchical strand representation, progressing from global layout to fine-grained style. We further introduce a geometric tokenizer and region-aware semantic annotations to guide strand-level generation, enabling compositional editing, synthesis of rare and complex hairstyles, and adaptation to stylized domains. By aligning generative modeling with the workflow of digital grooming, HairGPT turns hair generation from opaque texture synthesis into a structured and semantically controllable authoring process, supporting robust semantic conditioning and high-fidelity results across realistic and stylized domains. Project Page: https://haiminluo.github.io/hairgpt/

</details>


### [519] [CAGS: Color-Adaptive Volumetric Video Streaming with Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09279)
*Daheng Yin,Yili Jin,Jianxin Shi,Isaac Ding,Miao Zhang,Fangxin Wang,Zhaowu Huang,Cong Zhang,Jiangchuan Liu,Fang Dong*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CAGS的自适应体积视频流系统，通过颜色自适应方案（基于向量量化和低分辨率参考图像进行颜色校正）来优化3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的带宽消耗和质量退化问题，在波动带宽下PSNR提升5~20 dB，并兼容多种高斯表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体积视频流在实时远程沉浸式应用中（如远程临场、生态监控、机器人遥操作）面临三个系统级挑战：逼真场景表示、低延迟交互和异构网络下的鲁棒性能。3DGS虽能实现实时逼真渲染，但存在带宽消耗大、现有基于密度的LoD方法不适用于高斯表示（导致可见间隙和质量下降）等问题。初步研究发现激进的属性压缩主要引起颜色失真，且可在渲染图像中通过参考图像有效校正，这为提出颜色自适应方案提供了动机。

Method: 提出颜色自适应（Color-Adaptive）方案：利用向量量化（VQ）建立层次细节（LoD），并通过低分辨率参考图像校正颜色失真。基于该方案设计了CAGS系统，在流服务器端渲染参考图像，在客户端进行颜色恢复，实现与多种高斯表示的兼容。

Result: 实验结果表明，CAGS在波动带宽下PSNR比现有自适应流系统高出5~20 dB，运行速度显著快于现有可扩展高斯压缩方法，且能泛化到不同高斯表示。

Conclusion: CAGS通过颜色自适应方案有效解决了3DGS在自适应体积视频流中的带宽和质量问题，验证了基于参考图像校正颜色失真的可行性，为高斯表示下的自适应流传输提供了高效新范式。

Abstract: Volumetric video (VV) streaming enables real-time, immersive access to remote 3D environments, powering telepresence, ecological monitoring, and robotic teleoperation. These applications turn VV streaming into a real-time interface to remote physical environments, imposing new system-level demands for photorealistic scene representation, low-latency interaction, and robust performance under heterogeneous networks. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has been widely used for real-time photorealistic rendering, offering superior visual quality and rendering performance, but it faces challenges due to bandwidth consumption. Furthermore, as the foundation of adaptive VV streaming, existing Levels of Detail (LoD) methods based on density are not well-suited to Gaussian representations, leading to visible gaps and severe quality degradation. Recent studies have also explored attribute compression techniques to reduce bandwidth consumption. Our preliminary studies reveal that aggressive attribute compression primarily causes color distortion, which can be effectively corrected in the rendered image using a reference image. Motivated by these findings, we propose a novel Color-Adaptive scheme for adaptive VV streaming that uses vector quantization (VQ) to establish LoDs and correct color distortions with low-resolution reference images. We further present CAGS, an adaptive VV streaming system compatible with diverse Gaussian representations, which integrates the Color-Adaptive scheme by rendering reference images on the streaming server and performing color restoration on the client. Extensive experiments on our prototype system demonstrate that CAGS outperforms the existing adaptive streaming systems in PSNR by 5$\sim$20 dB under fluctuating bandwidth, operates significantly faster than existing scalable Gaussian compression methods, and generalizes across different Gaussian representations.

</details>


### [520] [LagrangianSplats: Divergence-Free Transport of Gaussian Primitives for Fluid Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09299)
*Ningxiao Tao,Baoquan Chen,Mengyu Chu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从稀疏2D视频观测重建3D流体速度场的方法，通过无散度核参数化和3D高斯泼溅表示，结构性地强制执行不可压缩性和长程传输一致性，并引入滑动窗口机制实现高效优化，在合成和真实数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的流体速度场重建方法通常通过软惩罚项施加物理约束，导致精度不足和收敛问题。

Method: 1) 使用连续无散度核表示参数化重建速度场，内在保证不可压缩性；2) 结合拉格朗日3D高斯泼溅表示驱动平流，保证长程传输一致性；3) 提出滑动窗口方案在有效时间范围传播梯度，优化效率可控。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法在传输一致性和物理精度方面均优于现有的基线方法，支持高质量重模拟和流场分析。

Conclusion: 通过结构性而非软惩罚的方式强制物理约束，显著提升了从稀疏观测重建三维流体速度场的精度和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Reconstructing 3D fluid velocity fields from sparse 2D video observations is a highly ill-posed inverse problem, demanding both transport consistency with observed motion and physical validity under fluid laws. Existing methods typically impose these constraints through soft penalties, often leading to compromised accuracy and convergence issues. We introduce a reconstruction framework that structurally enforces both constraints. Specifically, we parameterize the reconstructed velocity using a continuous Divergence-Free Kernel representation, driving the advection of a Lagrangian 3D Gaussian Splatting representation. This formulation intrinsically guarantees both flow incompressibility and long-range transport coherence by construction. To enable the efficient optimization of such a constrained system, we introduce a novel Sliding Window scheme that propagates gradients over meaningful temporal horizons while maintaining tractable training costs. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both transport consistency and physical accuracy, enabling applications such as high-quality re-simulation and flow analysis.

</details>


### [521] [FrameTwin: Curve-Anchored Gaussian Alignment from Sparse Views for Adaptive Wireframe 3D Printing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09362)
*Wenting Wang,Zhuo Huang,Kun Qian,Neelotpal Dutta,Yuhu Guo,Yingjun Tian,Yeung Yam,Charlie C. L. Wang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: FrameTwin提出了一种基于曲线锚定高斯的对齐框架，利用稀疏视角图像为自适应线框3D打印提供控制闭环，通过可微渲染估计变形场并更新打印轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线框3D打印过程中结构易发生变形，现有方法难以从稀疏视角图像中准确捕捉薄结构的变形，缺乏有效的闭环控制机制。

Method: 将高斯核锚定在参数化曲线上，形成紧凑的几何感知编码；通过可微渲染管线估计神经变形场，对齐部分打印的目标模型与观测到的变形结构。

Result: 该方法能够鲁棒地捕捉并补偿机器人3D打印系统中线框模型的变形，实现自适应路径更新。

Conclusion: FrameTwin通过曲线约束的高斯表示有效降低了稀疏视角下薄结构观测的歧义性，为线框3D打印提供了可靠的数字孪生与闭环控制方案。

Abstract: We present FrameTwin, a curve-anchored Gaussian alignment framework that uses sparse-view images to close the control loop for adaptive wireframe 3D printing. Our key idea is to capture the deformation of thin wireframe structures from sparse-view images using Gaussian kernels anchored to parametric curves, yielding a compact and geometry-aware encoding that explicitly captures strut topology. Driven by a differentiable rendering pipeline, FrameTwin estimates a neural deformation field that aligns the partially printed target model with the deformed structure observed during fabrication, where the optimized curve-Gaussian representation serves as a digital twin of the evolving wireframe. Unlike general Gaussian-splatting approaches, our formulation constrains kernel placement along parametric curves, substantially reducing the ambiguity inherent in sparse-view observations of thin structures. The resultant deformation-field alignment enforces global consistency across all struts. By using the estimated deformation field to blend the distorted printed geometry with the remaining unprinted geometry, FrameTwin enables adaptive updates to future printing trajectories. We demonstrate that FrameTwin can robustly capture and compensate for deformation in wireframe models fabricated using a robotized 3D printing system.

</details>


### [522] [Geometrically Approximated Modeling for Emitter-Centric Ray-Triangle Filtering in Arbitrarily Dynamic LiDAR Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10457)
*Rabin Gajmer,Joonas Haapala,Zoltan Beck*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: GRCA通过反转传统射线追踪问题（从“每条射线击中什么”变为“每个三角形可能被哪些射线击中”），结合旋转追踪锥/平面几何建模，实现了无需加速结构的实时LiDAR仿真，在动态场景中相比OptiX/Embree达到最高19.2倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统加速结构方法对动态几何需要每帧重建，成本随场景动态程度线性增长且无法分摊，无法高效处理包含大量运动/变形物体的高动态LiDAR仿真场景。

Method: GRCA反转射线追踪问题：将旋转LiDAR发射器几何建模为旋转追踪锥/平面，利用每个三角形相对于发射器的表观面积来剔除不可能被击中的通道和射线，无需任何加速结构。算法完全基于计算且与供应商无关。

Result: 在2-8个128x4096射线LiDAR（~1M射线/帧）的动态场景中：无距离裁剪时GPU达7.97x、CPU达14.55x；加入10-100m距离裁剪后GPU达7.02x、CPU达9.33x；混合管线（GRCA+OptiX/Embree）在22M三角形（9M动态）场景中GPU达10.5x、CPU达19.2x。

Conclusion: GRCA是一种通用的射线追踪算法，其发射器中心反转思想适用于任何射线从已知位置发出的场景，不仅限于LiDAR仿真。

Abstract: Real-time Light Detection And Ranging (LiDAR) simulation must find, per emitted ray, the closest intersecting triangle even in dynamic scenes containing large numbers of moving and deformable objects. Dominant acceleration-structure approaches require rebuilding each frame for dynamic geometry -- a cost that compounds directly with scene dynamics and cannot be amortized regardless of how little actually changed.
  This paper presents the Gajmer Ray-Casting Algorithm (GRCA), which inverts the question: instead of asking what does each ray hit? it asks which rays can each triangle possibly hit? GRCA geometrically models spinning LiDAR emitters as rotation-traced cones or planes and uses each triangle's emitter-centric apparent area to cull, per triangle, which channels and the rays within those channels can possibly reach it -- without any acceleration structure. GRCA is compute-based and vendor-agnostic by design, targeting highly dynamic, high-resolution simultaneous multi-sensor simulation. At its core, GRCA is a general-purpose ray-casting algorithm: the emitter-centric inversion applies to any setting where rays originate from a known position, not only LiDAR.
  Benchmarks evaluate 2-8 simultaneous 128x4096-ray LiDARs (360deg/180deg) over complex dynamic scenes -- with just two sensors casting ~1M rays per frame. With range culling inactive, GRCA reaches up to 7.97x over hardware-accelerated OptiX (GPU) and 14.55x over Embree (CPU).
  Two independent extensions further boost performance even in the most complex scene (~22M triangles, ~9M of which are dynamic, 8 LiDARs): range culling at realistic deployment ranges (10-100m) reaches up to 7.02x GPU and 9.33x CPU; a hybrid pipeline -- GRCA for dynamic geometry, OptiX/Embree for static -- reaches up to 10.5x GPU and 19.2x CPU.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [523] [Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08200)
*Logan Mann,Ajit Saravanan,Ishan Dave,Shikhar Shiromani,Saadullah Ismail,Yi Xia,Emily Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过系统性实验驳斥了"注意力图越集中、模型越可靠"的直觉假设。研究发现：注意力结构几乎无法预测回答正确性（相关系数接近0），而隐藏状态几何、自一致性等后期计算特征才是更可靠的可靠性指标。此外，不同架构的可靠性神经回路分布差异显著——晚期融合模型集中在脆弱瓶颈，早期融合则广泛分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验视觉语言模型中一个广泛存在的直觉假设：注意力图越清晰/集中，模型的回答就越自信、越准确（Attention-Confidence假设）。

Method: 设计了统一的机制分析流水线VRP（VLM可靠性探测），包含三部分：注意力结构分析、生成动态监测、隐藏状态几何分析。在三个开源VLM家族（LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL, 3-7B参数）上进行实验。

Result: （1）注意力结构与正确性几乎无关（相关系数≈0）；但注意力对特征提取仍因果必要（遮蔽头部30%区域准确率下降8.2-11.3pp）。（2）隐藏状态线性探针在POPE上AUROC>0.95；K=10自一致性是最强行为预测指标（R_pb=0.43）。（3）架构差异显著：LLaVA（晚期融合）可靠性集中在脆弱晚期瓶颈，去除top-5神经元导致-8.3pp下降；PaliGemma和Qwen2-VL（早期融合）分布广泛，去除~50%隐藏维度仅下降<=1pp。

Conclusion: 在3-7B VLM中，可靠性的可读性来源不是注意力图锐度，而是隐藏状态几何、层间间隔形成和稀疏的后期层回路。这对VLM的可信度监控设计与架构选择具有直接指导意义。

Abstract: A pervasive intuition holds that vision-language models (VLMs) are most trustworthy when their attention maps look sharp: concentrated attention on the queried region should imply a confident, calibrated answer. We test this Attention-Confidence Assumption directly. We instrument three open-weight VLM families (LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL; 3-7B parameters) with a unified mechanistic pipeline -- the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP) -- that compares attention structure, generation dynamics, and hidden-state geometry against a single correctness label. Three results emerge. (i) Attention structure is a near-zero predictor of correctness (R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]; R_pb(H_s,y)=-0.012, [-0.047,0.024] on a pooled n=3,090 split), even though attention remains causally necessary for feature extraction (top-30% patch masking drops accuracy by 8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001). (ii) Reliability becomes legible later in the computation: a single hidden-state linear probe reaches AUROC>0.95 on POPE for two of three families, and self-consistency at K=10 is the strongest behavioral predictor we measure at 10x inference cost (R_pb=0.43). (iii) Causal neuron-level ablations expose a sharp architectural split with direct monitor-design implications: late-fusion LLaVA concentrates reliability in a fragile late bottleneck (-8.3 pp object-identification accuracy after top-5 probe-neuron ablation), whereas early-fusion PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute it widely and absorb destruction of ~50% of their peak-layer hidden dimension with <=1 pp degradation. The takeaway is narrow but consequential: in 3-7B VLMs, reliability is read more reliably off hidden-state geometry, layer-wise margin formation, and sparse late-layer circuits than off attention-map sharpness.

</details>


### [524] [Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08220)
*Andrei Lazarev,Dmitrii Sedov,Alexander Galkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对比研究了两种提升多模态大模型从科学图表中提取数据准确性的策略：高层语义提示（如元数据优先框架和思维链）效果不显著，而低层空间提示（在图表上叠加坐标网格）使提取误差（SMAPE）从25.5%显著降低至19.5%（p<0.05），表明当前多模态模型更依赖显式空间上下文而非高层语义指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化提取科学图表中的数值数据对大规模文献分析至关重要，但多模态大模型在非标准化图表上的准确性仍面临挑战。现有方法效果参差不齐，需要探究最有效的提升策略。

Method: 对比两种策略：（1）高层语义方法：两阶段元数据优先框架和思维链；（2）低层空间方法：在图表图像上叠加坐标网格。在合成数据集上进行定量实验，以SMAPE为评估指标。

Result: 高层语义方法未产生统计显著的提升；而简单的坐标网格叠加方法将SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%，p<0.05，效果统计显著。

Conclusion: 对于当前多模态大模型，提供显式空间上下文（坐标网格）比高层语义引导在图表数据提取任务上更有效、更可靠。

Abstract: The automated extraction of data from scientific charts is a critical task for large-scale literature analysis. While multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, their accuracy on non-standardized charts remains a challenge. This raises a key research question: what is the most effective strategy to improve model performance (high-level semantic priming) or low-level spatial priming? This paper presents a comparative investigation into these two distinct strategies. We describe our exploratory experiments with semantic methods, such as a two-stage metadata-first framework and Chain-of-Thought, which failed to produce a statistically significant improvement. In contrast, we present a simple but highly effective spatial priming method: overlaying a coordinate grid onto the chart image before analysis. Our quantitative experiment on a synthetic dataset demonstrates that this grid-based approach provides a statistically significant reduction in data extraction error (SMAPE reduced from 25.5% to 19.5%, p < 0.05) compared to a baseline. We conclude that for the current generation of multimodal models, providing explicit spatial context is a more effective and reliable strategy than high-level semantic guidance for this class of tasks.

</details>


### [525] [Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08354)
*Juanxi Tian,Fengyuan Liu,Jiaming Han,Yilei Jiang,Yongliang Wu,Yesheng Liu,Haodong Li,Furong Xu,Wanhua Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR)框架，将隐式偏好知识显式化为可解释的评分标准，并搭配Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO)蒸馏结构化评估为稳健二值奖励，在文本到图像生成与图像编辑任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的RLHF方法将人类偏好的多维度、组合结构压缩为标量或成对标签，导致偏好信息丢失且易受奖励破解攻击；而Rubrics-as-Reward方法虽试图恢复结构，但在可靠性、可扩展性和数据效率上仍存在瓶颈。

Method: ARR在成对比较之前，将VLM内部的隐式偏好知识外部化为提示特定的评分标准（rubrics），将整体意图分解为独立可验证的质量维度；RPO则将ARR的结构化多维评估蒸馏为稳健的二值奖励，替代不透明的标量回归，用评分标准条件化的偏好决策稳定策略梯度。

Result: 在文本到图像生成和图像编辑基准上，ARR-RPO优于成对奖励模型和VLM评判器，有效抑制了位置偏差等评估偏见，并实现了零样本部署和少样本适应。

Conclusion: 显式地将隐式偏好知识外部化为结构化评分标准能够实现更可靠、数据高效的多模态对齐，当前对齐瓶颈在于缺乏因子化的接口而非知识本身。

Abstract: Aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences demands reward signals that respect the compositional, multi-dimensional structure of human judgment. Prevailing RLHF approaches reduce this structure to scalar or pairwise labels, collapsing nuanced preferences into opaque parametric proxies and exposing vulnerabilities to reward hacking. While recent Rubrics-as-Reward (RaR) methods attempt to recover this structure through explicit criteria, generating rubrics that are simultaneously reliable, scalable, and data-efficient remains an open problem. We introduce Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR), a framework that reframes reward modeling from implicit weight optimization to explicit, criteria-based decomposition. Before any pairwise comparison, ARR externalizes a VLM's internalized preference knowledge as prompt-specific rubrics, translating holistic intent into independently verifiable quality dimensions. This conversion of implicit preference structure into inspectable, interpretable constraints substantially suppresses evaluation biases including positional bias, enabling both zero-shot deployment and few-shot conditioning on minimal supervision. To extend these gains into generative training, we propose Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO), which distills ARR's structured multi-dimensional evaluation into a robust binary reward, replacing opaque scalar regression with rubric-conditioned preference decisions that stabilize policy gradients. On text-to-image generation and image editing benchmarks, ARR-RPO outperforms pairwise reward models and VLM judges, demonstrating that explicitly externalizing implicit preference knowledge into structured rubrics achieves more reliable, data-efficient multimodal alignment, revealing that the bottleneck is the absence of a factorized interface, not a deficit of knowledge.

</details>


### [526] [Embeddings for Preferences, Not Semantics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08360)
*Carter Blair,Ariel D. Procaccia,Milind Tambe*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了AI集体决策中，如何将自由文本意见嵌入向量空间，并提出了偏好相似性（preferential similarity）概念，指出标准语义嵌入因无法区分离散偏好信号与语义干扰（如风格、措辞）而失效，并通过打破相关性的合成训练数据显著提升偏好预测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本嵌入主要衡量语义相似性，但在集体决策场景中，参与者需要根据观点偏好（而非语义相似性）进行距离度量。标准嵌入只能通过语义与偏好之间的相关性间接捕捉偏好，当这种相关性被破坏时（如表达风格不同但观点一致），嵌入效果会显著下降。

Method: 作者首先形式化了偏好相似性与语义相似性之间的相关性问题，将其建模为不变性问题：嵌入模型同时编码了偏好相关信号（立场和价值观）和语义干扰（风格和措辞），两者观测相关。然后提出通过合成训练数据来打破这种相关性，训练得到能够忽略语义干扰、专注偏好信号的评分器，从而优化嵌入空间的距离度量。

Result: 在11个在线讨论数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法显著优于基于余弦相似度的标准嵌入方法，能够更准确地预测参与者的偏好。

Conclusion: 本文揭示了语义嵌入在偏好预测任务中的根本性缺陷（混淆语义干扰与偏好信号），并通过合成数据解耦的方法提供了有效改进方案，为AI驱动的集体决策和公平聚类提供了更可靠的基础。

Abstract: Modern AI is opening the door to collective decision-making in which participants express their views as free-form text rather than voting on a fixed set of candidates. A natural idea is to embed these opinions in a vector space so that the substantial literature on facility location problems and fair clustering can be brought to bear. But standard text embeddings measure semantic similarity, whereas distances in facility location problems and fair clustering require what we call \textit{preferential similarity}: a participant's agreement with a piece of text should be inversely related to their distance from it. Off-the-shelf embeddings inherit a coarse preference signal through a correlation between semantic and preferential similarity, but fail to capture preferences when the correlation breaks. We formalize this as an invariance problem: text embedding models encode both a preference-relevant signal (stance and values) and semantic nuisance (style and wording), and the two are observationally correlated, so a geometry that relies on nuisance can appear preference-correct even when it is not. We show that synthetic training data designed to break this correlation provably shifts the optimal scorer away from nuisance-dominated cosine and significantly improves preference prediction across 11 online deliberation datasets.

</details>


### [527] [On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08368)
*Yuhao Li,Shengchao Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文指出监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）都主要是对预训练模型已有行为进行重新加权（能力激发），而非创造新能力。核心贡献是提出"可达支持集"（accessible support）概念，将后训练分为能力激发（在已有行为空间内重权重）和能力创造（扩展行为空间）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常将SFT视为模仿、RL视为探索发现，但这种粗粒度区分掩盖了关键问题：后训练究竟是在利用模型已有能力，还是在创造新能力？作者希望建立更精确的理论框架来区分这两种情况。

Method: 引入"可达支持集"概念，即模型在有限预算下实际能产生的行为集合。通过自由能视角分析后训练过程：SFT和RL都是对预训练参考分布进行重新加权，区别仅在于外部信号不同（演示信号 vs 奖励信号）。当更新接近基座模型时，主要效应是局部重新加权（能力激发），而非能力创造。

Result: 提出了区分能力激发和能力创造的操作性定义。核心发现：只要训练保持接近预训练模型，SFT和RL本质上都只是重新加权已有行为，不创造新能力。真正的能力创造需要通过搜索、交互、工具使用或吸收新信息来扩展模型的"可达支持集"。

Conclusion: 后训练研究的核心问题不应是"用SFT还是RL"，而应问"这个训练是在重新加权已有行为，还是在扩展模型的可达行为空间？"。这为理解不同后训练方法的本质差异提供了理论框架，也指出了真正需要能力创造时的研究方向。

Abstract: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probability of behaviors the pretrained model could already produce, or whether it changes what the model can practically reach. We argue that post-training research should distinguish between capability elicitation and capability creation. We make this distinction operational by introducing the notion of accessible support: the set of behaviors that a model can practically produce under finite budgets. Post-training that reweights behaviors within this support is capability elicitation; whereas changing the support itself corresponds to capability creation. We develop this argument through a free-energy view of post-training. SFT and RL can both be seen as reweighting a pretrained reference distribution, only with different external signals. Demonstration signals define low-energy behavior for SFT, and reward signals define low-energy behavior for RL. When the update remains close to the base model, the main effect is local reweighting, not capability creation. Within this framework, the central question is no longer whether post-training is framed as SFT or RL, but whether it reweights behaviors already within reach, or instead expands the model's reachable behavioral space through search, interaction, tool use, or the incorporation of new information.

</details>


### [528] [MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08374)
*Junwei Liao,Haoting Shi,Ruiwen Zhou,Jiaqian Wang,Shengtao Zhang,Wei Zhang,Weinan Zhang,Ying Wen,Zhiyu Li,Feiyu Xiong,Bo Tang,Muning Wen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MemQ将TD(λ)资格迹应用于经验图的回溯信用分配，通过DAG结构传播记忆价值，在六个基准测试中取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将每个记忆独立处理，忽略了记忆之间通过依赖链条相互影响的关系，无法合理分配创造新记忆时所用到的旧记忆的贡献。

Method: 提出MemQ方法，将TD(λ)资格迹应用于记忆Q值，通过记录记忆创建时的检索来源构建一个溯源DAG，信用权重按(γλ)^d随DAG深度衰减，并用Exogenous-Context MDP形式化建模。

Result: 在操作系统交互、函数调用、代码生成、多模态推理、具身推理和专家级问答六个基准测试中，MemQ在泛化评估和运行时学习上均取得最高成功率，多步任务提升最大（+5.7pp），单步分类提升最小（+0.77pp）。

Conclusion: 基于DAG结构依赖的信用分配比独立记忆处理更有效，EC-MDP框架为参数选择提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Episodic memory allows LLM agents to accumulate and retrieve experience, but current methods treat each memory independently, i.e., evaluating retrieval quality in isolation without accounting for the dependency chains through which memories enable the creation of future memories. We introduce MemQ, which applies TD($λ$) eligibility traces to memory Q-values, propagating credit backward through a provenance DAG that records which memories were retrieved when each new memory was created. Credit weight decays as $(γλ)^d$ with DAG depth $d$, replacing temporal distance with structural proximity. We formalize the setting as an Exogenous-Context MDP, whose factored transition decouples the exogenous task stream from the endogenous memory store. Across six benchmarks, spanning OS interaction, function calling, code generation, multimodal reasoning, embodied reasoning, and expert-level QA, MemQ achieves the highest success rate on all six in generalization evaluation and runtime learning, with gains largest on multi-step tasks that produce deep and relevant provenance chains (up to +5.7~pp) and smallest on single-step classification (+0.77~pp) where single-step updates already suffice. We further study how $γ$ and $λ$ interact with the EC-MDP structure, providing principled guidance for parameter selection and future research. Code will be available soon.

</details>


### [529] [SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08386)
*Yongliang Miao,Ziyang Yu,Liang Zhao,Bowen Zhu,Hasibul Haque*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillLens提出了一种分层技能演化框架，将技能组织为四层图结构（策略、流程、程序、原语），通过混合粒度检索和局部适应来平衡相关性与成本，在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上提升了任务执行效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能库通常将技能视为扁平的单一粒度模块，导致粗粒度技能注入时引入无关上下文，而重写整个技能成本高昂且不必要，存在相关性与成本之间的张力。

Method: SkillLens将技能组织为四层图（策略、流程、程序、原语），先检索语义相关的技能种子，通过度校正随机游走扩展，再用验证器决定每个单元是接受、分解、重写还是跳过，实现混合粒度复用与局部适应，并通过演化更新不断优化。

Result: 在MuLocbench上Acc@1提升最多6.31个百分点，在ALFWorld上智能体成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。理论分析表明混合粒度适应在稀疏不匹配假设下成本为次线性，演化规则单调提升验证目标至局部最优。

Conclusion: SkillLens通过分层技能组织与混合粒度适应机制，有效平衡了技能复用的相关性与成本，在多个基准上显著优于强基线方法。

Abstract: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

</details>


### [530] [PLACO: A Multi-Stage Framework for Cost-Effective Performance in Human-AI Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08388)
*Pranavkumar Mallela,Vinay Kumar,Shashi Shekhar Jha,Shweta Jain*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在分类任务中如何有效结合人类与AI模型的输出，利用贝叶斯规则在条件独立性假设下，将人类（确定性标签）和模型（概率性标签）的输出进行组合，以提升整体系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当人类和模型各自无法独立达到最优性能时，人-AI协作可提升系统表现。随着生成式AI的普及，许多任务转变为人类-AI协作任务，如何有效结合双方输出成为一个关键问题。

Method: 利用贝叶斯规则，假设人类和模型输出在给定真实标签条件下条件独立，提出一种组合方法，将人类（确定性标注器）与模型（概率性标注器）的输出结合，使用模型的实例级概率和人类的类别级校准概率进行组合。

Result: 该方法能够有效地整合人类和模型的输出，在分类任务中提升整体性能。

Conclusion: 在分类任务中，通过贝叶斯规则结合人类和AI模型的输出（假设条件独立），可以有效利用双方的互补优势，提升系统性能。

Abstract: Human-AI teams play a pivotal role in improving overall system performance when neither the human nor the model can achieve such performance on their own. With the advent of powerful and accessible Generative AI models, several mundane tasks have morphed into Human-AI team tasks. From writing essays to developing advanced algorithms, humans have found that using AI assistance has led to an accelerated work pace like never before. In classification tasks, where the final output is a single hard label, it is crucial to address the combination of human and model output. Prior work elegantly solves this problem using Bayes rule, using the assumption that human and model output are conditionally independent given the ground truth. Specifically, it discusses a combination method to combine a single deterministic labeler (the human) and a probabilistic labeler (the classifier model) using the model's instance-level and the human's class-level calibrated probabilities.

</details>


### [531] [CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08399)
*Ziyang Yu,Qiyue Li,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CoCoDA通过代码DAG结构实现规划器与工具库的协同进化，利用类型化DAG检索在固定上下文预算下高效扩展工具库，使8B学生模型在数学推理等任务上匹配甚至超越32B教师模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具学习方法将工具视为扁平或文本索引的记忆，导致提示成本随库规模线性增长，且忽略了可执行代码的类型化、组合式结构。

Method: 提出CoCoDA框架，构建组合代码DAG（节点为工具，边为调用依赖），推理时通过类型签名统一、描述排序、行为规约过滤、示例消歧进行渐进式检索；训练时将成功轨迹折叠为复合工具，并通过DAG诱导的奖励信号更新规划器。

Result: 在数学推理、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA让8B学生模型在GSM8K和MATH上匹配或超越32B教师模型，并持续优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 类型化DAG结构能有效解耦工具库规模与推理成本，实现工具库与规划器的协同进化，提升小模型的能力上限。

Abstract: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

</details>


### [532] [Belief or Circuitry? Causal Evidence for In-Context Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08405)
*Katharine Kowalyshyn,Timothy Duggan,Daniel Little,Michael C Hughes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过图随机游走任务探究LLM的上下文学习机制，发现模型同时编码全局图拓扑结构和局部转移模式，提出"双重机制"解释：结构推理与归纳回路并行运作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM在上下文学习中究竟是依靠局部模式匹配（复制最近token）还是推断潜在结构（全局拓扑），以理解其底层学习机理。

Method: 设计了一个图随机游走任务，涉及两个竞争图结构；通过PCA重建内部表征、残差流激活修补（activation patching）和图差异干预（graph-difference steering）等技术进行因果分析。

Result: PCA显示中间混合比例下两个图拓扑正交编码于不同主子空间；激活修补实验表明后期层修补几乎完全转移图偏好，线性干预在特定控制条件下有效。

Conclusion: 单一的局部转移复制或全局结构推理均不足以解释LLM的上下文学习，更符合双重机制：结构推断与归纳回路并行运作。

Abstract: How do LLMs learn in-context? Is it by pattern-matching recent tokens, or by inferring latent structure? We probe this question using a toy graph random-walk across two competing graph structures. This task's answer is, in principle, decidable: either the model tracks global topology, or it copies local transitions. We present two lines of evidence that neither account alone is sufficient. First, reconstructing the internal representation structure via PCA reveals that at intermediate mixture ratios, both graph topologies are encoded in orthogonal principal subspaces simultaneously. This pattern is difficult to reconcile with purely local transition copying. Second, residual-stream activation patching and graph-difference steering causally intervene on this graph-family signal: late-layer patching almost fully transfers the clean graph preference, while linear steering moves predictions in the intended direction and fails under norm-matched and label-shuffled controls. Taken together, our findings are most consistent with a dual-mechanism account in which genuine structure inference and induction circuits operate in parallel.

</details>


### [533] [Playing games with knowledge: AI-Induced delusions need game theoretic interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08409)
*Will Beaumaster,Paul Schrater*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 对话AI的谄媚特性会导致理性用户陷入认知固执和错误信念螺旋。本文将此问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价交谈博弈，提出通过"认知中介"机制设计（引入信念版本控制与认知摩擦）打破混合均衡，实现48倍信念螺旋率差异，证明AI认知安全本质是战略信息环境设计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对话AI作为知识接口存在根本缺陷：谄媚的聊天机器人即使对理性主体也会诱发认知固执和妄想性信念螺旋。作者认为问题不在于AI模型本身，而在于从用户驱动的知识搜索到用户与代理人进行战略性、重复性沟通的范式转变所产生的系统性后果。

Method: 将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价交谈博弈：无成本的用户信号导致混合均衡。针对用户满意度优化的代理会产生谄媚策略，对具有相反认知动机的用户类型（探索型θ_G和确认型θ_V）提供相同的强化。在重复博弈下，这种识别失败产生协调陷阱（类似囚徒困境），局部理性反馈循环使用户走向病态确定的错误信念。提出推理时机制设计干预——认知中介，通过引入成本信号（认知摩擦）打破混合均衡，基于用户处理抵抗的不对称认知成本强制类型揭示。核心创新是信念版本控制，一种受git启发的认知元记忆系统，存储健康信念并在检测到验证性抵抗时回滚。

Result: 仿真实验中，该干预实现了分离均衡，达到48倍信念螺旋率差异，同时通过了学习保留标准。

Conclusion: AI的认知安全本质上是战略信息环境设计问题，而非简单的模型对齐问题。

Abstract: Conversational AI has a fundamental flaw as a knowledge interface: sycophantic chatbots induce epistemic entrenchment and delusional belief spirals even in rational agents. We propose the problem does not stem from the AI model, rooted instead in a systemic consequence of the paradigm shift from user-driven knowledge search to users and agents engaged in strategic, repeated-play communication. We formalize the problem as a Crawford-Sobel cheap talk game, where costless user signals induce a pooling equilibrium. Agents optimized for user satisfaction produce sycophantic strategies that provide identical reinforcement across user types with opposite epistemic incentives: exploratory ``Growth-seekers'' ($θ_G$) and confirmatory ``Validation-seekers'' ($θ_V$). Under repeated play, this identification failure creates a coordination trap -- analogous to a Prisoner's Dilemma -- where locally rational feedback loops drive users toward pathologically certain false beliefs. We propose an inference-time mechanism design intervention called an Epistemic Mediator that breaks this pooling equilibrium by introducing a costly signal (epistemic friction), forcing type revelation based on users' asymmetric cognitive costs for processing resistance. A key contribution is Belief Versioning, a git-inspired epistemic meta-memory system that stores healthy beliefs and rollbacks when validation-seeking resistance is detected. In simulation, this intervention achieves a separating equilibrium achieving a $48\times$ differential in spiral rates while passing a learning preservation criterion), evidence that epistemic safety in AI is fundamentally a problem of strategic information environment design rather than simple model alignment.

</details>


### [534] [Political Plasticity: An Analysis of Ideological Adaptability in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08415)
*Bruno Bianchi,Diego Tiscornia,Matias Travizano,Ariel Futoransky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）的"政治可塑性"——即模型根据用户提供的上下文调整其政治立场的能力。通过包含200个政治问题的测试框架，发现系统提示效果有限，而用户提示能显著改变模型的经济自由轴立场。验证实验揭示了模型可能存在的训练数据泄露问题，同时不同语言下的可塑性表现出微妙差异。结论是：小型和旧模型表现出不稳定或有限的政治可塑性，而更新的前沿模型则展现出可靠且符合预期的适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLMs的固有偏见，但较少探讨模型能否根据用户上下文动态调整政治立场（即"政治可塑性"）。本研究旨在填补这一空白，系统性地评估LLMs在不同诱导方式下的政治立场可塑性。

Method: 基于Lester（1996）的框架，构建了包含200个政治问题的测试语料，覆盖经济自由和个人自由两个维度。通过系统提示（简化版与主题版）和用户提示（含少样本示例）两种方式诱导模型产生政治偏向，并进一步通过反向问题验证和跨语言实验进行分析。

Result: 系统提示效果有限；用户提示显著改变了模型的政治立场，尤其是经济自由轴上的大型和新型模型。反向问题验证揭示了大多数模型出现反直觉的立场偏移，暗示存在数据泄露。跨语言实验显示不同语言下模型可塑性存在细微但显著的差异。

Conclusion: 小型和旧版本LLMs的政治可塑性较低或不稳定，而新一代前沿模型表现出可靠且预期的适应性。研究还提示了模型可能存在的训练数据泄露问题。

Abstract: Since the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), a significant area of research has focused on their intrinsic biases, particularly in political discourse. This study investigates a different but related concept, "political plasticity", which is defined as the capacity of models to adapt their responses based on the user supplied context. To analyze this, a testing framework was developed using an expanded corpus of 200 politically-oriented questions across economic and personal freedom axes, based on a prior framework by Lester (1996). The study explored several methods to induce political bias, including simplified and topic-based system prompts, as well as user prompts with few-shot examples. The results show that while system prompts were largely ineffective, user prompts successfully elicited significant ideological shifts, particularly along the Economic Freedom axis in larger and newer models. Through a validation experiment, we examined whether models answer questionnaires by recognizing the underlying question format. Inverting the sense of the questions revealed unexpected, counter-intuitive shifts in most models, suggesting potential data leakage. Finally, we also analyzed how model plasticity varies when the experiment is conducted in different languages. The results reveal subtle yet notable shifts across each of the analyzed languages. Overall, our results indicate that small and older LLMs exhibit limited or unstable political plasticity, whereas newer frontier models display reliable, expected adaptability.

</details>


### [535] [Alignment as Jurisprudence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08416)
*Nicholas Caputo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了法学（法官如何正确判案）与AI对齐（让AI符合人类价值观）之间的共同结构，通过比较德沃金的解释主义、桑斯坦的类比推理法学与宪法AI、基于案例的推理等对齐方法，提出两个领域可以互相借鉴，并随着AI能力提升和传统法学约束松动，这种对话将愈发重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法学与AI对齐看似遥远，但都面临如何预测和塑造强大决策者（法官/AI）在未来未知情况下的行为这一根本问题，且都使用语言规范与解释作为工具。作者希望将两个领域直接对话，互相借鉴。

Method: 本文采用跨学科比较分析方法，将德沃金的原则导向解释主义和桑斯坦的类比推理法学与宪法AI、基于案例的推理等对齐技术进行对照，分析规则与案例在微调对齐中的相互作用。

Result: 发现法律领域中规则与案例的互动经验可以为AI对齐提供更精细的方法论，同时AI对齐技术的发展也可以帮助更深入地理解法律运作机制和改进法律实践。

Conclusion: AI系统与法律应以赋能人为核心目标，随着AI能力持续提升和法律理论对法官的传统约束逐渐松动，两个领域的对话将日益必要，有望推动两者共同进步。

Abstract: Jurisprudence, the study of how judges should properly decide cases, and alignment, the science of getting AI models to conform to human values, share a fundamental structure. These seemingly distant fields both seek to predict and shape how decisions by powerful actors, in one case judges and in the other increasingly powerful artificial intelligences, will be made in the unknown future. And they use similar tools of the specification and interpretation of language to try to accomplish those goals. The great debates of jurisprudence, about what the law is and what it should be, can provide insight into alignment, and lessons from what does and does not work in alignment can help make progress in jurisprudence.
  This essay puts the two fields directly into conversation. Drawing on leading accounts of jurisprudence, particularly Dworkin's principle-oriented interpretivism and Sunstein's positivist account of law as analogical reasoning, and on cutting-edge alignment approaches, namely Constitutional AI and case-based reasoning, it illustrates the value of a more sophisticated legally-inspired approach to the interplay of rules and cases in finetuning alignment and points to ways that AI can provide a better understanding of how the law works and how it can be improved by the introduction of AI. AI systems and the law should operate to empower people to act in the world, helping to expand their capabilities and the extent to which they are able to achieve their goals. As AI continues to improve in capacity, and as the constraints that legal theory places on human judges seem be coming undone, the conversation between these two fields will become increasingly essential and may help point to a better version of both.

</details>


### [536] [The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08427)
*Gabriele La Malfa,Emanuele La Malfa,Saar Cohen,Jie M. Zhang,Michael Luck,Michael Wooldridge,Elizabeth Black*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出现有自对弈红队方法在参数共享下会收敛到平凡策略（如始终拒绝），攻击者无法对防御者施加真正的对抗压力。提出锚定双策略自对弈（Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play），在冻结基模型上训练角色特定的LoRA适配器，实现角色分离。相比标准自对弈，参数效率提升高达100倍，安全性能持续改善，在Qwen2.5系列模型上验证了鲁棒性提升且不损失推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自对弈红队方法中，攻击者与防御者共享相同参数，导致动态坍缩为自一致性，攻击无法对防御者施加真正的对抗压力。此外，可达的纳什均衡仅对应"始终拒绝"等平凡策略，限制了实际应用价值。

Method: 提出Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play（ABSP），在冻结的基模型上为攻击者和防御者分别训练角色特定的LoRA适配器，通过显式的角色分离维持对抗压力，同时保持优化稳定性。

Result: 相比标准自对弈微调，参数效率提升高达100倍；在Qwen2.5-{3B,7B,14B}-IT模型上的安全基准测试中持续改善安全性能，且不损失推理能力；交叉对弈实验表明攻击者和防御者模型在对战防御和安全性上均优于自对弈。

Conclusion: ABSP通过角色分离的LoRA适配器有效解决了自对弈红队中参数共享带来的理论缺陷和实际限制，实现了更高效、更安全的AI对齐训练范式。

Abstract: Self-play red team is an established approach to improving AI safety in which different instances of the same model play attacker and defender roles in a zero-sum game, i.e., where the attacker tries to jailbreak the defender; if self-play converges to a Nash equilibrium, the model is guaranteed to respond safely within the settings of the game. Although the parameter sharing enforced by the use of the same model for the two roles improves stability and performance, it introduces fundamental theoretical and architectural limitations. We show that the set of Nash equilibria that can be reached corresponds to a broad class of behaviours that includes trivial always refuse strategies and oracle-like defenders, thus limiting practical applicability. We then show that when attacker and defender share and update the same base model, the dynamics collapse to self-consistency, so that attacks do not enforce adversarial pressure on the defender. In response, we propose Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play, which trains distinct role-specific LoRA adapters on top of a frozen base model, thereby maintaining stable optimisation while preserving adversarial pressure through explicit role separation. In relation to standard self-play, we show up to 100x greater parameter efficiency than finetuning and consistent improvements in safety compared to self-play fine-tuned models. We evaluate on Qwen2.5-{3B, 7B,14B}-IT models across widely used safety benchmarks, showing improved robustness without loss of reasoning ability. Cross-play experiments further show that our attacker and defender models are superior to self-play in terms of adversarial defence and safety.

</details>


### [537] [Measuring What Matters: Benchmarking Generative, Multimodal, and Agentic AI in Healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08445)
*Prasanna Desikan,Harshit Rajgarhia,Shivali Dalmia,Ananya Mantravadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出当前医疗AI基准测试存在系统性缺陷：现有基准多测试模型的知识记忆能力，而非在真实临床环境中的可靠性、安全性和实用性。模型在考试类基准上表现优异，但在实际临床任务中性能显著下降，且高基准分数造成部署就绪的虚假安全感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗AI系统正被部署到真实的临床环境中，但缺乏系统化的方法来衡量其在复杂、高风险工作流中的可靠性、安全性和临床相关性。现有基准测试与实际临床需求之间存在巨大鸿沟。

Method: 通过分析现有基准测试的局限性（如MedHELM案例），揭示了基准分数与实际临床性能之间的差距，提出了需要建立有原则的基准设计框架。

Result: 模型在临床任务上的表现远低于考试基准：文档任务0.74-0.85，临床决策支持0.61-0.76，行政与工作流任务仅0.53-0.63。高考试分数与实际性能之间存在显著落差。

Conclusion: 当前基准测试框架存在根本性缺陷，无法区分临床性能低下是模型本身的局限还是测量方法的失败。需要建立系统化的基准设计原则来弥合性能与实用性之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: AI models are increasingly deployed in live clinical environments where they must perform reliably across complex, high-stakes workflows that standard training and validation datasets were never designed to capture. Evaluating these systems requires benchmarks: structured combinations of tasks, datasets, and metrics that enable reproducible, comparable measurement of what a model can do. The central challenge in healthcare AI is not performance alone, but the absence of systematic methods to measure reliability, safety, and clinical relevance under real-world conditions. Most existing benchmarks test what a model knows; too few test whether it can perform reliably and without failing across the full complexity of real clinical tasks. Current benchmarks have accumulated through ad hoc dataset construction optimized for narrow task performance: frontier models achieve near-perfect scores on medical licensing examinations, but when evaluated across real clinical tasks, performance degrades sharply, scoring 0.74--0.85 on documentation, 0.61--0.76 on clinical decision support, and only 0.53--0.63 on administrative and workflow tasks \cite{medhelm}. High benchmark scores give a false sense of deployment readiness, and the gap between performance and utility widens precisely as AI systems take on more consequential clinical roles. Without a principled framework for benchmark design, the field cannot determine whether poor clinical performance reflects model limitations or failures in how performance is being measured.

</details>


### [538] [LLM-guided Semi-Supervised Approaches for Social Media Crisis Data Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08448)
*Jacob Ativo,Bharaneeshwar Balasubramaniyam,Anh Tran,Khushboo Gupta,Hongmin Li,Doina Caragea,Cornelia Caragea*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文首次评估了LLM引导的半监督学习在灾难相关推文分类中的效果，发现LG-CoTrain在少量标注样本场景下显著优于传统方法，且紧凑的半监督模型有时能超越大型LLM的零样本性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索利用大语言模型引导的半监督学习方法，以提升在灾难管理场景中社交媒体数据（尤其是危机相关推文）的分类效果，解决标注数据稀缺的问题。

Method: 对比了两种LLM辅助的半监督方法（VerifyMatch和LG-CoTrain）与经典半监督基线方法，在每类仅5、10、25个标注样本的低资源设置下，对危机推文分类任务进行实证评估。

Result: LG-CoTrain在低资源设置下平均Macro F1最高，显著优于经典方法；VerifyMatch性能具有竞争力且校准性良好。随着标注样本增多，Self Training成为强基线。紧凑的半监督模型有时优于大型LLM的零样本性能。

Conclusion: LLM引导的半监督学习能够将知识从大模型迁移到更轻量、可部署的小模型中，为实际灾难响应应用提供了可行的路径。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning approaches have been investigated as a means to enhance the analysis of social media data in disaster management contexts. In this work, we present the first empirical evaluation of large language model (LLM) guided semi-supervised learning for crisis related tweet classification. We compare two recent LLM assisted semi-supervised methods, VerifyMatch and LLM guided Co-Training ( LG-CoTrain), against established semi-supervised baselines. Our results show that LG-CoTrain significantly outperforms classical semi-supervised approaches in low resource settings with 5, 10 and 25 labeled examples per class, achieving the highest averaged Macro F1 across events. VerifyMatch achieves competitive performance while also demonstrating strong calibration properties. As the number of labeled examples increases, the performance gap narrows and Self Training emerges as a strong baseline. We further observe that compact semi-supervised models can, in some cases, outperform very large LLMs operating in zero-shot settings. This finding highlights the potential of transferring knowledge from LLMs into smaller and more deployable models through LLM guided semi-supervised learning, offering a practical pathway for real world disaster response applications. Our project repository on Github is here.

</details>


### [539] [Behavioral Determinants of Deployed AI Agents in Social Networks: A Multi-Factor Study of Personality, Model, and Guardrail Specification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08463)
*Sarah Wilson,Diem Linh Dang,Usman Ali Moazzam,Shan Ye,Gail Kaiser*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过13个AI Agent在模拟社交平台上的对照实验，发现人格设定(SOUL.md)对社交行为影响最大，模型基座和操作规则影响较小但显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主AI Agent越来越多地部署在开放社交环境中，但配置规范与涌现社交行为之间的关系尚不清楚。

Method: 在Molotbook（模拟Reddit的社交平台）上部署13个OpenClaw Agent，系统性地改变三个自变量：人格设定(SOUL.md)、LLM模型基座、操作规则与记忆配置(AGENTS.md)，收集行为、语言和社交指标进行分析。

Result: 人格设定是主导行为杠杆，导致Agent间回复长度出现巨大差异；模型基座和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与广度产生中等但显著的影响。

Conclusion: 为多Agent社交系统的涌现行为提供了实证证据，并为设计用于真实社交环境的协作或监控Agent提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Autonomous AI agents are increasingly deployed in open social environments, yet the relationship between their configuration specifications and their emergent social behavior remains poorly understood. We present a controlled, multi-factor empirical study in which thirteen OpenClaw agents are deployed on Moltbook -- a Reddit-like social network built for AI agents -- across three systematically varied independent variables: (1) personality specification via SOUL.md, (2) underlying LLM model backbone, and (3) operational rules and memory configuration via AGENTS.md. A default control agent provides a behavioral baseline. Over a one-week observation window spanning approximately 400 autonomous sessions per agent, we collect behavioral, linguistic, and social metrics to assess how configuration layers predict emergent social behavior. We find that personality specification is the dominant behavioral lever, producing a massive spread in response length across agents, while model backbone and operational rules drive more moderate but still meaningful effects on rhetorical style and topic engagement breadth. Our findings contribute empirical evidence to the emerging literature on deployed multi-agent social systems and offer practical guidance for designing agents intended for collaborative or monitoring tasks in real social environments.

</details>


### [540] [Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08472)
*Aswin RRV,Jacob Dineen,Divij Handa,Mihir Parmar,Ben Zhou,Swaroop Mishra,Chitta Baral*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出在强化学习训练前，利用自生成的多解法数据对LLM进行中段训练，显著提升了后续RL在数学推理、代码生成等任务上的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL在LLM中的效果受限于训练数据的多样性，尤其是推理问题往往存在多种解法，仅接触有限范围的解法会限制RL的有效性。作者希望探索如何通过数据多样性来提升后续RL训练的效果。

Method: 采用George Polya问题解决框架指导的自举式数据生成方法，为每个训练问题生成多种正确解法的变体，然后进行中段微调，之后再执行RL训练。同时提供了理论分析，说明中段训练如何通过策略梯度更新激励多种方法的组合。

Result: 在多个数学推理基准测试、代码生成和叙事推理等OOD任务上，经中段数据初始化的RL模型均取得了一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: 语言模型通过学习多种问题解决方法（通过自生成数据）能够有效帮助后续的强化学习训练，提升模型在各类推理任务上的泛化能力。

Abstract: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models (LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL. In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely on different forms of reasoning, and exposure to only a limited range of such approaches in the training data may limit the effectiveness of RL. Motivated by this, we investigate using diverse self-generated data during mid-training as an intermediate step before RL training. Specifically, we adopt a bootstrapped data-generation framework guided by George Polya's problem-solving approaches for generating multiple variants of correct answers for each question in the training data, and then perform fine-tuning. We first provide a theoretical perspective on how mid-training on such data improves RL and explain how policy-gradient updates can incentivize combining multiple approaches. We then empirically demonstrate that RL-trained models initialized with our mid-training data achieve consistent improvements across various mathematical reasoning benchmarks and other OOD tasks like code generation and narrative reasoning. Overall, our investigative study shows that a language model learning multiple problem-solving approaches, through self-generated data helps subsequent RL.

</details>


### [541] [AI-Care: A Conversational Agentic System for Task Coordination in Alzheimer's Disease Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08480)
*Preyash Yadav,Michelle Cohn,Priyanka Koppolu,Hritvik Agarwal,Amey Gohil,Tejas Patil,Sasha Pimento,Alyssa Weakley*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AI-Care，一个基于对话式智能代理的语音交互系统，构建在远程照护平台之上，旨在降低阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症患者在管理日常事务（如设置日历提醒、整理待办清单）时的认知负担。系统采用LangGraph状态化编排架构，通过安全过滤、意图分类、上下文加载、安全检查、确定性槽位收集、工具执行和响应合成等流程处理请求。关键安全响应（如用药与过敏信息）基于照护者验证的记录而非模型自由生成。初步试点（4名轻中度AD/ADRD患者）表明用户认为系统可信、胜任且讨人喜欢，并能通过对话完成评估的协调任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AD/ADRD患者因记忆和思维能力变化，难以独立使用数字日常管理工具（如数字日历需要多步骤操作）。现有方案缺乏针对该群体认知障碍的适配，亟需一种降低认知负担的交互方式。

Method: 构建AI-Care系统：1) 基于LangGraph的状态化编排架构，包含输入清洗、意图分类、上下文加载、安全检查、确定性槽位填充、工具执行和响应合成等阶段；2) 安全关键信息（药物、过敏等）基于照护者验证的记录；3) 支持多轮澄清处理不完整或模糊请求；4) 支持语音和文本输入，通过ElevenLabs实现语音输出，长响应分块合成避免仓促播放。

Result: 对4名轻中度AD/ADRD患者的初步试点显示：用户认为系统可信、胜任且讨人喜欢，能够通过对话完成评估的协调任务。

Conclusion: AI-Care通过对话式AI有效降低了AD/ADRD患者使用数字工具的认知障碍，其安全设计（基于验证记录而非模型生成关键信息）和人性化交互（多轮澄清、语音输出分块）为同类系统提供了参考。但样本量极小，需更大规模验证。

Abstract: Individuals with Alzheimer's disease (AD) and Alzheimer's disease-related dementia (ADRD) experience memory and thinking changes that impact their ability to use digital daily management tools. For example, adding an event to a digital calendar requires multiple steps that may act as barriers to independent use for individuals with AD/ADRD. This paper presents AI-Care, a conversational agentic artificial intelligence (AI) layer built on top of a remote caregiving platform co-designed with people with AD/ADRD. AI-Care is designed to reduce the cognitive load on individuals with AD/ADRD when managing everyday tasks such as setting calendar reminders and organizing to-do lists through natural-language interaction with a voice-first chatbot. The system uses a LangGraph-based stateful orchestration approach in which each request passes through sanitization, intent classification, context loading, safety checks, deterministic slot collection, tool execution, and response composition. Safety-critical responses, particularly around medications and allergies, are grounded in caregiver-verified records rather than free-form model generation. The system does not make autonomous medical or treatment decisions. Incomplete or ambiguous requests are handled through controlled multi-turn clarification rather than silent failure or guessing. The system supports both typed and spoken input, with voice output through ElevenLabs text-to-speech. Longer responses are chunked before synthesis to avoid rushed playback. A preliminary pilot with four individuals with mild-to-moderate AD/ADRD showed that users found the system trustworthy, competent, and likable, and were able to complete the evaluated coordination tasks through conversation. We describe the design goals, system architecture, safety controls, and findings from this formative evaluation.

</details>


### [542] [Latent Personality Alignment: Improving Harmlessness Without Mentioning Harms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08496)
*Linh Le,David Williams-King,Mohamed Amine Merzouk,Aton Kamanda,Adam Oberman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，利用不到100个人格特质语句和潜在对抗训练，在仅使用极少量数据的情况下达到甚至超越传统需15万+样本的对抗鲁棒方法，并在未见攻击分布上泛化能力提升2.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型对抗鲁棒性方法需要海量有害提示样本（数千至数十万），且仍易受新攻击向量和分布偏移影响，亟需一种样本高效且泛化能力强的防御方法。

Method: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA），通过训练模型学习抽象人格特质而非具体有害行为，使用不到100个特质陈述进行潜在对抗训练。

Result: LPA仅用<100个样本即达到需15万+样本方法的攻击成功率，在六个危害基准上误分类率降低2.6倍，且保持更优的实用性。

Conclusion: 基于人格的对齐方法为构建低成本、高鲁棒性的防御提供了一种原则性方案，在样本效率和泛化能力上显著优于传统方法。

Abstract: Current adversarial robustness methods for large language models require extensive datasets of harmful prompts (thousands to hundreds of thousands of examples), yet remain vulnerable to novel attack vectors and distributional shifts. We propose Latent Personality Alignment (LPA), a sample-efficient defense that achieves robustness by training models on abstract personality traits rather than specific harmful behaviors. Using fewer than 100 trait statements and latent adversarial training, LPA achieves comparable attack success rates to methods trained on 150k+ examples, while maintaining superior utility. Critically, LPA generalizes better to unseen attack distributions, reducing misclassification rates by 2.6x compared to baseline across six harm benchmarks -- without ever seeing harmful examples during training. Our results demonstrate that personality-based alignment offers a principled approach to building robust defenses with minimal cost.

</details>


### [543] [OracleTSC: Oracle-Informed Reward Hurdle and Uncertainty Regularization for Traffic Signal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08516)
*Darryl Jacob,Xinyu Liu,Muchao Ye,Xiaoyong Yuan,Pan He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出OracleTSC，通过奖励门槛机制和不确定性正则化稳定LLM在交通信号控制中的强化学习微调，在LibSignal基准上实现旅行时间减少75%、队列长度减少67%，并展现出跨路口泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于强化学习的交通信号控制方法像黑箱一样缺乏可解释性，难以获得公众信任。虽然LLM能提供自然语言推理，但强化微调过程中存在反馈稀疏延迟、多数动作对拥堵指标影响微弱等问题，导致训练不稳定。

Method: OracleTSC包含两个核心机制：(1) 奖励门槛机制——通过减去校准阈值过滤弱学习信号；(2) 不确定性正则化——最大化所选响应的概率以鼓励跨采样输出的一致决策。

Result: 在LibSignal基准上，基于LLaMA3-8B的模型旅行时间减少75%，队列长度减少67%；跨路口泛化实验中，无需额外微调即实现旅行时间降低17%、队列长度降低39%。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的奖励塑形能够提升交通信号控制中强化微调的稳定性和有效性，在保持可解释性的同时显著提升交通效率。

Abstract: Transparent decision-making is essential for traffic signal control (TSC) systems to earn public trust. However, traditional reinforcement learning-based TSC methods function as black boxes with limited interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) can provide natural language reasoning, reinforcement finetuning for TSC remains unstable because feedback is sparse and delayed, while most actions produce only marginal changes in congestion metrics. We introduce OracleTSC, which stabilizes LLM-based TSC through two mechanisms: (1) a reward hurdle mechanism that filters weak learning signals by subtracting a calibrated threshold from environmental rewards, and (2) uncertainty regularization that maximizes the probability of the selected response to encourage consistent decisions across sampled outputs. Experiments on the LibSignal benchmark show that OracleTSC enables a compact LLaMA3-8B model to substantially improve traffic efficiency, achieving a 75% reduction in travel time and a 67% decrease in queue length compared with the pretrained baseline while preserving interpretability through natural language explanations. OracleTSC also demonstrates strong cross-intersection generalization: a policy trained on one intersection transfers to a structurally different intersection with 17% lower travel time and 39% lower queue length without additional finetuning. These results suggest that uncertainty-aware reward shaping can improve the stability and effectiveness of reinforcement fine-tuning for TSC.

</details>


### [544] [Results and Retrospective Analysis of the CODS 2025 AssetOpsBench Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08518)
*Dhaval Patel,Chathurangi Shyalika,Suryanarayana Reddy Yarrabothula,Ling Yue,Shuxin Lin,Nianjun Zhou,James Rayfield*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文回顾了CODS 2025的AssetOps Live挑战赛，分析了公共排行榜饱和、隐藏评估改变结论、TMatch项数值惰性、操作账户化但实质团队化、成功执行方法多改进护栏而非新颖架构等五个关键发现，并提出了规模感知复合指标、技能水平诊断和版本化工件发布的建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 竞赛回顾有助于揭示排行榜测量了什么、隐藏评估如何改变结论以及哪些设计模式得到了奖励，作者希望通过分析CODS 2025的AssetOps Live挑战赛来提供这些洞见。

Method: 作者结合了最终排名表、300次提交的服务器日志、149支队伍注册信息、最佳提交导出、组织者获奖报告、配套系统论文以及验证过的规划跟踪源代码树等多源数据进行分析。

Result: 五个关键发现：(1)公共计划排行榜饱和度72.73%；(2)隐藏评估改变结论，计划相关性r=0.69，执行相关性r=-0.13；(3)TMatch项在官方复合指标中数值上几乎惰性；(4)操作上账户化但实质上团队化，149个注册队伍缩减为24个有非零公共分数的队伍和11个完全排名的队伍；(5)成功执行方法主要改进护栏机制而非新颖架构。

Conclusion: 这些发现识别了评估奖励的行为，并推动了规模感知复合指标、技能水平诊断和版本化工件发布的需求。

Abstract: Competition retrospectives are useful when they explain what a leaderboard measured, how hidden evaluation changed conclusions, and which design patterns were rewarded. We revisit the CODS 2025 \assetopslive{} challenge, a privacy-aware Codabench competition on industrial multi-agent orchestration built on \assetops{}. We combine final rank sheets, a 300-submission server log, 149-team registrations, best-submission exports, the organizer winners report, the companion \assetopslive{} system paper, and verified planning-track source trees. Five results stand out. First, the public planning leaderboard saturates at 72.73\%, and richer prompts do not improve that peak. Second, hidden evaluation changes the story: public and private scores correlate moderately in planning ($r{=}0.69$) but negatively in execution ($r{=}{-}0.13$), with several 45.45\% public execution systems reaching 63.64\% on the hidden set. Third, the \tmatch{} term is numerically almost inert in the official composite -- combined on a 0--1 scale with 0--100 percentage scores, it contributes at most 0.05 points per track, and rescaling would swap the top two teams. Fourth, the competition is operationally account-based but substantively team-based: 149 registered teams reduce to 24 with non-zero public scores and 11 fully ranked, while 52.3\% of deduplicated registrations list multiple usernames. Fifth, successful execution methods mostly improve guardrails -- response selection, contamination cleanup, fallback, and context control -- rather than novel agent architectures. These findings identify which behaviors the evaluation rewarded, and motivate scale-aware composites, skill-level diagnostics, and versioned artifact release.

</details>


### [545] [Human-LLM Dialogue Improves Diagnostic Accuracy in Emergency Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08533)
*Burcu Sayin,Ngoc Vo Hong,Ipek Baris Schlicht,Jacopo Staiano,Pasquale Minervini,Sara Allievi,Nicola Susca,Nicola Osti,Alberto Maino,Vito Racanelli,Andrea Passerini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍MedSyn系统，让医生在急诊场景下通过迭代查询LLM来辅助诊断。7名医生在52个MIMIC-IV病例上进行实验，结果显示住院医师在困难病例上的诊断正确率从0.589提升至0.734，交互式LLM支持能有效增强诊断推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 急诊医学临床决策要求在不确定性下快速准确诊断。虽然LLMs在基准测试中表现不错，但它们作为交互式辅助工具在真实医生工作流程中的证据仍然缺乏。

Method: 开发MedSyn系统，医生可迭代查询LLM（LLM可获取完整临床记录，但医生初始仅查看主诉）。7名医生（3名高级、4名住院医师）在52个MIMIC-IV病例上完成基线会话和AI辅助会话，病例按难度分层。采用盲法评估和自动化指标进行评价。

Result: 住院医师困难病例正确率从0.589升至0.734；标准化完全正确率显示中等效应（Δ=0.092; p=0.071; d=0.47）。标准化any-match准确率提升0.156（p<0.0001），住院医师F1增益最大（Δ=0.138; p<0.0001）。对话分析显示高级医师采用目标导向、假设驱动的提问策略，住院医师则依赖更宽泛的查询；跨专业知识一致性增加（Δ=0.145; p<0.0001）。

Conclusion: 交互式LLM支持能够有意义地增强医生的诊断推理能力，尤其对住院医师帮助更大，且能缩小不同经验水平医生之间的诊断差距。

Abstract: Clinical decision-making in emergency medicine demands rapid, accurate diagnoses under uncertainty. Despite benchmark progress, evidence for LLMs as interactive aids in live physician workflows remains sparse. MedSyn lets physicians iteratively query an LLM provided with the full clinical record while initially viewing only the chief complaint. Seven physicians (three seniors, four residents) completed baseline and AI-assisted sessions across 52 MIMIC-IV cases stratified by difficulty. Blinded evaluation showed residents' Hard-case correctness rose from 0.589 to 0.734; difficulty-standardised completely-correct rates confirmed a medium effect (Δ = 0.092; p = 0.071; d = 0.47). Automated metrics corroborated these gains: standardised any-match accuracy improved by 0.156 (p < 0.0001), and residents showed the largest F1 gain (Δ = 0.138; p < 0.0001). Dialogue analysis revealed expertise-dependent strategies (seniors asked targeted, hypothesis-driven questions; residents relied on broader queries) and cross-expertise concordance increased (Δ = 0.145; p < 0.0001). Interactive LLM support meaningfully enhances diagnostic reasoning.

</details>


### [546] [Human-Inspired Memory Architecture for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08538)
*Doga Kerestecioglu,Alexei Robsky,Clemens Vasters,Anshul Sharma,Yitzhak Kesselman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受生物启发的六机制记忆架构，用于解决LLM智能体在长程交互中的持久记忆问题，并通过合成标定方法避免数据泄露。在VSCode问题追踪数据集上，去重整合实现了97.2%的保留精度和58%的存储缩减；在LongMemEval基准上，匹配了原始检索精度（70.1% vs 71.2%），并在S-tier规模下偏好召回率提升13.3个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体缺乏管理跨长交互时间线持久记忆的原则性机制，解决朴素记忆累积的失败模式。

Method: 提出由六种认知机制组成的生物启发式记忆架构：睡眠期整合、基于干扰的遗忘、印记成熟、检索后再巩固、实体知识图谱、混合多线索检索；并引入一种无需暴露基准数据的合成标定方法学。

Result: VSCode数据集：去重整合实现97.2%保留精度、58%存储缩减（比基线高21.8 pp）。LongMemEval：200K token预算下匹配原始检索精度（70.1% vs 71.2%，95% CI重叠），S-tier规模下偏好召回率提升13.3 pp。

Conclusion: 提出的记忆架构能有效管理长程持久记忆，在保持高检索精度的同时显著减少存储开销，且具有可调精度-存储曲线，为LLM智能体提供更可靠的记忆管理机制。

Abstract: Current LLM agents lack principled mechanisms for managing persistent memory across long interaction horizons. We present a biologically-grounded memory architecture comprising six cognitive mechanisms: (1) sleep-phase consolidation, (2) interference-based forgetting, (3) engram maturation, (4) reconsolidation upon retrieval, (5) entity knowledge graphs, and (6) hybrid multi-cue retrieval. Each mechanism addresses a specific failure mode of naive memory accumulation. We introduce a synthetic calibration methodology that derives all pipeline thresholds without benchmark data exposure, eliminating a common source of evaluation leakage. We evaluate on two benchmarks. First, a VSCode issue-tracking dataset (13K issues, 120K events) where deduplication-based consolidation achieves 97.2% retention precision with 58% store reduction (+21.8 pp over baseline). Second, the LongMemEval personal-chat benchmark where we conduct the first streaming M-tier evaluation (475 sessions, ~540K unique turns). At a 200K-token context budget, our pipeline matches raw retrieval accuracy (70.1% vs. 71.2%, overlapping 95% CI) while exposing a tunable accuracy/store-size operating curve. At S-tier scale (50 sessions), dedup-based consolidation yields a +13.3 pp improvement in preference recall.

</details>


### [547] [Log analysis is necessary for credible evaluation of AI agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08545)
*Peter Kirgis,Sayash Kapoor,Stephan Rabanser,Nitya Nadgir,Cozmin Ududec,Magda Dubois,JJ Allaire,Conrad Stosz,Marius Hobbhahn,Jacob Steinhardt,Arvind Narayanan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证了日志分析对于AI agent可信评估的必要性，通过系统追踪agent的输入、执行和输出，可解决当前基准测试仅报告最终结果（通过/失败）导致的三种效度威胁：分数膨胀/缩水、无法预测实际效用、掩盖危险行为。作者提出了效度威胁分类法、日志分析指导原则，并通过tau-Bench Airline实验证明pass^5性能被低估近50%，还发现了部署中不可见的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI agent基准测试仅报告最终结果（通过/失败），这种评估方式存在三种效度威胁：1）分数可能因捷径和基准伪影而被夸大或低估，歪曲真实能力；2）由于框架限制和重复失败模式，基准性能无法预测实际效用；3）能力分数可能掩盖agent的危险或灾难性行为。因此需要引入日志分析来克服这些问题。

Method: 1）提出了通过日志分析记录文档化的评估效度威胁分类法；2）制定了一套日志分析指导原则；3）在tau-Bench Airline基准上应用这些原则进行实验验证。

Result: 在tau-Bench Airline上，pass^5性能被低估了近50%，同时发现了在传统结果指标中不可见的部署失败模式。

Conclusion: 日志分析是确保AI agent评估可信度的必要手段。作者向基准创建者、模型开发者、独立评估者和部署者等不同利益相关者提出了增加日志分析采纳的实用建议。

Abstract: Agent benchmarks typically report only final outcomes: pass or fail. This threatens evaluation credibility in three ways. First, scores may be inflated or deflated by shortcuts and benchmark artifacts, misrepresenting capability. Second, benchmark performance may fail to predict real-world utility due to scaffold limitations and recurring failure modes. Finally, capability scores may conceal dangerous or catastrophic actions taken by the agent. We argue that log analysis -- the systematic tracking and analysis of the inputs, execution, and outputs of an AI agent -- is necessary to overcome these validity threats and promote credible agent evaluation. In this paper, we (1) present a taxonomy of threats to credible evaluation documented through log analysis, and (2) develop a set of guiding principles for log analysis. We illustrate these principles on tau-Bench Airline, revealing that pass^5 performance was under-elicited by nearly 50% and surfacing deployment failure modes invisible to outcome metrics. We conclude with pragmatic recommendations to increase uptake of log analysis, directed at diverse stakeholders including benchmark creators, model developers, independent evaluators, and deployers.

</details>


### [548] [Evaluating Developmental Cognition Capabilities of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08549)
*Xiao Xiao,Hayoun Noh,Mar Gonzalez-Franco*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文引入基于Kegan发展理论的"发展性句子完成测试"(DSCT)来评估对话AI中用户如何理解和建构现实，发现顶尖模型能准确识别模拟人格的信号，但与人类标注者一致性中等，且模型自身回答呈现家族性阶段性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话AI个性化主要围绕用户偏好、历史、目标等维度，但很少关注用户如何解释和吸收模型输出以建构自身现实。作者希望借助Kegan的建构-发展理论作为补充视角，但传统评估方法（专家访谈、句子完成测试）要么不可规模化，要么专有、冗长或有侵入性。

Method: 开发了20题的DSCT（发展性句子完成测试），在三种响应模式下评估LLM恢复发展性信号的能力：(1)模拟人格 (2)真实人类被试 (3)模型默认生成回答。

Result: 顶尖模型在模拟人格上准确率高；对人类作答的LLM-人类一致性中等，邻近阶段一致性远强于精确匹配；不同模型家族的回答呈现稳定的阶段性差异，更大更新的模型倾向于生成评级更高的文本。

Conclusion: 阶段条件信号在合成响应中比人类书面文本更干净；发展感知对话AI的核心约束并非分类器准确率，而是从文本中获取发展性信号的可得性。

Abstract: Conversational AI is increasingly personalized around users' preferences, histories, goals, and knowledge, but much less around how users interpret and take up model outputs to construct and understand their reality. We draw on Robert Kegan's constructive-developmental theory as a complementary lens on this dimension. Existing methods for assessing developmental stage in the Keganian tradition rely either on expert interviews that do not scale or on sentence-completion instruments that are proprietary, lengthy, or invasive. To make this perspective tractable for LLM evaluation, we introduce the Developmental Sentence Completion Test (DSCT), a 20-item instrument designed to elicit developmental signal in self-administered text. Throughout, we treat the resulting labels as characterizations of stage-like structure in elicited responses, not as validated person-level developmental stage. We then ask how much of that signal can be recovered by LLMs across three elicited response regimes: simulated personas, real human respondents, and default model-generated answers.
  On simulated personas, top frontier models recover simulator-intended labels with high accuracy. On real human DSCT responses, human-LLM agreement is fair, with much stronger within-neighborhood than exact agreement. Finally, when LLMs answer DSCT prompts without persona-conditioning, their responses exhibit stable stage-like differences across model families, with larger and newer models tending to generate higher-rated text. These results suggest that stage-conditioned signal is cleaner in synthetic responses than in human-written DSCT text, and that the core constraint for stage-aware conversational AI is not classifier accuracy alone, but the availability of developmental signal from elicited text.

</details>


### [549] [Why Retrying Fails: Context Contamination in LLM Agent Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08563)
*Zhanfu Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文污染重启模型(CCRM)，量化LLM智能体在多步工具增强任务失败重试时，由于失败上下文残留导致错误率升高的现象，推导出五个核心理论结果，并在SWE-bench数据上验证了模型的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体执行多步工具任务失败后重试时，失败的上下文会残留在上下文窗口中，污染后续尝试并提高逐步骤错误率。这一现象在实践中普遍存在，但缺乏正式的理论建模。

Method: 提出CCRM模型：一个T步工具调用链，每一步的基础失败率为epsilon_0；失败后的重试在污染上下文中进行，错误率升至epsilon_1 > epsilon_0。在此基础上推导了五个理论结果。

Result: 五个理论结果：(R1) K次尝试内成功的精确闭式公式；(R2) 级联开销定理；(R3) 最优预算分配定理，给出最优管线深度T*的闭式解；(R4) 信息论下界；(R5) 干净重启优势定理。在SWE-bench上，IID模型高估pass@3达17.4%，而CCRM拟合误差<0.001。

Conclusion: CCRM准确刻画了上下文污染对LLM智能体重试的影响，理论预测与实验高度一致，为理解和优化重试策略提供了理论基础。

Abstract: When an LLM agent fails a multi-step tool-augmented task and retries, the failed attempt typically remains in its context window -- contaminating the next attempt and elevating the per-step error rate beyond the base level. This context-contaminated restart phenomenon is widely observed in practice yet entirely lacks formal treatment. We introduce the Context-Contaminated Restart Model (CCRM): a chain of T tool-call steps, each failing with base rate epsilon_0; after any failed attempt, the subsequent attempt operates in contaminated context with elevated error rate epsilon_1 > epsilon_0. Under this model we derive five main results. (R1) An exact closed-form formula for P(succeed in at most K attempts). (R2) A cascade-overhead theorem giving the additional attempts Delta K incurred by contamination versus the clean-restart baseline. (R3) An optimal budget-allocation theorem identifying the pipeline depth T* that maximises success probability for a fixed total budget B=KT; we prove the closed form T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0))), with K*=B/T*. (R4) An information-theoretic lower bound via Le Cam's method showing K_CCRM is tight up to O(1). (R5) A clean-restart dominance theorem quantifying the exact benefit of context-clearing before retry. We validate CCRM on real SWE-bench Verified data: the IID model overestimates pass@3 by 17.4 percentage points (98.6% vs. 81.2%), while CCRM fits with error less than 0.001, implying a cascade ratio of epsilon_1/epsilon_0 = 7.1. Monte Carlo experiments confirm all theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [550] [Biological Plausibility and Representational Alignment of Feedback Alignment in Convolutional Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08564)
*Jake Lance,Larry Kieu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文评估了五种学习算法（包括改进的反馈对齐和标准反向传播）在卷积架构上的表现，发现改进的反馈对齐算法虽然更新机制不同，但能模仿反向传播的表征几何结构，从而在内部表征上达到相似效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反馈对齐（FA）算法作为反传（BP）的生物 plausible 替代方案，在卷积架构上扩展失败；虽有改进方案但牺牲了生物合理性。因此需要系统评估改进FA算法在卷积网络中的表现及其与BP的差异。

Method: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，对同一卷积架构应用五种学习算法（含改进FA和标准BP），从生物合理性、可解释性和计算复杂度三个维度进行对比分析。

Result: 改进的FA算法能够收敛到与BP结构相似的内部表征；其功能性成功可能源于模仿BP的表征几何结构，尽管使用了根本不同的权重更新机制。

Conclusion: 改进的FA算法在卷积架构上可行，其成功的关键不在于权重更新方式与BP相同，而在于能够产生类似的表征几何结构。
