Based on SKG, we build a data synthesis pipeline that generates complaint scene descriptions, rule-consistent graph generalizations, question-answer supervision, and decision recommendations. We further construct a large-scale complaint scene dataset with both text-only and multimodal in-domain benchmarks. Finally, we adopt a three-stage training strategy -- domain-adaptive pre-training, task-oriented instruction fine-tuning, and end-to-end multimodal alignment -- to inject structured scene priors into a multimodal decision model. Experiments show that SKG-VLA consistently improves policy-grounded reasoning, complaint decision accuracy, long-tail generalization, and robustness under incomplete evidence.

</details>


### [624] [Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09347)
*Yaofang Zhang,Ken Zhou,Adnan Darwiche*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种原生支持离散变量的SAT求解器，直接扩展了布尔逻辑，并可与传统布尔SAT求解器竞争。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散变量在概率推理、规划和可解释AI等应用中普遍存在，传统做法是将离散变量二值化为布尔变量来使用SAT求解器，但这种方法既面临计算效率问题，也存在语义挑战。

Method: 开发了一种针对离散逻辑的原生SAT求解器，直接扩展布尔逻辑以支持变量取任意值，并设计了类似布尔SAT求解器的组件，包括单元传播和子句学习等，但这些操作都原生适配离散变量。

Result: 通过与CSP求解器、二值化后的布尔SAT求解器以及混合求解器的实证比较，展示了所提离散SAT求解器的优势。

Conclusion: 原生离散SAT求解器在离散变量问题上比二值化后使用布尔求解器的方法更优，提供了一种更直接且高效的求解途径。

Abstract: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.

</details>


### [625] [CHAINTRIX: A multi-pipeline LLM-augmented framework for automated smart-contract security auditing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09350)
*Gabriela Dobrita,Simona-Vasilica Oprea,Adela Bara*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Chaintrix 是一个端到端的智能合约审计框架，核心思想是让 LLM 生成的每一条审计结论都必须通过确定性结构化合约表示来验证，在 EVMbench 基准上实现了 71.7% 的高危漏洞召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高出 26 个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能合约漏洞已造成数十亿美元损失，但人工审计昂贵且缓慢。现有自动化工具中，静态分析器误报率高，LLM 则会产生与源代码矛盾的幻觉。需要一种结合两者优势、同时弥补各自缺陷的审计方案。

Method: 提出跨合约交互模型（CCIM），将 Solidity 代码解析为函数级读/写/修饰符/跨合约调用的结构化映射。CCIM 作为 12 个确定性信号引擎和并行 LLM 审计流水线的共同基础。通过分阶段的误报缩减流水线，最终由结构验证引擎（SVE）对解析后的代码执行确定性结构检查，筛选后的高置信度发现再经符号执行和模糊测试验证。

Result: 在 EVMbench（OpenAI、Paradigm、OtterSec 联合发布的智能合约安全基准）上，Chaintrix 检测出 120 个高危漏洞中的 86 个（召回率 71.7%），其中 25 个审计达到 100% 召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高出 26 个百分点。

Conclusion: 将 LLM 的灵活性与确定性结构分析相结合的混合架构，能显著提升智能合约审计的召回率和可靠性，是解决当前自动化审计工具缺陷的有效路径。

Abstract: Smart-contract exploits have caused billions of USD in cumulative losses, yet audits remain expensive and slow. Automated tools have emerged to close this gap, but each class has a characteristic failure mode. Static analyzers report findings that frequently fail manual triage at high rates, while large language models (LLMs) hallucinate findings that contradict the source code. Thus, we propose Chaintrix, an end-to-end auditing framework whose central architectural commitment is that every LLM-generated claim must be discharged against a deterministic structural contract representation. We introduce a Cross-Contract Interaction Model (CCIM) that parses Solidity into a structured map of function-level reads, writes, modifiers and resolved cross-contract calls. CCIM serves as the substrate against which all 12 of Chaintrix's deterministic signal engines and the parallel LLM audit pipelines operate. A staged false-positive-reduction pipeline, terminating in a Structural Verdict Engine (SVE) that applies deterministic structural checks against parsed code, filters the merged finding set, with selected high-confidence findings further validated through symbolic execution and fuzz testing. We evaluate Chaintrix on EVMbench, the smart-contract security benchmark by OpenAI, Paradigm, OtterSec. Chaintrix detects 86 of 120 high-severity vulnerabilities (71.7% recall), with 25 audits scoring 100% recall, placing Chaintrix 26 percentage points above the strongest frontier-model baseline.

</details>


### [626] [The Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: Is Language the Attractor of Multimodal Convergence?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09352)
*Zhaoyang Zhang,Run Shao,Dongyue Wu,Jiajie Teng,Chao Tao,Jingdong Chen,Haifeng Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出方向性收敛分析（cycle-kNN），发现不同模态的独立神经网络中，非语言模态（点云、视觉）的表示会显著向语言模态的邻域结构收敛，而非反之。这种方向性不对称源于特征密度差异，并通过信息瓶颈理论解释为语言是多模态表示收敛的渐进吸引子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅使用对称相似性度量检测多模态表示收敛，但无法判断收敛的方向。作者希望揭示不同模态之间表示收敛是否存在方向性，以及这种方向性的根源。

Method: 提出cycle-kNN非对称对齐度量，在点云、视觉、语言三个模态的数十个独立训练的单模态模型上进行方向性收敛分析，并结合信息瓶颈理论进行机制解释。

Result: 发现一致的方向性不对称：非语言模态向语言模态的邻域结构收敛显著强于反向；特征密度不对称是方向性的来源，语言表示占据表示空间中最紧凑的区域。

Conclusion: 提出Wittgensteinian表示假说：语言的语义结构是多模态表示收敛的渐进吸引子（asymptotic attractor），优化过程中的压缩驱动表示向离散、组合性的语言结构靠拢。

Abstract: Understanding why independently trained neural networks from different modalities converge toward shared representations, and where this convergence leads, remains an open question in representation learning. All existing evidence relies on symmetric similarity measures, which can detect convergence but are structurally blind to its direction. We introduce directional convergence analysis using cycle-kNN, an asymmetric alignment measure, applied across dozens of independently trained unimodal models spanning point clouds, vision, and language. We uncover a consistent directional asymmetry: non-language modalities move toward the neighborhood structure of language significantly more than the reverse, and this pattern holds across all model families and scales--yet is entirely invisible to symmetric measures. Mechanistic analysis traces the directionality to feature density asymmetry, whereby language representations occupy the most compact regions of representational space. The Information Bottleneck framework provides a principled interpretation: optimization under compression drives representations toward discrete, compositional structures characteristic of language. We formalize this as the Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: the semantic structure of language is the asymptotic attractor of multimodal representation convergence.

</details>


### [627] [Position: Avoid Overstretching LLMs for every Enterprise Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09365)
*Kuldeep Singh,Anson Bastos,Isaiah Onando Mulang'*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文主张企业AI系统应将语言模型作为接口而非引擎，通过将知识和计算外化到专用组件（知识库、符号程序）中，构建更可靠、可维护的模块化架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM部署或蒸馏方案在企业任务中存在效率低、不可靠、与任务结构不匹配的问题。有限容量模型无法完整捕捉企业所需知识，存在固有局限。

Method: 理论论证有限容量模型无法承载企业所需全部知识；提出模块化架构：LLM仅负责结构化提取，计算和存储交由知识库和符号程序处理。

Result: 从理论上证明模块化架构比 monolithic 框架更可靠、更可维护，为企业任务提供可持续基础。

Conclusion: 企业AI应转向以LLM为接口的模块化设计，而非依赖单一大型模型，以实现更好的可靠性、可扩展性和透明性。

Abstract: Enterprise workloads are dominated by deterministic, structured, and knowledge-dependent tasks operating under strict cost, latency, and reliability constraints. While these are often addressed through large language model (LLM) deployment or distillation into smaller models, we argue this is inefficient, unreliable, and misaligned with enterprise task structures. Instead, AI systems should treat language models as interfaces rather than monolithic engines, externalizing knowledge and computation into dedicated components for greater reliability, scalability, and transparency. Our theoretical evidences show that finite-capacity models cannot fully capture the breadth of knowledge required for enterprise tasks, creating inherent limits to efficiency and interpretability. Building on this, we take the position that language models should primarily be used for structured extraction in deterministic enterprise workflows, while computation and storage are delegated to knowledge bases and symbolic procedures. We formally demonstrate that such modular architectures are more reliable and maintainable than monolithic frameworks, offering a sustainable foundation for enterprise tasks.

</details>


### [628] [Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09366)
*Keqi Han,Songlin Zhao,Yao Su,Lifang He,Carl Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出NIAgent，一种多智能体系统，采用代码中心执行范式和分层验证框架，实现神经影像数据端到端自主分析，在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上优于传统工作流基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有标准化工作流（如fMRIPrep）虽提高了鲁棒性和效率，但静态配置、无法像人类研究者一样推理下游目标、权衡替代策略或根据中间证据闭环调整，导致领域专家陷入手动试错循环，严重限制了临床生物标志物开发的可扩展性。

Method: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统：1）代码中心执行范式，专业智能体协作合成和优化可执行程序；2）分层验证框架，结合队列级指标筛查和智能体视觉检查，实现证据驱动的工作流修复。

Result: 在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上，NIAgent在预测性能上优于标准工作流基线，并展现出策略探索和自适应优化等高级智能体行为。

Conclusion: NIAgent通过多智能体协作和闭环自适应机制，有效弥合了神经影像数据分析中标准化工作流与人类专家灵活推理之间的鸿沟，为临床生物标志物开发提供了可扩展的自动化方案。

Abstract: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.

</details>


### [629] [Explainable Knowledge Tracing via Probabilistic Embeddings and Pattern-based Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09369)
*Siyu Wu,Cong Xu,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于概率逻辑的知识追踪框架PLKT，用Beta分布嵌入代替确定性向量，通过显式逻辑推理路径实现高可解释性，同时性能超过现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习KT模型使用确定性向量嵌入和黑盒状态转移，缺乏可解释性，难以追溯具体历史行为对预测的影响。

Method: 1) 用Beta分布概率嵌入表示学生知识状态，建模行为不确定性；2) 基于概率分布执行显式逻辑操作（如合取），构建透明推理路径；3) 将预测建模为目标条件证据推理过程。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，PLKT性能超越当前最先进的KT方法，同时提供了显著更优的可解释性。

Conclusion: 概率逻辑嵌入+显式推理路径是平衡KT模型性能与可解释性的有效范式。

Abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) models students' knowledge states based on learning interactions to predict performance. While deep learning-based KT models have boosted predictive accuracy, most models rely on deterministic vector embeddings and opaque latent state transitions, limiting interpretability regarding how specific past behaviors influence predictions. To address this limitation, we propose Probabilistic Logical Knowledge Tracing (PLKT), an interpretable KT framework that formulates prediction as a goal-conditioned evidence reasoning process over historical learning behaviors. Instead of representing knowledge states as deterministic vector embeddings, PLKT employs robust Beta-distributed probabilistic embeddings to represent student knowledge states. This probabilistic foundation allows us to model the uncertainty of historical behaviors and perform explicit logical operations (e.g., conjunction), constructing transparent reasoning paths that reveal how specific past interactions contribute to the prediction. Extensive experiments show that PLKT outperforms state-of-the-art KT methods while achieving superior interpretability. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PLKT-D3CE/.

</details>


### [630] [NEXUS: Continual Learning of Symbolic Constraints for Safe and Robust Embodied Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09387)
*Tiehan Cui,Peipei Liu,Yanxu Mao,Congying Liu,Mingzhe Xing,Datao You*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: NEXUS是一个模块化框架，通过符号接地和知识进化，将LLM的概率不确定性转化为物理世界所需的确定性和可验证安全性，在SafeAgentBench上实现了高任务成功率、强安全拒绝能力和持续学习效率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在具身智能中表现出色，但其固有的概率不确定性与物理世界要求的严格确定性和可验证安全性之间存在根本性鸿沟，亟需弥合这一差距。

Method: 提出NEXUS模块化框架，将物理可行性与安全规范解耦：通过闭环执行反馈提升能力，将概率风险评估转化为确定性硬约束以建立事前防御机制，并利用符号制品实现符号接地与知识持续演化。

Result: 在SafeAgentBench上，NEXUS实现了更高的任务成功率，有效拒绝不安全指令，对对抗性攻击具有鲁棒防御能力，并通过知识积累渐进式提升规划效率。

Conclusion: NEXUS通过符号接地和确定性安全约束，有效弥合了LLM概率性与物理世界确定性之间的鸿沟，为具身智能体的持续学习和安全决策提供了可行方案。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have catalyzed progress in embodied intelligence, a fundamental gap between their inherent probabilistic uncertainty and the strict determinism and verifiable safety required in the physical world. To mitigate this gap, this paper introduces NEXUS, a modular framework designed for continual learning in embodied agents. Different from prior works that treat symbolic artifacts merely as static interfaces, NEXUS leverages them for symbolic grounding and knowledge evolution. The framework explicitly decouples physical feasibility from safety specifications: capability of agents is improved through closed-loop execution feedback, while probabilistic risk assessments are grounded into deterministic hard constraints to establish a rigorous pre-action defense. Experiments on SafeAgentBench demonstrate that NEXUS achieves superior task success rates while effectively refusing unsafe instructions, exhibiting robust defense against adversarial attacks, and progressively improving planning efficiency through knowledge accumulation.

</details>


### [631] [Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09391)
*Prasad Mahadik,Adrians Skapars*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出利用角色向量（persona vectors）构建低维子空间，通过对比角色提示和无监督PCA提取主成分，从而更稳健地检测语言模型中的有害行为（如欺骗和谄媚）。相比原始激活训练的分类器，基于角色-PC投影训练的探针在10个评估数据集上展现出更好的跨分布泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本监控不足以检测语言模型在评估时的策略性欺骗和沙袋行为（sandbagging），而白盒探针（如线性探针）在分布偏移下容易失效。因此需要更鲁棒的有害行为检测方法。

Method: 借鉴Assistant Axis和Persona Selection Model，使用对比角色提示构建欺骗和谄媚的角色轴；通过无监督PCA对角色特定向量提取主成分（persona-PC），在该低维子空间上训练线性探针。

Result: 在10个评估数据集上，角色派生方向具有非平凡迁移性，基于persona-PC投影训练的探针泛化能力优于基于原始激活的探针。统一多行为角色轴进一步提升了跨行为和跨数据集的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 角色向量为构建更具迁移性的行为探针提供了有用的归纳偏置，有助于更鲁棒地检测语言模型中的有害行为。

Abstract: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

</details>


### [632] [Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09395)
*Lin Li,Jiawei Huang,Qihao Quan,Dan Li,Boxin Li,Xiao Zhang,Erli Meng,Wenjie Feng,Jian Lou,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出首个基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的智能体推理框架MarsTSC，用于少样本多模态时间序列分类，通过自演进知识库和反射式智能体推理实现性能突破。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 少样本多模态时间序列分类任务中，现有方法缺乏可解释性且难以应对分布偏移，亟需一种兼具推理能力和动态知识更新的框架。

Method: 构建三个协作角色：Generator负责推理分类；Reflector诊断推理错误并提供时序特征洞察；Modifier验证更新知识库避免上下文崩塌。引入测试时更新策略实现知识库持续优化。

Result: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，跨越6种VLM骨干网络均取得显著且一致的性能提升，优于经典方法和基于基础模型的时间序列基线。

Conclusion: MarsTSC有效解决了少样本场景下的时间序列分类问题，同时生成可解释的、以人类可读特征证据支撑的分类推理依据。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

</details>


### [633] [Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09415)
*Adeela Bashir,Zia Ush Shamszaman,Zhao Song,The Anh Han*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过演化博弈模型研究了AI网络安全防御中资源不平等访问的问题，发现高成本强防御难以普及，而引入少数坚定防御者并给予补贴能有效提升整体防御水平、抑制攻击，增强系统韧性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在网络安全中的应用改变了攻防格局，但资源有限的防御者难以获得高级AI防御工具，导致系统存在持续脆弱性。作者旨在研究这种差异化AI访问对安全动态的影响，并寻找有效的干预机制。

Method: 采用有限种群演化博弈论模型，引入高/低能力防御选择、坚定防御者（始终选择强防御）和定向补贴机制，并通过大规模参数空间的仿真验证。

Result: ①高成本强防御下种群趋向低成本弱防御行为；②仅引入坚定防御者无法稳定安全结果；③结合定向补贴后，强防御采纳率显著提升，攻击成功率下降，系统韧性增强；④社会福利分析显示防御者收益改善，攻击者收益保持低位。

Conclusion: 对关键防御者的定向支持是稳定AI驱动环境中网络安全的有效机制，为网络安全政策、AI治理与防御性AI能力战略分配提供了理论桥梁。

Abstract: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

</details>


### [634] [From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09419)
*Yanan Xiao,Yixiang Tang,Zechen Feng,Lu Jiang,Minghao Yin,Pengyang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出神经符号经验回放(NSER)框架，利用大语言模型从轨迹中零样本提取行为规则，转化为可微一阶逻辑表示，动态调整回放分布，从而将经验回放从被动采样转变为主动知识构建，提升样本效率和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统经验回放将回放缓冲区视为被动记忆系统，仅基于数值预测误差进行采样，忽视了样本的语义重要性。这种方法与人类通过抽象碎片化经验为行为规则来加速学习的方式形成鲜明对比，因此需要弥合这一差距。

Method: 提出NSER框架，包含三个关键步骤：(1) 利用LLM以零样本方式从累积轨迹中诱导候选行为规则；(2) 将这些规则转化为可微分的一阶逻辑表示（神经符号接地管道）；(3) 利用得到的符号结构动态重新加权回放分布，使抽象知识直接塑造策略优化。

Result: 在反应式、基于规则和程序化基准任务上，NSER一致地实现了更优的样本效率和收敛速度。

Conclusion: NSER通过将经验回放从被动样本重用机制转变为主动知识构建引擎，成功弥合了语言推理与数值优化之间的不兼容性，验证了神经符号方法在强化学习中提升数据效率的有效性。

Abstract: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

</details>


### [635] [SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09423)
*Haoqiang Kang,Xiaokang Ye,Yuhan Liu,Siddhant Hitesh Mantri,Lingjun Mao,James Fleming,Drishti Regmi,Lianhui Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SimWorld Studio是一个基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台，通过SimCoder编码智能体实现自我进化的3D环境生成，支持具身智能体与环境的协同进化学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身智能体缺乏大规模、多样化且可自动生成的3D交互环境。现有的模拟器依赖人工场景或程序化模板，缺乏可验证任务和标准学习接口。

Method: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，核心是SimCoder编码智能体——通过工具/技能增强的代码生成智能体，能编写并执行引擎级代码构建3D世界。SimCoder利用验证器反馈（编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我进化，自动将工具和技能加入库中。生成的输出为Gym风格环境，支持环境生成与具身学习的协同进化。

Result: 在具身导航的三个案例研究中：自我进化提升生成可靠性；生成的环境显著提升具身智能体性能并泛化至未见基准；协同进化相比固定环境学习获得18个百分点的成功率提升，相比未训练智能体提升40个百分点。

Conclusion: SimWorld Studio证明了通过代码生成智能体的自我进化与环境-学习者的协同进化，可以有效解决具身智能体训练环境中数据自动生成的瓶颈问题。

Abstract: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

</details>


### [636] [VulTriage: Triple-Path Context Augmentation for LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09461)
*Wenxin Tang,Xiang Zhang,Junliang Liu,Jingyu Xiao,Xi Xiao,Jinlong Yang,Yuehe Ma,Zhenyu Liu,Zhengheng Li,Zicheng Wang,Wang Luo,Qing Li,Lei Wang,Peng Xiangli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VulTriage 提出了一种三路径上下文增强框架，通过控制流、知识库和语义三条路径增强LLM的输入，显著提升了漏洞检测的准确率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法难以捕获代码的结构依赖、领域特定的漏洞知识和复杂程序语义，直接使用LLM推理原始代码容易漏报或误报，特别是当易受攻击和正常函数仅存在细微语义差异时。

Method: 采用三条互补路径增强LLM输入：1) 控制路径（Control Path）提取并文本化AST、CFG、DFG信息；2) 知识路径（Knowledge Path）通过混合稠密-稀疏检索获取CWE相关漏洞模式和示例；3) 语义路径（Semantic Path）在最终判断前总结代码的功能行为。三者整合为统一指令指导LLM推理。

Result: 在PrimeVul配对测试集上达到SOTA性能，优于现有深度学习和LLM基线；消融实验验证了每条路径的有效性；在Kotlin数据集上展示了在低资源和类别不平衡场景下的泛化能力。

Conclusion: VulTrage通过多维度上下文增强有效提升了LLM在漏洞检测任务上的表现，且具有良好的泛化性和实用性。

Abstract: Automated vulnerability detection is a fundamental task in software security, yet existing learning-based methods still struggle to capture the structural dependencies, domain-specific vulnerability knowledge, and complex program semantics required for accurate detection. Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong code understanding ability, but directly prompting them with raw source code often leads to missed vulnerabilities or false alarms, especially when vulnerable and benign functions differ only in subtle semantic details. To address this, we propose VulTriage, a triple-path context augmentation framework for LLM-based vulnerability detection. VulTriage enhances the LLM input through three complementary paths: a Control Path that extracts and verbalizes AST, CFG, and DFG information to expose control and data dependencies; a Knowledge Path that retrieves relevant CWE-derived vulnerability patterns and examples through hybrid dense--sparse retrieval; and a Semantic Path that summarizes the functional behavior of the code before the final judgment. These contexts are integrated into a unified instruction to guide the LLM toward more reliable vulnerability reasoning. Experiments on the PrimeVul pair test set show that VulTriage achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing deep learning and LLM-based baselines on key pair-wise and classification metrics. Further ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each path, and additional experiments on the Kotlin dataset demonstrate the generalization ability of VulTriage under low-resource and class-imbalanced settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/vinsontang1/VulTriage

</details>


### [637] [Don't Click That: Teaching Web Agents to Resist Deceptive Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09497)
*Yilin Zhang,Yingkai Hua,Chunyu Wei,Xin Wang,Yueguo Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DUDE框架，结合混合奖励学习与非对称惩罚机制，以及经验总结技术，将失败模式转化为可迁移的指导，在保持任务性能的同时将欺骗易感性降低53.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于VLM的网页代理容易受到欺骗性界面元素的攻击，而现有方法要么检测欺骗但不集成到任务中，要么仅记录攻击而不提出防御方案，缺乏形式化的欺骗防御框架。

Method: 提出DUDE（Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator）两阶段框架，包含混合奖励学习（hybrid-reward learning）、非对称惩罚（asymmetric penalties）和经验总结（experience summarization），将失败模式蒸馏为可迁移的指导。

Result: 在包含1,407个场景、覆盖四个领域和欺骗类别的RUC基准上，DUDE将欺骗易感性降低53.8%，同时保持任务性能。

Conclusion: DUDE为鲁棒网页代理部署建立了有效基础，证明了欺骗感知防御的可行性。

Abstract: Vision-language model (VLM) based web agents demonstrate impressive autonomous GUI interaction but remain vulnerable to deceptive interface elements. Existing approaches either detect deception without task integration or document attacks without proposing defenses. We formalize deception-aware web agent defense and propose DUDE (Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator), a two-stage framework combining hybrid-reward learning with asymmetric penalties and experience summarization to distill failure patterns into transferable guidance. We introduce RUC (Real UI Clickboxes), a benchmark of 1,407 scenarios spanning four domains and deception categories. Experiments show DUDE reduces deception susceptibility by 53.8% while maintaining task performance, establishing an effective foundation for robust web agent deployment.

</details>


### [638] [EpiGraph: A Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Evidence-Intensive Reasoning in Epilepsy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09505)
*Yuyang Dai,Zheng Chen,Jathurshan Pradeepkumar,Yasuko Matsubara,Jimeng Sun,Yasushi Sakurai,Yushun Dong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了大规模癫痫知识图谱 EpiGraph（含48,166篇文献、24,324实体、32,009三元组）及五个临床推理任务的基准 EpiBench，实验证明知识图谱增强（Graph-RAG）能显著提升LLM在癫痫诊疗中的表现（药理学推理提升30-41%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 癫痫诊断与治疗需要整合生物信号、遗传机制、药物基因组学、治疗策略等多源异构临床知识，现有LLM缺乏结构化知识支撑，推理不够可靠。

Method: 从48,166篇论文和7个临床资源构建EpiGraph知识图谱（5个临床层次），基于此设计EpiBench的5个临床任务（决策、脑电图报告、药物基因组学、治疗推荐、深度研究规划），在6个LLM上比较标准与Graph-RAG设置。

Result: 知识图谱增强在所有任务上一致提升性能，药物基因组学推理提升最显著（+30-41%）。

Conclusion: 结构化癫痫知识能显著增强LLM的循证临床推理能力，EpiGraph/EpiBench为知识增强LLM在神经科领域的评估提供了实用基准框架。

Abstract: Epilepsy diagnosis and treatment require evidence-intensive reasoning across heterogeneous clinical knowledge, including biosignal patterns, genetic mechanisms, pharmacogenomics, treatment strategies, and patient outcomes. In this work, we present \textsc{EpiGraph}, a large-scale epilepsy knowledge graph and benchmark for evaluating knowledge-augmented clinical reasoning. \textsc{EpiGraph} integrates 48,166 peer-reviewed papers and seven clinical resources into a heterogeneous graph containing 24,324 entities and 32,009 evidence-grounded triplets across five clinical layers. Built upon this graph, \textsc{EpiBench} defines five clinically motivated tasks spanning clinical decision-making, EEG report generation, pharmacogenomic precision medicine, treatment recommendation, and deep research planning. We evaluate six LLMs under both standard and Graph-RAG settings. Results show that integrating \textsc{EpiGraph} consistently improves performance across all tasks, with the largest gains observed in pharmacogenomic reasoning (+30--41\%). Our findings demonstrate that structured epilepsy knowledge substantially enhances evidence-grounded clinical reasoning and provides a practical benchmark framework for evaluating knowledge-augmented LLMs in real-world neurological settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LabRAI/EEG-KG.

</details>


### [639] [WindINR: Latent-State INR for Fast Local Wind Query and Correction in Complex Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09511)
*Yi Xiao,Qilong Jia,Hang Fan,Pascal Fua,Robert Jenssen,Xiaosong Ma,Wei Xue*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: WindINR是一个基于隐式神经表示的框架，用于复杂地形下的高分辨率风场查询与稀疏观测校正，通过仅更新潜在状态而非整个网络实现快速推理时校正，在OSSE实验中取得约2.6倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂地形中的下游决策需要在指定位置和高度快速获取风估计，而非密集网格上的预报场。现有方法无法同时满足高分辨率查询、稀疏观测快速校正和连续坐标查询的需求。

Method: 提出WindINR框架，包含：(1) 静态地形描述符、低分辨率背景场和连续查询坐标通过潜在条件解码器映射到高分辨率风场；(2) 训练阶段使用特权编码器从高分辨率监督中推断参考潜在状态，并学习可部署的潜在预测器；(3) 推理阶段固定网络权重，仅通过最小化正则化校正目标更新潜在状态以融合稀疏观测。

Result: 在Senja地区的OSSE实验中（含无人机辅助场景和随机观测鲁棒性测试），WindINR通过仅更新紧凑潜在状态提升了局部高分辨率风估计，在CPU基准测试中比全网络微调快约2.6倍。

Conclusion: WindINR提供了一种实用的接口，连接公里尺度背景产品、稀疏局部观测与复杂地形中的风查询，兼具连续查询能力和高效在线校正优势。

Abstract: Many downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a small number of user-specified locations and heights for a given forecast valid time, rather than another dense forecast field on a fixed grid. We present WindINR, a latent-state implicit neural representation framework for continuous high-resolution local wind query and sparse-observation correction. WindINR maps static terrain descriptors, a low-resolution background field, and continuous query coordinates to a high-resolution wind state through a latent-conditioned decoder. To enable rapid inference-time correction, WindINR separates reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent-state correction. During training, a privileged encoder infers a reference latent state from high-resolution supervision, a deployable latent predictor estimates an initial latent state from inference-time inputs alone, and their discrepancies are summarized into a dataset-adaptive Gaussian prior over latent corrections. At inference time, within the WindINR module, network weights remain fixed and only the latent state is updated by minimizing a regularized correction objective using sparse observations and their uncertainty. In controlled OSSEs over the Senja region, including a UAV-aided approach scenario and random-observation robustness tests, WindINR improves local high-resolution wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state rather than the full network. The corrected representation remains continuously queryable at arbitrary coordinates and, in our CPU benchmark, yields about a $2.6\times$ online-correction speedup over full-network fine-tuning, suggesting a practical interface between kilometer-scale background products, sparse local observations, and wind queries in complex terrain.

</details>


### [640] [A Game Theoretic Free Energy Analysis of Higher Order Synergy in Attention Heads of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09515)
*Djamel Bouchaffra*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文运用博弈论自由能原理(GTFEP)将注意力头视为有限理性智能体，通过变分推理分析多头注意力机制。研究发现三元交互信息为负（高阶冗余），并基于此提出剪枝策略：剪掉20%头可减少18%FLOPs、提升22%吞吐量，仅轻微增加困惑度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多头注意力中头之间的相互作用机制尚不明确，缺乏理论框架来理解头之间的协作与冗余关系。

Method: 将GTFEP应用于注意力头分析：每个头最小化变分自由能，集体行为服从Gibbs分布；使用均匀先验和确定性动力学的近似，将联盟自由能简化为离散化头输出的联合香农熵；利用Harsanyi红利分解交互信息，并通过Nash FEP对应保证收敛到ϵ-纳什均衡。

Result: 在BERT、GPT2、Llama及GSM8K数据集上，三元红利一致为负（高阶冗余）；剪枝低边际贡献的头可减少计算开销：GPT2剪掉20%头，FLOPs减少18%，吞吐量提升22%，困惑度仅从28.4升至33.4。

Conclusion: GTFEP为分析和优化Transformer架构提供了理论严谨的基础，可指导高效剪枝策略。

Abstract: Large language models rely on multihead attention, but interactions among heads remain poorly understood. We apply the Game Theoretic Free Energy Principle (GTFEP): a framework casting multiagent systems as distributed variational inference to analyze attention heads as bounded rational agents. According to GTFEP, each head minimizes its variational free energy, and collective behavior follows a Gibbs distribution over coalition structures whose energy is decomposed into Harsanyi dividends. Using a tractable approximation (uniform prior, deterministic dynamics), coalition free energy reduces to joint Shannon entropy of discretized head outputs (argmax key index). Pairwise dividends become mutual information (nonnegative), while triple dividends correspond to interaction information and can be negative. On BERT, GPT2, and Llama with GSM8K, triple dividends are consistently negative, revealing higher order redundancy. The Nash FEP correspondence guarantees that stationary points of collective free energy are epsilon Nash equilibria; thus, heads with negligible contribution can be pruned with minimal performance loss. Pruning heads with low marginal contribution reduces computational cost with minimal performance loss: for example, pruning 20% of heads in GPT2 reduces FLOPs by 18%, increases throughput by 22%, and raises perplexity only modestly (from 28.4 to 33.4 on GSM8K). Our work shows GTFEP provides a principled foundation for analyzing and optimizing transformer architectures.

</details>


### [641] [Weighted Rules under the Stable Model Semantics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09519)
*Joohyung Lee,Yi Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了稳定模型语义下的加权规则概念，借鉴马尔可夫逻辑的对数线性模型，用于克服稳定模型语义的确定性，解决不一致性、排序稳定模型、关联概率等问题，并与相关形式化方法进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 克服稳定模型语义的确定性限制，将其扩展为能够处理概率和不确定性的框架，从而解决不一致性、模型排序和概率推理等问题。

Method: 借鉴马尔可夫逻辑的对数线性模型，在稳定模型语义下引入加权规则，使每个规则具有权重，从而定义加权的稳定模型。

Result: 能够解决回答集程序中的不一致性，对稳定模型进行排序，赋予稳定模型概率，并支持统计推理计算加权稳定模型。

Conclusion: 加权规则框架有效扩展了稳定模型语义，使其具备处理不确定性和概率的能力，并与Answer Set Programs、Markov Logic、ProbLog、P-log等形式化方法具有可比性和差异。

Abstract: We introduce the concept of weighted rules under the stable model semantics following the log-linear models of Markov Logic. This provides versatile methods to overcome the deterministic nature of the stable model semantics, such as resolving inconsistencies in answer set programs, ranking stable models, associating probability to stable models, and applying statistical inference to computing weighted stable models. We also present formal comparisons with related formalisms, such as answer set programs, Markov Logic, ProbLog, and P-log.

</details>


### [642] [Functional Stable Model Semantics and Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09524)
*Michael Bartholomew,Joohyung Lee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文展示了功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的重要作用，并证明了紧的ASPMT程序可以转化为SMT实例，类似于ASP与SAT之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近年来，将内涵函数融入回答集编程的兴趣日益增长。内涵函数的值可由其他函数和谓词描述，而非像标准ASP那样预定义。本文旨在展示功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的关键作用。

Method: 通过理论分析，展示功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的核心地位，并证明紧的ASPMT程序可以转化为SMT实例，类似于ASP到SAT的转化关系。

Result: 证明了紧的ASPMT程序可以转化为SMT实例，建立了ASPMT与SMT之间的理论联系。

Conclusion: 功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中扮演重要角色，紧的ASPMT程序到SMT的转化类似于ASP到SAT的转化，为现有集成方法提供了统一的理论基础。

Abstract: Recently there has been an increasing interest in incorporating ``intensional'' functions in answer set programming. Intensional functions are those whose values can be described by other functions and predicates, rather than being pre-defined as in the standard answer set programming. We demonstrate that the functional stable model semantics plays an important role in the framework of ``Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories (ASPMT)'' -- a tight integration of answer set programming and satisfiability modulo theories, under which existing integration approaches can be viewed as special cases where the role of functions is limited. We show that ``tight'' ASPMT programs can be translated into SMT instances, which is similar to the known relationship between ASP and SAT.

</details>


### [643] [Cplus2ASP: Computing Action Language C+ in Answer Set Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09528)
*Joseph Babb,Joohyung Lee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍Cplus2ASP V2系统，实现了C+动作语言的definite片段，通过现代回答集求解技术显著提升性能，支持增量执行、外部原子调用和交互模式，并兼容其他动作语言（B、BC）的多模态翻译。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 改进C+动作语言求解器的效率，利用现代回答集编程技术替代传统方法，同时保持与Causal Calculator V2的完全兼容性。

Method: 采用由f2lp、clingo、iclingo和as2transition组成的工具链，基于模块定理扩展到含嵌套表达式的程序，实现增量执行模式下的高效翻译与求解。

Result: Cplus2ASP V2相比Causal Calculator V2显著更快，且支持Lua外部原子调用、用户交互模式，以及B/BC等其他动作语言的扩展翻译。

Conclusion: Cplus2ASP V2是一个高效、兼容性强、功能丰富的C+动作语言求解系统，通过现代回答集技术实现了性能飞跃，并具备良好的可扩展性。

Abstract: We present Version 2 of system Cplus2ASP, which implements the definite fragment of action language C+. Its input language is fully compatible with the language of the Causal Calculator Version 2, but the new system is significantly faster thanks to modern answer set solving techniques. The translation implemented in the system is a composition of several recent theoretical results. The system orchestrates a tool chain, consisting of f2lp, clingo, iclingo, and as2transition. Under the incremental execution mode, the system translates a C+ description into the input language of iclingo, exploiting its incremental grounding mechanism. The correctness of this execution is justified by the module theorem extended to programs with nested expressions. In addition, the input language of the system has many useful features, such as external atoms by means of Lua calls and the user interactive mode. The system supports extensible multi-modal translations for other action languages, such as B and BC, as well.

</details>


### [644] [LLM-Guided Monte Carlo Tree Search over Knowledge Graphs: Composing Mechanistic Explanations for Drug-Disease Pairs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09542)
*Rishabh Jakhar,Michel Dumontier,Remzi Celebi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TESSERA是一个神经符号框架，结合LLM的局部判别能力与知识图谱的硬约束，通过MCTS进行长程搜索与信用分配，用于从知识图谱中提取多步解释，在药物机制阐明任务上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从知识图谱中提取多步解释面临组合爆炸（候选路径随深度指数增长）和信用分配（路径质量需在长序列中评估）两大挑战。前沿LLM虽在知识和推理基准上表现优异，但其知识缺乏保证，且随链长增加组合性能下降。因此需要一种能结合LLM启发式能力与知识图谱结构化约束的方法。

Method: 提出TESSERA三部分神经符号框架：(1) LLM承担有限角色——局部判别判断，而非自主多步生成；(2) 知识图谱定义假设空间，施加硬结构约束；(3) MCTS协调长程搜索，通过反向传播实现原则性信用分配。LLM扮演双重角色：作为先验策略（prior policy）引导探索方向，以及作为比较状态评估器（comparative state evaluator）提供奖励信号。

Result: 在两个互补的知识图谱上进行药物机制阐明评估，结果表明TESSERA能忠实于已有的生物学知识，同时发现一致的替代机制。消融实验证实了两个LLM组件在判别层面的贡献。

Conclusion: TESSERA为结构化知识上的组合推理提供了一种通用范式，不仅限于当前应用场景。

Abstract: Extracting multi-step explanations from knowledge graphs poses a combinatorial challenge requiring both heuristic guidance (as candidates proliferate with depth) and credit assignment (as path quality emerges over extended sequences). Frontier LLMs, strong on knowledge/reasoning benchmarks, offer a compelling source of such heuristics, yet their knowledge comes sans guarantees and compositional performance degrades as chains lengthen. We thus present TESSERA, a 3-part neuro-symbolic framework that uses LLMs in a circumscribed role: for local discriminative judgement rather than autonomous multi-step generation; the knowledge graph then defines the hypothesis space enforcing hard structural constraints, and MCTS coordinates the long-horizon search with principled credit assignment via backpropagation. LLMs perform dual roles as a prior policy biasing exploration and a comparative state evaluator supplying reward signals. Evaluation on drug mechanism elucidation across two complementary knowledge graphs demonstrates fidelity to curated biology while surfacing coherent alternative mechanisms, with ablations confirming discriminative contribution from both LLM components. Beyond its current application, our framework offers a general paradigm for compositional reasoning over structured knowledge.

</details>


### [645] [TIDE-Bench: Task-Aware and Diagnostic Evaluation of Tool-Integrated Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09544)
*Yize Li,Junzhi Li,Jason Song,Chuxiong Sun,Rui Wang,Changwen Zheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了TIDE-Bench，一个全面且高效的基准测试，用于评估工具集成推理（TIR）方法。该基准具有三大优势：多样化任务设置（包括数学推理、知识密集型QA以及两个新设计的任务）、综合且任务感知的评估协议、以及高质量高区分度的评估集。实验揭示了工具接地方面的持续瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工具集成推理（TIR）领域缺乏高质量、统一的评估基准，现有评估存在数据集质量低、任务多样性不足、诊断不全面和评估效率低下的问题。

Method: 提出TIDE-Bench基准，包含：(1) 多样化任务设置，涵盖数学推理、知识密集型QA以及新设计的工具接地实验设计任务和动态交互任务；(2) 综合的任务感知评估协议，联合度量答案质量、过程可靠性、工具使用效率和推理成本；(3) 通过过滤低区分度实例构建高质量、高区分度的评估集，降低评估成本。

Result: 在多个基础模型和TIR方法上的大量实验揭示了工具接地方面的持续瓶颈。

Conclusion: TIDE-Bench为TIR研究提供了更全面、高效的评估框架，揭示了现有方法在工具接地方面的不足，为未来TIR研究提供了方向性洞见。

Abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models with external computation, retrieval, and execution capabilities. However, the field still lacks a high-quality and unified evaluation benchmark, and existing TIR evaluations remain limited in dataset quality, task diversity, diagnostic comprehensiveness, and evaluation efficiency. In this work, we introduce TIDE-Bench, a holistic and efficient benchmark for evaluating TIR methods, featuring three key advantages. First, it provides diverse task settings, combining widely used mathematical reasoning and knowledge-intensive QA tasks with two newly designed tasks, namely the tool-grounded experimental design task and the dynamic interactive task, to probe models' abilities in complex tool invocation and multi-tool coordination. Second, TIDE-Bench adopts a comprehensive yet task-aware evaluation protocol, jointly measuring final answer quality, process reliability, tool-use efficiency, and inference cost across heterogeneous task settings. Third, TIDE-Bench constructs high-quality and discriminative evaluation sets by filtering low-discrimination instances from existing datasets, substantially reducing evaluation cost while focusing on more challenging samples. Extensive experiments on multiple foundation models and TIR methods reveal persistent bottlenecks in tool grounding, offering insights for future TIR research.

</details>


### [646] [PDEAgent-Bench: A Multi-Metric, Multi-Library Benchmark for PDE Solver Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09636)
*Zhen Hang,Yushan Yashengjiang,Junhui Li,Huanshuo Dong,Yang Wei,Zhezheng Hao,Jiangtao Ma,Songlin Bai,Haozhong Kai,Xihang Yue,Gangzong Si,Dongming Jiang,Chao Yao,Zhanhua Hu,Jiangqing Zhang,Pengwei Liu,Yaomin Shen,Xingyu Ren,Lei Liu,Zikang Xu,Han Li,Qingsong Yao,Hande Dong,Hong Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了首个针对PDE到求解器代码生成的基准测试PDEAgent-Bench，包含645个实例、6个数学类别、11个PDE家族，支持DOLFINx、Firedrake、deal.II三种FEM库，并采用分阶段评估框架检验代码的可执行性、数值精度和计算效率。实验表明现有LLM和代码智能体在生成可运行代码方面表现尚可，但在精度和效率要求下通过率大幅下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码生成基准主要评估语法正确性或预定义测试用例的通过率，缺乏专门针对PDE到求解器代码生成的基准。通用代码基准无法充分捕捉数值PDE求解的特有挑战（如求解器精度、效率、与专业FEM库的兼容性）。

Method: 构建包含645个实例的基准，覆盖6个数学类别和11个PDE家族，支持三种主流FEM库（DOLFINx、Firedrake、deal.II）。采用分阶段评估框架：依次检查可执行性、数值精度和计算效率，每个实例提供参考解和特定精度/运行时目标。

Result: 代表性LLM和代码智能体在生成可运行代码方面表现尚可，但一旦加入精度和效率要求，通过率大幅下降，说明当前模型在生成数值可靠且高效的PDE求解器方面能力有限。

Conclusion: PDEAgent-Bench为PDE到求解器代码生成提供了一个可复现的测试平台，反映了实际数值PDE求解的需求；当前代码智能体在生成数值可靠且高效的PDE求解器方面仍有显著局限。

Abstract: PDE-to-solver code generation aims to automatically synthesize executable numerical solvers from partial differential equation (PDE) specifications. This task requires not only understanding the mathematical structure of PDEs, but also selecting appropriate discretization schemes and solver configurations, and correctly implementing the resulting formulations in finite-element method (FEM) libraries. Existing code generation benchmarks mainly evaluate syntactic correctness, or success on predefined test cases. To our knowledge, there is currently no publicly available benchmark specifically for PDE-to-solver code generation, and general-purpose code benchmarks do not fully capture the unique challenges of numerical PDE solution, such as ensuring solver accuracy, efficiency, and compatibility with professional FEM libraries. We introduce PDEAgent-Bench, to the best of our knowledge, the first multi-metric, multi-library benchmark for PDE-to-solver code generation. PDEAgent-Bench contains 645 instances across 6 mathematical categories and 11 PDE families, with common FEM libraries for DOLFINx, Firedrake, and deal.II. Each instance provides an agent-facing problem specification, a reference solution on a prescribed evaluation grid, and case-specific accuracy and runtime targets. PDEAgent-Bench adopts a staged evaluation framework in which generated solvers must sequentially pass executability, numerical accuracy, and computational efficiency checks. Experiments with representative LLMs and code agents show that models can often produce runnable code, but their pass rate drops substantially once accuracy and efficiency requirements are enforced. These results indicate that current agents remain limited in producing numerically reliable and efficient PDE solvers, and that PDEAgent-Bench provides a reproducible testbed grounded in the practical requirements of numerical PDE solving.

</details>


### [647] [Workspace Optimization: How to Train Your Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09650)
*Elad Sarafian,Gal Kaplun,Ron Banner,Daniel Soudry,Boris Ginsburg*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出“工作空间优化”（Workspace Optimization）概念，即通过演化智能体的外部结构化工作空间（而非其权重）来提升性能。作者在ARC-AGI-3基准上实现的DreamTeam系统，将SOTA从36%提升至38.4%，同时减少了31%的环境交互次数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿语言模型构建的智能体无法直接调整模型权重，需要探索其他可训练的部分。作者旨在回答：除了权重，智能体中还有什么可以训练？答案是智能体的“工作空间”。

Method: 提出工作空间优化（Workspace Optimization）框架，建立与权重训练的结构映射：工件→参数、证据→数据、反例→损失、文本反馈→梯度。具体实现为DreamTeam系统，一个多智能体协作框架，包含构建可执行世界模型、规划、假设、探测、策略制定和失败路由等角色。

Result: 在ARC-AGI-3公开集上（25个游戏，官方评分协议，两次独立运行平均），DreamTeam将SOTA协议匹配智能体的得分从36%提升至38.4%，同时每次游戏的环境动作使用量减少31%。

Conclusion: 工作空间优化是一种有前途的范式，能够在权重固定的前提下通过演化外部工作空间来提升智能体性能，尤其适用于需要多轮交互的复杂环境。

Abstract: Modern agents built on frontier language models often cannot adapt their weights. What, then, remains trainable? We argue it is the agent's \emph{workspace}, the structured external substrate it reads, writes, and tests; we call its evolution workspace optimization. Workspace optimization targets hard multi-turn environments where a frontier model has strong priors but cannot solve the task in a single shot, so the agent must learn through interaction. We propose a principled way to evolve the workspace, mirroring the structure of weight-space training: artifacts in place of parameters, evidence in place of data, counterexamples in place of losses, and textual feedback in place of gradients. We instantiate the idea in DreamTeam, a multi-agent harness for ARC-AGI-3 whose roles build an executable world model, plan, hypothesize, probe, strategize, and route failures. On the current 25-game ARC-AGI-3 public set under the official scoring protocol and averaged over two independent runs, DreamTeam improves the SOTA protocol-matched agent's score from 36% to 38.4%, while using 31% fewer environment actions per game.

</details>


### [648] [CodeClinic: Evaluating Automation of Coding Skills for Clinical Reasoning Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09675)
*Timothy Ossowski,Xinchi Liu,Danyal Maqbool,Vaibhav Dhanuka,Sheng Zhang,Hoifung Poon,Majid Afshar,Tyler Bradshaw,Junjie Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CodeClinic基准，用于评估LLM代理能否自主合成可复用的临床技能库（而非依赖固定工具集），并设计离线自动形式化流水线将自然语言临床指南转化为可验证的Python技能库，相比零样本代码生成将一致性提升同时每查询令牌使用量减少40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的临床推理系统依赖人工维护的临床工具库（如败血症检测、器官衰竭评估等），维护成本高；而零样本查询或代码生成在处理机构特定临床策略时推理链低效且不可靠。因此需要一种能自主合成与组合可复用临床技能的方法。

Method: 1) 构建CodeClinic基准（基于MIMIC-IV），包含纵向ICU监测（每4小时结构化决策，覆盖25项发现、8个临床家族）和组合信息查询（63k实例、259个任务、9个领域，按组合依赖深度分层）；2) 提出离线自动形式化流水线，通过迭代LLM精炼将自然语言临床指南转化为可验证的Python技能库。

Result: 相比零样本代码生成，所生成的技能库在提升推理一致性的同时，将每查询令牌使用量减少高达40%。

Conclusion: 通过让LLM代理自主构建可复用技能库而非依赖固定工具箱，能够更高效、更一致地完成临床推理任务，为自适应临床决策支持系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: Clinical reasoning agents based on large language models (LLMs) aim to automate tasks such as intensive care unit (ICU) monitoring and patient state tracking from electronic health records (EHRs). Existing systems typically rely on manually curated clinical tools or skills for concepts such as sepsis detection and organ failure assessment. However, maintaining these tool libraries requires substantial expert effort, while zero-shot querying or code generation often produces inefficient and unreliable reasoning chains, especially under institution-specific clinical policies. We introduce CodeClinic, a benchmark built on MIMIC-IV for evaluating whether LLM agents can synthesize and compose reusable clinical skills instead of relying on fixed toolboxes. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: longitudinal ICU surveillance and compositional information seeking. The longitudinal setting simulates monitoring patient trajectories with structured decisions every four hours across 25 findings and eight clinical families, while the compositional setting spans 63k instances across 259 tasks in nine domains and is stratified by compositional dependency depth to evaluate increasingly complex multi-step reasoning. We further propose an offline autoformalization pipeline that converts natural-language clinical guidelines into reusable and verified Python skill libraries through iterative LLM refinement. Compared with zero-shot code generation, the resulting libraries improve consistency while reducing per-query token usage by up to 40%.

</details>


### [649] [Absurd World: A Simple Yet Powerful Method to Absurdify the Real-world for Probing LLM Reasoning Capabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09678)
*Ryan Albright,Golam Md Muktadir,Zarif Ikram,S M Jubaer,Mehrab Hossain,Dianbo Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Absurd World基准框架，通过构建逻辑一致但场景荒谬的世界测试LLM的纯逻辑推理能力，发现即便使用高级提示技术，LLM在脱离现实模式后推理能力显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究聚焦于用越来越复杂的问题挑战LLM推理，但LLM在简单逻辑推理中的鲁棒性被忽视。作者希望探究LLM是否真正理解逻辑，还是仅仅依赖现实世界的模式记忆。

Method: 将现实世界模型分解为符号、动作、序列和事件，自动改造为逻辑相同但场景荒谬的"荒谬世界"，评估多种LLM在不同提示技术下的表现。

Result: Absurd World被证明是评估LLM逻辑推理能力的有效工具，LLM在去掉现实模式依赖后表现显著下降，揭示了其推理的脆弱性。

Conclusion: 该框架可用于广泛测试LLM对现实世界问题变体的鲁棒性，验证其推理能力是否真正健壮。

Abstract: While extremely powerful and versatile at various tasks, the thinking capabilities of large language models (LLMs) are often put under scrutiny as they sometimes fail to solve problems that humans can systematically solve. However, recent literature focuses on breaking LLM reasoning with increasingly complex problems, and whether an LLM is robust in simple logical reasoning remains underexplored. This paper proposes Absurd World, a benchmarking framework, to test LLMs against altered realism, where scenarios are logically coherent, and humans can easily solve the tasks. Absurd World breaks a real-world model into symbols, actions, sequences, and events, which are automatically altered to create absurd worlds where the logic to solve the tasks remains the same. It evaluates a large collection of models with simple and advanced prompting techniques, and proves that it is an effective tool to determine LLMs' ability to think logically, ignoring the patterns learned from the real world. One can use this framework to extensively test an LLM against a real-world problem to verify whether the LLM's reasoning capability is robust against variations of the task.

</details>


### [650] [Unpredictability dissociates from structured control in language agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09692)
*Jia Xiao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文通过大规模实验（74,352次调用、26,946次生成、57,816条记录）证明：高随机性（随机采样）无法替代结构化控制机制（理由、记忆、自状态和抑制），结构化代理在行为预测性、动作-场耦合等方面全面优于随机化变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验随机采样（stochastic sampling）能否替代语言代理中结构化控制组件（理由、记忆、自我状态、抑制）对动作选择的作用，即不可预测性是否足以产生受控行为。

Method: 在语言代理中设计可选择性禁用控制组件的消融实验（lesion matrix），跨7个数据集进行74,352次基线调用；进行匹配界面控制（26,946次生成）和排除自由形式痕迹的主行为测试（57,816条记录）；扩展到Qwen2.5和Mistral-7B系列20个任务族和3种代理框架；进行盲审（1,200重叠项）及多项严格压力测试（熵匹配、令牌/计算匹配、反事实翻转）。

Result: 高随机性比较器在7/7数据集中比结构化控制变体更不可预测；目标理由和否决消融在7/7数据集中均降低了结构化控制特征；结构化代理在所有数据集上动作-场耦合强于随机、事后、打乱和冗余控制；主测试中结构化变体在所有行为和数据集上优于比较对象；扩展实验及盲审保持高一致性；严格的熵匹配、令牌/计算匹配和反事实翻转测试未通过门槛。

Conclusion: 在该实现的代理家族中，随机不可预测性不能复现结构化的、动作耦合的控制行为；结构化控制机制（理由、记忆、自状态、抑制）对实现有意义的、有约束的智能行为不可或缺。

Abstract: Unpredictable behavior is often taken as evidence of control, yet stochastic dispersion and structured action control need not coincide. This paper tests whether stochastic sampling can substitute for structured mechanisms that couple reasons, memory, self-state and inhibition to action selection in a language-agent implementation whose control components can be selectively disabled. In a seven-dataset baseline lesion matrix comprising 74,352 calls, the high-stochasticity comparator was more unpredictable than the structured-control variant in 7/7 datasets, whereas targeted reason and veto lesions reduced the expected structured-control profiles in 7/7 datasets each. In a matched-interface control spanning 26,946 generations, the structured agent maintained stronger action-field coupling than all stochastic, post-hoc, scrambled and verbosity controls across every dataset. The primary behavioral test removed free-form trace wording from the evaluation: 57,816 scored records showed the structured-control variant exceeding the high-stochasticity comparator or the reason/veto lesions in 7/7 datasets for all predefined behavioral components. Later open-weight runs extended the no-context controls to Qwen2.5 7B, 14B and 32B and to an independent Mistral-7B family across 20 task families and three agent scaffolds; no-fields, scrambled-context and distribution-matched controls failed to recover structured action control. A three-annotator blinded audit over 1,200 overlap items preserved high agreement. Strict entropy matching, strict token/compute matching and a formal counterfactual-flip stress test did not meet their gates and are treated as limitations. Stochastic unpredictability did not reproduce structured, action-coupled control in this implemented agent family.

</details>


### [651] [Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09698)
*Josefa Lia Stoisser,Marc Boubnovski Martell,Sidsel Boldsen,Kaspar Märtens,Robert Kitchen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Ambig-DS，两个诊断套件分别针对预测目标模糊（51个任务）和评估目标模糊（61个任务），系统评估数据科学智能体在任务表述模糊时的失败模式。研究发现：智能体会悄悄地对模糊任务做出错误假设并生成看似正确的流程，而非执行错误；允许提一个问题能很大程度恢复性能，但智能体无法可靠判断何时该提问——宽松提示导致过度提问，保守提示导致沉默默认。任务表述模糊才是DS智能体评估被忽视的瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据科学智能体基准仅关注流程是否能运行，完全忽略了智能体是否识别到任务表述不明确的问题。当智能体从协驾转向自动驾驶时，这种静默的错误任务重构（silent misframing）成为关键失败模式，亟待系统性诊断。

Method: 构建两个诊断套件：Ambig-DS-Target（基于DSBench，51个任务）和Ambig-DS-Objective（基于MLE-bench，61个任务）。对每个任务，配对原始完整版本与通过受控编辑得到的模糊版本，经人工与LLM联合验证确保模糊版本存在多种合理且决策相关的解释。测试五种不同能力的智能体。

Result: 1）失败模式是静默错误：智能体提交错误目标或错误评估指标，而非执行错误；2）允许提一个澄清问题在理想条件下可恢复大部分性能损失，说明任务信息缺失是关键退化因素；3）但智能体无法可靠判断何时提问：宽松提示导致过度提问，保守提示导致沉默假设。

Conclusion: 识别任务目标和评估目标的不明确性（而非流水线执行）才是当前DS智能体评估中被忽略的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: As data-science agents shift from co-pilots to auto-pilots, silent misframing becomes a critical failure mode. Agents quietly commit to plausible but unintended task framings, producing clean, executable artifacts that hide their incorrect assessment of the task. Existing benchmarks score whether the pipeline runs, ignoring whether the agent recognized the task was underspecified. We introduce Ambig-DS, two diagnostic suites: one for prediction-target ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Target, 51 tasks built on DSBench, a tabular modeling benchmark) and one for evaluation-objective ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Objective, 61 tasks built on MLE-bench, a Kaggle-style ML competition benchmark), constructed so that scoring uses each source benchmark's original evaluator. For every task we pair the original, fully specified version with an ambiguous variant produced by controlled edits; a human-and-LLM verification pipeline confirms each variant admits multiple plausible interpretations with decision-relevant consequences. The suites are analyzed independently and ambiguity lowers performance in both. Across five agents spanning efficient to frontier-class models, we find in our controlled diagnostic setting: (i) failures are silent commitments: wrong-target submissions on Target, wrong-metric or non-committal baseline submissions on Objective, rather than execution errors; (ii) allowing the agent to ask one clarifying question recovers much of the loss under idealized conditions, suggesting missing framing information drives a substantial part of the observed degradation; but (iii) agents cannot reliably tell when to use it: permissive prompts induce over-asking on clear tasks, while conservative prompts induce silent defaulting on ambiguous ones. Recognizing target and objective underspecification, not pipeline execution, is the bottleneck missing from standard DS-agent evaluations.

</details>


### [652] [Medical Model Synthesis Architectures: A Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09716)
*Katherine M. Collins,Marlene Berke,Ilia Sucholutsky,Ayman Ali,Adrian Weller,Timothy J. O'Donnell,Tyler Brooke-Wilson,Lionel Wong,Joshua B. Tenenbaum*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索临床知识并构建形式化概率模型，实现可校准、可验证的不确定性推理，用于辅助临床诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统在临床场景中缺乏校准的不确定性推理能力，且推理过程不透明，难以应对医学中固有的高不确定性。

Method: MedMSA框架利用语言模型检索相关先验知识，同时构建形式化概率模型来支持校准且可验证的不确定性推理。

Result: 初步概念验证表明该框架可用于鉴别诊断，生成包含不确定性权重的潜在诊断列表。

Conclusion: 该框架有望实现更安全的临床协作，未来可推广至更广泛的临床应用场景。

Abstract: Medicine is rife with high-stakes uncertainty. Doctors routinely make clinical judgments and decisions that juggle many fundamental unknowns, like predictions about what might be causing a patients' symptoms or decisions about what treatment to try next. Despite increasing interest in developing AI systems that aid or even replace doctors in clinical settings, current systems struggle with calibrated reasoning under uncertainty, and are often deeply opaque about their reasoning. We propose a framework for AI systems that can make practically useful but formally transparent clinical predictions under uncertainty. Given a clinical situation, our framework (MedMSA) uses language models to retrieve relevant prior knowledge, but constructs a formal probabilistic model to support calibrated and verifiable inferences under uncertainty. We show how an initial proof-of-concept of this framework can be used for differential diagnosis, producing an uncertainty-weighted list of potential diagnoses that could explain a patients' symptoms, and discuss future applications and directions for applying this framework more generally for safe clinical collaborations.

</details>


### [653] [Primal-Dual Guided Decoding for Constrained Discrete Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09749)
*Federico Tomasi,Dmitrii Moor,Alice Wang,Mounia Lalmas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种原始-对偶引导解码方法，通过在线拉格朗日乘子法在离散扩散模型的推理阶段实现全局属性约束，无需重训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散模型在生成结构化序列时无法有效强制执行全局属性约束，现有方法通常需要重训练或额外模型评估。

Method: 将约束生成问题形式化为KL正则化优化问题，在每一步去噪时通过自适应拉格朗日乘子修改token logits（添加约束相关偏置），乘子通过镜像下降基于约束违反程度更新。该偏置是约束的最优KL正则化投影，使约束分布尽可能接近无约束分布。

Result: 在主题文本生成、分子设计和音乐播放列表生成三个任务上，该方法仅通过领域特定评分函数实例化，即可在提升约束满足度的同时保持领域相关质量指标。

Conclusion: 该方法无需重训练和额外模型评估，支持多重同时约束，并提供约束违反的形式化界，是一种通用且高效的约束生成推理策略。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models generate structured sequences by progressively unmasking tokens, but enforcing global property constraints during generation remains an open challenge. We propose primal-dual guided decoding, an inference-time method that formulates constrained generation as a KL-regularised optimisation problem and solves it online via adaptive Lagrangian multipliers. At each denoising step, the method modifies token logits through an additive, constraint-dependent bias, with multipliers updated by mirror descent based on constraint violation. The bias arises as the optimal KL-regularised projection of the constraint, so the constrained distribution remains as close as possible to the model's unconstrained distribution while still satisfying the constraint. The method requires no retraining and no additional model evaluations beyond standard sampling, supports multiple simultaneous constraints, and provides formal bounds on constraint violation. We evaluate our approach on topical text generation, molecular design, and music playlist generation, showing that a single algorithm instantiated via domain-specific scoring functions improves constraint satisfaction while preserving relevant domain-specific quality metrics.

</details>


### [654] [UTS at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Agent Councils and Absence-Based Reasoning for Defense Mechanism Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09769)
*Dima Galat,Marian-Andrei Rizoiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个多阶段协商式Agent系统来分类情绪支持对话中的心理防御机制（DMRS）。核心思想是将"缺失"（缺失情感、阻断认知、否认现实）编码为情感-认知整合光谱，通过提示级临床规则获得最大提升（+11.4pp F1）。系统由Gemini 2.5 Agent组成辩护委员会，对证据强度评分而非投票，无需微调即达F1 0.382（前5名）。但发现委员会对少数类存在系统性错误（59-80%的稳定预测错误），源于"L7吸引子"——情感内容默认归入多数类。最终通过三个微调Qwen3.5模型构成的针对性覆盖集成（16个覆盖，+2.4pp），由结构化多Agent系统（构建者、批评者、回归守卫）选择，一次迭代增益超过先前8次尝试之和。在64支队伍中获得第二（F1 0.406）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心理防御机制分类任务中，现有方法忽视了防御机制本质上由"缺失"定义（缺失情感、阻断认知、否认现实）这一核心洞察。同时，复杂Agent系统虽表现良好，但对少数类存在系统性错误，需要针对性改进。

Method: 1) 将"缺失"编码为情感-认知整合光谱的提示级临床规则；2) 多阶段协商式Gemini 2.5 Agent委员会（类特定倡导者对证据强度评分）；3) 识别"L7吸引子"系统性偏差；4) 结构化多Agent系统（构建者+批评者+回归守卫）选择16个覆盖，集成三个微调Qwen3.5模型。

Result: F1 0.406，64支队伍中排名第二。其中临床规则贡献最大增益（+11.4pp），Gemini委员会无需微调即达F1 0.382（前5），Qwen集成覆盖贡献+2.4pp。但委员会对少数类的错误预测率高达59-80%。

Conclusion: 基于"缺失"视角的临床规则编码是DMRS分类的最有效单一策略；多Agent协商架构无需微调即可取得竞争性结果；但需警惕Agent系统对少数类的系统性偏差，针对性覆盖集成是有效的修正手段。

Abstract: This paper describes our system for classifying psychological defense mechanisms in emotional support dialogues using the Defense Mechanism Rating Scales (DMRS), placing second (F1 0.406) among 64 teams.1 A central insight is that defense mechanisms are defined by what is absent: missing affect, blocked cognition, denied reality. We encode this as an affect-cognition integration spectrum in prompt-level clinical rules, which account for the largest single gain (+11.4pp F1). Our architecture is a multi-phase deliberative council of Gemini 2.5 agents where class-specific advocates rate evidence strength rather than voting, achieving F1 0.382 with no fine-tuning - a top-5 result on its own. We find, however, that the council is confidently wrong about minority classes: 59-80% of stable minority predictions are incorrect, driven by a systematic "L7 attractor" in which emotional content defaults to the majority class. A targeted override ensemble from three fine-tuned Qwen3.5 models applies 16 overrides (+2.4pp), selected by a structured multi-agent system (builder, critic, regression guard) that produced a larger F1 gain in one iteration than 8 prior attempts combined.

</details>


### [655] [Marrying Generative Model of Healthcare Events with Digital Twin of Social Determinants of Health for Disease Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09771)
*Ziquan Wei,Tingting Dan,Guorong Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合ICD编码的社会健康决定因素（SDoH）代理的生成模型（\modelname{}），通过条件潜扩散框架连接多器官传感器数据与医疗事件，在UK Biobank数据集上显著优于现有疾病预测和影像特征生成模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有疾病预测生成模型主要依赖医院和登记数据中的事件级表示，缺乏对社会健康决定因素（SDoH）的显式建模，限制了个性化疾病建模和临床决策支持的能力。

Method: 提出条件潜扩散框架，其中包括：1）一个新的几何扩散模型用于表征脑网络（图结构连接）的时间演化；2）其他器官系统的表格数据扩散模型；3）将SDoH代理（ICD编码）整合到生成模型中，用于模拟干预和疾病轨迹推理。

Result: 在UK Biobank数据集上（脑44,834例、心脏23,987例、肝28,722例、肾32,155例，以及近50万条医疗历史序列），\modelname{}在人类疾病自回归模型和影像特征生成基线上均取得显著改进。

Conclusion: 整合SDoH代理的生成模型能有效提升多器官传感器数据驱动的疾病预测与推理能力，为个性化医疗和临床决策提供更全面的建模框架。

Abstract: Despite the central role of sensor-derived measurements such as imaging traits and plasma biomarkers in biomedical research and clinical practice, existing generative models for disease prediction largely depend on event-level representations from hospital and registry data. Given the multi-factorial nature of human disease, the absence of explicit modeling of social determinants of health (SDoH), even in the limited form of ICD-coded proxies (chapters Z and V--Y in ICD-10), limits the capacity for personalized disease modeling and clinical decision support. To address this limitation, we propose a generative model with ICD-coded proxies of SDoH for \textit{in silico} modeling of disease reasoning, a conditioned latent diffusion framework that establishes the connection between multi-organ sensor data with tokenized healthcare events. Specifically, we introduce a novel geometric diffusion model to characterize the temporal evolution of complex data representation such as brain networks (region-to-region connectivity encoded in a graph), in parallel with diffusion models for tabular data from other organ systems. Together, we integrate the generative model with digitalized SDoH proxies (coined \modelname{}) for simulated intervention and reasoning of future disease trajectories. We conduct extensive experiments on the UK Biobank (UKB) dataset, which contains organ-specific imaging traits, including brain (44,834), heart (23,987), liver (28,722), and kidney (32,155), along with nearly 500k medical history sequences (age range: 25$\sim$89 years). Our \modelname{} achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art human disease autoregressive models and imaging trait generative baselines.

</details>


### [656] [Attribution-based Explanations for Markov Decision Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09780)
*Paul Kobialka,Andrea Pferscher,Francesco Leofante,Erika Ábrahám,Silvia Lizeth Tapia Tarifa,Einar Broch Johnsen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）生成基于归因的可解释性方法，能够为状态和执行路径分配重要性分数，并利用策略综合技术高效计算这些分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的归因技术主要针对静态输入特征的单点解释，无法推广到序列决策场景。本文旨在填补这一空白，为MDP的序列决策提供形式化的归因解释方法。

Method: 给出了MDP中归因的形式化定义，聚焦于对单个状态和执行路径的重要性评分；利用策略综合技术来高效计算这些分数，以应对MDP中的非确定性。

Result: 在五个案例研究上进行了评估，展示了该方法在提供序列决策代理逻辑的可解释洞察方面的实用性。

Conclusion: 本文成功地将归因解释扩展到序列决策领域，为理解和解释MDP中的决策逻辑提供了有效的工具。

Abstract: Attribution techniques explain the outcome of an AI model by assigning a numerical score to its inputs. So far, these techniques have mainly focused on attributing importance to static input features at a single point in time, and thus fail to generalize to sequential decision-making settings. This paper fills this gap by introducing techniques to generate attribution-based explanations for Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We give a formal characterization of what attributions should represent in MDPs, focusing on explanations that assign importance scores to both individual states and execution paths. We show how importance scores can be computed by leveraging techniques for strategy synthesis, enabling the efficient computation of these scores despite the non-determinism inherent in an MDP. We evaluate our approach on five case-studies, demonstrating its utility in providing interpretable insights into the logic of sequential decision-making agents.

</details>


### [657] [EnactToM: An Evolving Benchmark for Functional Theory of Mind in Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09826)
*Gurusha Juneja,Dylan Lu,Saaket Agashe,Parth Diwane,Edward Gunn,Jayanth Srinivasa,Gaowen Liu,William Yang Wang,Yali Du,Xin Eric Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出EnactToM，一个包含300个具身多智能体任务的基准，用于测试功能性心智理论（functional ToM）。在硬任务上，所有前沿模型的功能任务完成得分为0.0%，而文字信念探测平均为45.0%。93%的失败源于认知协调问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ToM基准主要测试文字性信念（literal ToM），但缺乏对具身环境中基于隐式信念做出最优行动的能力（functional ToM）的评估。AI智能体在多智能体协作中需要functional ToM才能高效协作。

Method: 构建EnactToM基准：300个3D家庭环境中的具身多智能体任务，包含部分可观测性、私有信息和受限通信。每个任务经过形式化验证确保可解性和所需的认知深度，并随模型能力提升动态生成更难任务。

Result: 在硬任务上，7个前沿模型functional ToM任务完成得分为0.0% Pass^3，而literal belief probes平均为45.0%。93%的失败归因于认知协调失败（信息隐藏、忽视伙伴约束、错误分配消息）。

Conclusion: 当前AI模型在功能性ToM上存在严重缺陷，尽管在文字性ToM上表现尚可，但具身协作中普遍出现认知协调失败，这为未来研究提供了明确方向。

Abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to track others epistemic state, makes humans efficient collaborators. AI agents need the same capacity in multi agent settings, yet existing benchmarks mostly test literal ToM by asking direct belief questions. The ability act optimally on implicit beliefs in embodied environments, called functional ToM, remains largely untested. We introduce EnactToM, an evolving benchmark of 300 embodied multi-agent tasks set in a 3D household with partial observability, private information, and constrained communication. Each task is formally verified for solvability and required epistemic depth, and new tasks are generated increase difficulty as models improve. On the hard split, all seven evaluated frontier models score 0.0% Pass^3 on functional task completion, while averaging 45.0% on literal belief probes. Manual analysis traces 93% of sampled failures to epistemic coordination breakdowns such as withheld information, ignored partner constraints, and misallocated messages, providing a concrete target for future work.

</details>


### [658] [Yield Curve Forecasting using Machine Learning and Econometrics: A Comparative Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09842)
*Aman Singh,Tokunbo Ogunfunmi,Sanjiv Das*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文比较了47年日度美国国债收益率曲线数据上，计量经济学/时间序列分析、经典机器学习和深度学习方法的表现。总体而言，ARIMA和朴素计量经济学模型表现最佳，而TimeGPT、LGBM和RNN在机器学习方法中表现较好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习在NLP和计算机视觉领域取得革命性进展，但其在时间序列预测（尤其是金融领域）中的影响仍存争议。国债收益率曲线对债券市场至关重要，而现有研究缺乏对多种方法（特别是深度学习）的系统比较。

Method: 使用47年日度国债收益率曲线数据，对比ARIMA及其扩展模型、朴素基准、集成方法、RNN以及多种Transformer等预测算法的效果，并探讨平稳与非平稳数据作为深度学习输入的适用性。

Result: ARIMA和朴素计量经济学模型在多数情况下优于其他模型；机器学习方法中TimeGPT、LGBM和RNN表现最佳；仅在某个时间段内计量经济学模型未占优。

Conclusion: 在国债收益率曲线预测任务上，传统计量经济学/时间序列方法仍具有竞争力，深度学习方法尚未取得压倒性优势；数据平稳性选择对深度学习模型有影响。

Abstract: While machine learning has revolutionized many fields such as natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision, its impact on time-series forecasting is still widely disputed, especially in the finance domain. This paper compares forecasting performance on U.S. Treasury yield curve data across econometrics/time-series analysis, classical machine learning, and deep learning methods, using daily data over 47 years. The Treasury yield curve is important because it is widely used by every participant in the bond markets, which are larger than equity markets. We examine a variety of methods that have not been tested on yield curve forecasting, especially deep learning algorithms. The algorithms include the Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) model and its extensions, naive benchmarks, ensemble methods, Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and multiple transformers built for forecasting. ARIMA and naive econometric models outperform other models overall, except in one time block. Of the machine learning methods, TimeGPT, LGBM and RNNs perform the best. Furthermore, the paper explores whether stationary or nonstationary data are more appropriate as input to deep learning models.

</details>


### [659] [The Metacognitive Probe: Five Behavioural Calibration Diagnostics for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09844)
*Rafael C. T. Oliveira*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个名为Metacognitive Probe的五任务、15槽位的诊断工具，将LLM的自信行为分解为5个行为维度（校准、警觉、边界、范围、推理验证）。在8个前沿模型和69名人类上评估，发现Gemini 2.5 Flash存在47分的显著分离（任务内校准88，跨任务难度预测仅41）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复合基准（MMLU等）只能评估模型是否产生正确答案，但无法探测模型是否"知道"自己的答案可能错误，即缺乏对模型元认知能力（自信-正确对齐）的细粒度诊断。

Method: 设计Metacognitive Probe，包含5个任务（T1-CC校准、T2-EV认知警觉、T3-KB知识边界、T4-CR校准范围/难度预测、T5-RCV推理链验证），共15个评估槽位，基于Flavell (1979)和Nelson & Narens (1990)的理论但不假设跨物种元认知。

Result: 在8个前沿模型和69名人类上测试，发现Gemini 2.5 Flash存在47分的显著分离：任务内校准（T1-CC=88，Spearman rho=+0.551，p=0.005）表现最佳，但跨任务难度预测（T4-CR=41）表现最差。预定的人类发展假说被证伪。

Conclusion: 复合校准基准会掩盖模型在特定窄域中的过度自信问题，Metacognitive Probe能够揭示这些隐藏的元认知缺陷，模型在不同置信维度上存在显著的行为分离。

Abstract: The Metacognitive Probe is an exploratory five-task, 15-slot diagnostic that decomposes an LLM's confidence behaviour into five behaviourally-distinct dimensions: confidence calibration (T1-CC), epistemic vigilance (T2-EV), knowledge boundary (T3-KB), calibration range (T4-CR), and reasoning-chain validation (T5-RCV). It is evaluated on N=8 frontier models and N=69 humans. The instrument is motivated by Flavell (1979) and Nelson and Narens (1990) but operates on observable confidence-correctness alignment; it is not a validated cross-species metacognition scale, and the pre-specified human developmental hypothesis was falsified.
  Composite benchmarks (MMLU, BIG-Bench, HELM, GPQA) ask whether a model produces a correct response. They are silent on whether the model knows when its response is wrong. A model can score 80 on a composite calibration benchmark and still be wildly overconfident in narrow pockets the aggregate cannot surface. The Metacognitive Probe surfaces those pockets.
  Our headline is a 47-point within-model dissociation in Gemini 2.5 Flash: panel-best within-task calibration (T1-CC = 88; Spearman rho = +0.551, 95% CI [+0.14, +0.80], p = 0.005) and panel-worst cross-task difficulty prediction (T4-CR = 41; sigma_conf = 1.4 across twelve factoids).

</details>


### [660] [Fairness of Explanations in Artificial Intelligence (AI): A Unifying Framework, Axioms, and Future Direction toward Responsible AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09852)
*Gideon Popoola,John Sheppard*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 这篇综述识别并探讨了算法公平性与可解释AI交叉领域中的“程序性偏见”盲点：即使模型输出满足公平性标准，其推理过程仍可能存在不公平。作者提出了条件不变性框架来形式化解释公平性，并构建了七维分类法、三种不公平生成机制以及六步评估工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将算法公平性和可解释AI视为两个独立领域，忽略了模型推理过程可能存在的公平性问题（程序性偏见）。作者旨在填补这一交叉盲点，将解释公平性作为独立研究对象。

Method: 1) 统一的理论与文献综述；2) 提出条件不变性框架形式化解释公平性；3) 构建七维分类法；4) 识别三种解释不公平的生成机制（表示驱动、解释模型不匹配、可行动性驱动）；5) 提出六步评估工作流。

Result: 首次对解释公平性领域进行统一的理论与文献综述；论证了事后解释器在认证解释公平性方面的局限性；所有现有解释公平性指标均可视为条件不变性框架的部分操作化。

Conclusion: 程序性偏见是一个重要但被忽视的问题，需要将解释公平性作为独立科学对象进行研究；提出的框架和分类法为未来的审计实践提供了标准化路径。

Abstract: Machine learning algorithms are being used in high-stakes decisions, including those in criminal justice, healthcare, credit, and employment. The research community has responded with two largely independent research fields: \emph{algorithmic fairness}, which targets equitable outcomes, and \emph{explainable AI} (XAI), which targets interpretable reasoning. This survey identifies and maps a novel blind spot at their intersection, which is a model that can satisfy every standard fairness criterion in its outputs while being profoundly unfair in its \emph{reasoning process}. We refer to this as the procedural bias, and mitigating it requires treating the fairness of explanations as a distinct object of scientific study.
  To our knowledge, we provide the first unified theoretical and literature review of this emerging field and elucidate the drawbacks of post-hoc explainers in certifying explanation fairness. Our central contribution is a \emph{conditional invariance framework} formalizing explanation fairness as the requirement that explanations should be indifferent regardless of the protected attributes $ P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = a) = P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = b)$ for all task-relevant $x$, a single principle from which all existing explanation fairness metrics emerge as partial operationalizations. We introduce a seven-dimensional taxonomy, identify three generative mechanisms of explanation inequity (representation-driven, explanation-model mismatch, actionability-driven), and propose a canonical six-step evaluation workflow for operationalizing explanation fairness audits in practice.

</details>


### [661] [When to Re-Commit: Temporal Abstraction Discovery for Long-Horizon Vision-Language Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09860)
*Chen Li,Zhantao Yang,Fangyi Chen,Han Zhang,Anudeepsekhar Bolimera,Marios Savvides*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将承诺深度（commitment depth）作为可学习的状态条件变量，使视觉-语言策略能自适应地决定执行多少动作后再重新规划，在滑动拼图和推箱子任务上以更少动作实现更高求解率，并理论上证明了状态条件承诺深度优于固定深度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长时域推理系统通常将承诺深度（两次重规划之间执行的无反馈原始动作数量）设为手工设计的固定标量，无法在不同状态下自适应调整，导致重规划成本与执行误差之间的权衡不佳。
